 755 | /* â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•

 763 | Chart.register(ChartDataLabels);

 769 | const PAL_GLOW=['rgba(0,145,218,0.8)','rgba(0,163,161,0.8)','rgba(77,174,220,0.8)','rgba(127,222,189,0.8)','rgba(0,94,184,0.8)','rgba(109,32,119,0.8)','rgba(232,160,0,0.8)','rgba(155,184,222,0.8)'];
 770 | const rga=(h,a)=>{const r=parseInt(h.slice(1,3),16),g=parseInt(h.slice(3,5),16),b=parseInt(h.slice(5,7),16);return `rgba(${r},${g},${b},${a})`;};
 771 | const GL={color:'rgba(8,21,42,0.06)',lineWidth:0.6};
 772 | const NG={display:false};

 774 | 
 775 | let step=0, dashCharts={}, aiQs={}, worldData=null, dd={}, mapDrillMode=false;
 776 | const userTouched=new Set();
 777 | 
 778 | /* â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•
 779 |    FORM NAVIGATION
 780 | â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â• */
 781 | function pickPill(el,gid){
 782 |   const grp=gid?document.getElementById(gid):el.closest('.pills');
 783 |   grp.querySelectorAll('.pill').forEach(p=>p.classList.remove('on'));
 784 |   el.classList.add('on');
 785 |   userTouched.add(grp.id||gid);
 786 |   calcLive();
 787 | }
 788 | function pickAIPill(el){
 789 |   el.closest('.pills').querySelectorAll('.pill').forEach(p=>p.classList.remove('on'));
 790 |   el.classList.add('on');
 791 |   calcLive();
 792 | }
 793 | 
 794 | function goTo(s){
 795 |   document.querySelectorAll('.sec').forEach(x=>x.classList.remove('active'));
 796 |   document.getElementById('sec'+s).classList.add('active');
 797 |   for(let i=0;i<9;i++){const b=document.getElementById('sb'+i);if(!b)continue;b.classList.remove('active','done');if(i<s)b.classList.add('done');}
 798 |   document.getElementById('sb'+s).classList.add('active');
 799 |   step=s;
 800 |   document.getElementById('prevBtn').style.visibility=s===0?'hidden':'visible';
 801 |   document.getElementById('nextBtn').textContent=s===8?'Generate Dashboard â†’':'Next â†’';
 802 |   document.getElementById('nextBtn').className=s===8?'btn btn-go':'btn btn-primary';
 803 |   document.getElementById('slbl').textContent=`Step ${s+1} of 9`;
 804 |   document.getElementById('progBar').style.width=((s+1)/9*100)+'%';
 805 | }
 806 | 
 807 | function navigate(d){
 808 |   const n=step+d;
 809 |   if(n<0)return;
 810 |   if(n>8){buildDashboard();return;}
 811 |   if(step===0&&n===1&&ctxReady()){
 812 |     generateAIQuestions().then(()=>goTo(1));
 813 |   }else{
 814 |     goTo(n);
 815 |   }
 816 | }
 817 | 
 818 | function ctxReady(){return document.getElementById('sector').value&&document.getElementById('bizType').value&&document.getElementById('geo').value;}
 819 | 
 820 | function onCtxChange(){
 821 |   const s=document.getElementById('sector');
 822 |   const tag=document.getElementById('sectorTag');
 823 |   if(s.value){tag.textContent=s.options[s.selectedIndex].text.split('/')[0].trim();tag.classList.add('active');}
 824 |   else{tag.textContent='All Sectors';tag.classList.remove('active');}
 825 |   calcLive();
 826 | }
 827 | 
 828 | /* â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•
 829 |    LIVE SCORING
 830 | â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â• */
 831 | function calcLive(){
 832 |   // â”€â”€ Step 0 context fields â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
 833 |   const hasSector  = document.getElementById('sector').value?1:0;
 834 |   const hasBizType = document.getElementById('bizType').value?1:0;
 835 |   const hasGeo     = document.getElementById('geo').value?1:0;
 836 |   const probLen    = document.getElementById('problem').value.length;
 837 |   const probScore  = probLen>120?5:probLen>60?3:probLen>20?1:0;
 838 |   const stageVal   = +(document.querySelector('#stagePills .pill.on')?.dataset.val)||0;
 839 | 
 840 |   // Only score if context is filled
 841 |   const contextFilled = hasSector&&hasBizType&&hasGeo;
 842 | 
 843 |   // â”€â”€ Read actual selected values from AI questions â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
 844 |   // Each select has data-w (weight) and returns v (1-5)
 845 |   // We track which section each question belongs to via ID prefix
 846 |   const selScores={d1:[],d2:[],d3:[],d4:[],d5:[],d6:[]};
 847 | 
 848 |   // Map question IDs to dimensions
 849 |   // s1=Market Size(d1), s2=Audience(d2), s3=Competition(d3),
 850 |   // s4=Revenue(d4), s5=Risk(d5), s6=GTM(d4), s7=PMF(d2), s8=SectorFit(d6)
 851 |   const dimMap={'s1':'d1','s2':'d2','s3':'d3','s4':'d4','s5':'d5','s6':'d4','s7':'d2','s8':'d6','f1':'d1','f2':'d2','f3':'d3','f4':'d4','f5':'d5','f6':'d4','f7':'d2','f8':'d6'};
 852 | 
 853 |   document.querySelectorAll('.ai-sel').forEach(el=>{
 854 |     if(!el.value)return;
 855 |     const v=+(el.value)||0;          // actual selected value 1-5
 856 |     const w=+(el.dataset.w)||2;      // weight of this question
 857 |     const prefix=el.id.replace(/q\d+$/,'').replace(/^s/,'s').slice(0,2); // e.g. s1, s2
 858 |     const dim=dimMap[prefix]||dimMap[el.id.slice(0,2)]||'d1';
 859 |     (selScores[dim]=selScores[dim]||[]).push({v,w});
 860 |   });
 861 | 
 862 |   document.querySelectorAll('.ai-pills').forEach(grp=>{
 863 |     const on=grp.querySelector('.pill.on');
 864 |     if(!on)return;
 865 |     const v=+(on.dataset.val)||3;
 866 |     const id=grp.id||'';
 867 |     const prefix=id.slice(0,2);
 868 |     const dim=dimMap[prefix]||'d1';
 869 |     (selScores[dim]=selScores[dim]||[]).push({v,w:2});
 870 |   });
 871 | 
 872 |   document.querySelectorAll('.ai-chk:checked').forEach(el=>{
 873 |     const section=el.closest('.sec');
 874 |     const secId=section?.id||'sec1';
 875 |     const secNum=+secId.replace('sec','')||1;
 876 |     const dimKeys=['d1','d2','d3','d4','d5','d4','d2','d6'];
 877 |     const dim=dimKeys[secNum-1]||'d6';
 878 |     (selScores[dim]=selScores[dim]||[]).push({v:4,w:1}); // checkboxes = moderate positive
 879 |   });
 880 | 
 881 |   // â”€â”€ Calculate each dimension score (0-100) â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
 882 |   function dimScore(key){
 883 |     const items=selScores[key]||[];
 884 |     if(!items.length)return null; // not yet answered
 885 |     const totalW=items.reduce((s,i)=>s+i.w,0);
 886 |     const weighted=items.reduce((s,i)=>s+(i.v*i.w),0);
 887 |     // weighted average on 1-5 scale â†’ convert to 0-100
 888 |     return Math.round(((weighted/totalW)-1)/4*100);
 889 |   }
 890 | 
 891 |   const d1=dimScore('d1'); // Market Size
 892 |   const d2=dimScore('d2'); // Audience Quality
 893 |   const d3=dimScore('d3'); // Competition Edge
 894 |   const d4=dimScore('d4'); // Revenue Potential
 895 |   const d5=dimScore('d5'); // Risk Profile
 896 |   const d6=dimScore('d6'); // Sector Fit
 897 | 
 898 |   // â”€â”€ Context bonus (filling basics) â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
 899 |   // Max 15 points for context â€” NOT for just having a sector selected
 900 |   const contextBonus=contextFilled?(hasSector*3+hasBizType*3+hasGeo*2+probScore+Math.min(stageVal,5)):0;
 901 | 
 902 |   // â”€â”€ Overall score = weighted average of dims + context â”€
 903 |   // Dims that haven't been answered yet are excluded from average
 904 |   const answeredDims=[d1,d2,d3,d4,d5,d6].filter(v=>v!==null);
 905 |   let overall=0;
 906 |   if(!contextFilled||answeredDims.length===0){
 907 |     // Nothing meaningful answered â€” score is 0
 908 |     overall=0;
 909 |   } else {
 910 |     // Weighted: competition(d3) and revenue(d4) matter most
 911 |     const weights=[15,20,25,25,10,5]; // d1 d2 d3 d4 d5 d6
 912 |     const allDims=[d1,d2,d3,d4,d5,d6];
 913 |     let wSum=0, wTotal=0;
 914 |     allDims.forEach((v,i)=>{
 915 |       if(v!==null){wSum+=v*weights[i];wTotal+=weights[i];}
 916 |     });
 917 |     const dimAvg=wTotal>0?wSum/wTotal:0;
 918 | 
 919 |     // Context bonus adds up to 15 points on top of dim average
 920 |     // But only if at least 2 sections answered
 921 |     const bonus=answeredDims.length>=2?Math.round(contextBonus/15*15):0;
 922 |     overall=Math.min(100,Math.round(dimAvg*0.85+bonus));
 923 | 
 924 |     // Penalty: if less than 3 sections answered, cap score at 60
 925 |     if(answeredDims.length<3)overall=Math.min(overall,60);
 926 |     // Penalty: if problem statement too short, cap at 70
 927 |     if(probLen<40&&overall>70)overall=70;
 928 |   }
 929 | 
 930 |   // â”€â”€ Update UI â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
 931 |   const lsEl=document.getElementById('liveScore');
 932 |   const lgEl=document.getElementById('liveGrade');
 933 |   if(overall===0){
 934 |     lsEl.textContent='0';lsEl.className='big-sc sc-zero';
 935 |     lgEl.textContent='Fill in the form';lgEl.style.color='#9BAABB';
 936 |     document.getElementById('topScoreWrap').style.display='none';
 937 |     // Reset dim bars
 938 |     ['bf1','bf2','bf3','bf4','bf5','bf6'].forEach(id=>{const el=document.getElementById(id);if(el)el.style.width='0%';});
 939 |     ['d1lbl','d2lbl','d3lbl','d4lbl','d5lbl','d6lbl'].forEach(id=>{const el=document.getElementById(id);if(el)el.textContent='â€”';});
 940 |     return;
 941 |   }
 942 |   lsEl.textContent=overall;
 943 |   if(overall>=70){lsEl.className='big-sc sc-high';lgEl.textContent='High Potential âœ“';lgEl.style.color='#00A3A1';}
 944 |   else if(overall>=45){lsEl.className='big-sc sc-mid';lgEl.textContent='Moderate Potential';lgEl.style.color='#E8A000';}
 945 |   else{lsEl.className='big-sc sc-low';lgEl.textContent='Needs Strengthening';lgEl.style.color='#C8002D';}
 946 | 
 947 |   document.getElementById('topScoreWrap').style.display='flex';
 948 |   document.getElementById('topScore').textContent=overall+'/100';
 949 | 
 950 |   // â”€â”€ Update individual dimension bars â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
 951 |   const dimVals=[d1,d2,d3,d4,d5,d6];
 952 |   const dimColors=['#00338D','#0091DA','#E8A000','#005EB8','#6D2077','#00A3A1'];
 953 |   ['bf1','bf2','bf3','bf4','bf5','bf6'].forEach((id,i)=>{
 954 |     const el=document.getElementById(id);
 955 |     if(!el)return;
 956 |     const v=dimVals[i];
 957 |     el.style.width=(v!==null?v:0)+'%';
 958 |     el.style.background=dimColors[i];
 959 |   });
 960 |   ['d1lbl','d2lbl','d3lbl','d4lbl','d5lbl','d6lbl'].forEach((id,i)=>{
 961 |     const el=document.getElementById(id);
 962 |     if(!el)return;
 963 |     const v=dimVals[i];
 964 |     el.textContent=v!==null?v+'/100':'â€”';
 965 |   });
 966 | 
 967 |   buildLiveInsights(overall,{d1,d2,d3,d4,d5,d6});
 968 | }

 970 | function buildLiveInsights(t,dims){
 971 |   const sec=document.getElementById('sector').value;
 972 |   const geo=document.getElementById('geo').value;
 973 |   const items=[];
 974 |   dims=dims||{};

 976 |   // Score-based headline
 977 |   if(t>=70)items.push('Strong overall market potential â€” fundamentals solid across answered dimensions.');
 978 |   else if(t>=50)items.push('Moderate potential â€” see which dimensions below need strengthening.');
 979 |   else if(t>=30)items.push('Several dimensions are weak â€” fill more steps to get precise guidance.');
 980 |   else if(t>0)items.push('Early stage â€” complete all 9 steps for a full and accurate score.');
 981 | 
 982 |   // Dimension-specific insights â€” only shown when that dim is answered
 983 |   const dimNames={d1:'Market Size',d2:'Audience Quality',d3:'Competition Edge',d4:'Revenue Potential',d5:'Risk Profile',d6:'Sector Fit'};
 984 |   const weakDims=Object.entries(dims).filter(([,v])=>v!==null&&v<45).sort((a,b)=>a[1]-b[1]);
 985 |   const strongDims=Object.entries(dims).filter(([,v])=>v!==null&&v>=70).sort((a,b)=>b[1]-a[1]);
 986 | 
 987 |   if(weakDims.length>0){
 988 |     const [wk,wv]=weakDims[0];
 989 |     items.push(`âš ï¸ ${dimNames[wk]} scores ${wv}/100 â€” your weakest dimension. Focus here first.`);
 990 |   }
 991 |   if(strongDims.length>0){
 992 |     const [sk,sv]=strongDims[0];
 993 |     items.push(`âœ… ${dimNames[sk]} scores ${sv}/100 â€” your strongest signal to lead with.`);
 994 |   }
 995 | 
 996 |   // Sector-specific tips
 997 |   if(sec==='IT')items.push('SaaS: NRR above 110% is the single most bankable investor signal.');
 998 |   if(sec==='HC')items.push('HealthTech: CDSCO regulatory class determines your entire launch timeline.');
 999 |   if(sec==='FS')items.push('FinTech: India Stack (UPI+AA+eKYC) cuts onboarding cost by up to 80%.');
1000 |   if(geo==='T2')items.push('Tier 2/3 India: 60% of new internet users, 3Ã— less competition than metros.');

1004 |     `<div class="ins-item"><div class="ins-dot"></div><span>${x}</span></div>`).join('');

1051 | async function generateAIQuestions(){
1052 |   const sEl=document.getElementById('sector');
1053 |   const tEl=document.getElementById('bizType');
1054 |   const gEl=document.getElementById('geo');
1055 |   const sector=sEl.options[sEl.selectedIndex].text;
1056 |   const bizType=tEl.options[tEl.selectedIndex].text;
1057 |   const geo=gEl.options[gEl.selectedIndex].text;
1058 |   const problem=document.getElementById('problem').value||'Not specified';
1059 |   const bizName=document.getElementById('bizName').value||'the product';
1060 |   const stage=document.querySelector('#stagePills .pill.on')?.textContent||'Not specified';
1061 | 
1062 |   // Show skeletons while loading
1063 |   [1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8].forEach(i=>{
1064 |     const el=document.getElementById('q'+i);
1065 |     if(el)el.innerHTML='<div class="ql-skeleton"><div class="ql-skel-item"></div><div class="ql-skel-item"></div><div class="ql-skel-item"></div></div>';
1066 |   });
1067 | 
1068 |   try{
1069 |     // Retry with long wait for Gemini 429 rate limits (free tier = 15 req/min)
1070 |     const fetchWithRetry=async(url,opts,maxTries=2)=>{
1071 |       for(let attempt=1;attempt<=maxTries;attempt++){
1072 |         const r=await fetch(url,opts);
1073 |         if(r.status===429||r.status===529){
1074 |           if(attempt===maxTries) return r;
1075 |           const wait=62000; // Gemini free tier resets every 60s â€” wait 62s
1076 |           [1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8].forEach(i=>{
1077 |             const el=document.getElementById('q'+i);
1078 |             if(el)el.innerHTML=`<div style="padding:16px;font-size:12px;color:#627289;text-align:center">â³ Rate limit reached â€” waiting 62s for Gemini free tier resetâ€¦<br><br><span style="font-size:10px;color:#9BAABB">(Free tier: 15 requests/min. This is normal.)</span></div>`;
1079 |           });
1080 |           // Countdown display
1081 |           let remaining=62;
1082 |           const timer=setInterval(()=>{
1083 |             remaining--;
1084 |             [1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8].forEach(i=>{
1085 |               const el=document.getElementById('q'+i);
1086 |               if(el)el.innerHTML=`<div style="padding:16px;font-size:12px;color:#627289;text-align:center">â³ Rate limit â€” retrying in <strong style="color:#00338D">${remaining}s</strong>â€¦<br><br><span style="font-size:10px;color:#9BAABB">Gemini free tier resets every 60 seconds.</span></div>`;
1087 |             });
1088 |             if(remaining<=0)clearInterval(timer);
1089 |           },1000);
1090 |           await new Promise(res=>setTimeout(res,wait));
1091 |           clearInterval(timer);
1092 |           continue;
1093 |         }
1094 |         if(r.status>=500&&attempt<maxTries){
1095 |           await new Promise(res=>setTimeout(res,3000));
1096 |           continue;
1097 |         }
1098 |         return r;
1099 |       }
1100 |     };
1101 | 
1102 |     const _KEY='USE_SERVER_KEY';
1103 |     const resp=await fetchWithRetry('/api',{

1136 |     if(!allText) throw new Error('Empty response from API');
1137 | 
1138 |     // Strip any markdown fences the model may have added
1139 |     let raw=allText.trim();
1140 |     const fenceMatch=raw.match(/```(?:json)?\s*([\s\S]*?)```/);
1141 |     if(fenceMatch) raw=fenceMatch[1].trim();
1142 | 
1143 |     // Find the outermost { â€¦ } â€” handles leading prose
1144 |     const start=raw.indexOf('{');
1145 |     const end=raw.lastIndexOf('}');
1146 |     if(start===-1||end===-1) throw new Error('No JSON object found in response');
1147 |     raw=raw.slice(start,end+1);
1148 | 
1149 |     // Attempt parse; on failure try to repair truncated JSON
1150 |     let parsed;
1151 |     try{
1152 |       parsed=JSON.parse(raw);
1153 |     }catch(parseErr){
1154 |       // Repair: truncate to last complete section by finding last complete "}]}" pattern
1155 |       const repaired=repairTruncatedJSON(raw);
1156 |       parsed=JSON.parse(repaired);
1157 |     }
1158 | 
1159 |     aiQs=parsed;
1160 |     if(aiQs.sb8txt)document.getElementById('sb8txt').textContent=aiQs.sb8txt;
1161 |     if(aiQs.d6name)document.getElementById('d6name').textContent=aiQs.d6name;
1162 |     if(aiQs.realTimeData)window._rtData=aiQs.realTimeData;
1163 | 
1164 |     if(!Array.isArray(aiQs.sections)||aiQs.sections.length===0) throw new Error('No sections in parsed JSON');
1165 |     aiQs.sections.forEach((sec,i)=>renderSection(i+1,sec));
1166 | 
1167 |   }catch(e){
1168 |     console.warn('AI question gen failed, using fallback:',e.message);
1169 |     useFallbackQuestions(sector,bizType,geo);
1170 |   }
1171 | }
1172 | 
1173 | /* Repair a truncated JSON string by closing any open structures */
1174 | function repairTruncatedJSON(s){
1175 |   // Walk the string tracking depth; truncate at last complete top-level section
1176 |   // Strategy: find the last occurrence of "}]}" or "}]," and close from there
1177 |   let best=s;
1178 |   // Try progressively shorter slices to find parseable JSON
1179 |   for(let i=s.length-1;i>s.length*0.4;i--){
1180 |     const c=s[i];
1181 |     if(c==='}'){
1182 |       try{
1183 |         const candidate=closeJSON(s.slice(0,i+1));
1184 |         JSON.parse(candidate);
1185 |         best=candidate;
1186 |         break;
1187 |       }catch(_){}
1188 |     }
1189 |   }
1190 |   return best;
1191 | }
1192 | 
1193 | function closeJSON(s){
1194 |   // Count open brackets/braces
1195 |   let depth=0; const stack=[];
1196 |   for(const c of s){
1197 |     if(c==='{'){stack.push('}');}
1198 |     else if(c==='['){stack.push(']');}
1199 |     else if(c==='}'||c===']'){stack.pop();}
1200 |   }
1201 |   // Close any trailing comma before we close
1202 |   let result=s.replace(/,\s*$/,'');
1203 |   return result+stack.reverse().join('');
1204 | }
1205 | 
1206 | function renderSection(idx,sec){
1207 |   const el=document.getElementById('q'+idx);
1208 |   if(!el||!sec)return;
1209 |   let html=`<div class="sec-hd"><div class="sec-icon">${sec.icon||'ðŸ“‹'}</div><div><div class="sec-ttl">${sec.title}</div><div class="sec-sub">${sec.subtitle||''}</div></div></div><div class="fg">`;
1210 |   (sec.questions||[]).forEach(q=>{
1211 |     const wide=q.type==='checks'||q.type==='textarea';
1212 |     html+=`<div class="fd ${wide?'s2':''}">`;
1213 |     html+=`<label>${q.label}</label>`;
1214 |     if(q.hint)html+=`<div class="hint">ðŸ’¡ ${q.hint}</div>`;
1215 |     if(q.type==='select'){
1216 |       html+=`<select class="ai-sel" id="${q.id}" data-w="${q.w||2}" onchange="calcLive()"><option value="">Selectâ€¦</option>`;
1217 |       (q.options||[]).forEach(o=>{html+=`<option value="${o.v}">${o.t}</option>`;});
1218 |       html+=`</select>`;
1219 |     }else if(q.type==='pills'){
1220 |       html+=`<div class="pills ai-pills" id="${q.id}_pills">`;
1221 |       (q.options||[]).forEach(o=>{html+=`<span class="pill" data-val="${o.v||3}" onclick="pickAIPill(this)">${o.t}</span>`;});
1222 |       html+=`</div>`;
1223 |     }else if(q.type==='checks'){
1224 |       html+=`<div class="ckg">`;
1225 |       (q.options||[]).forEach(o=>{html+=`<label class="cki"><input type="checkbox" class="ai-chk" onchange="calcLive()"> ${o.t}</label>`;});
1226 |       html+=`</div>`;
1227 |     }else if(q.type==='text'){
1228 |       html+=`<input type="text" class="ai-txt" id="${q.id}" placeholder="${q.placeholder||'Enter valueâ€¦'}" oninput="calcLive()"/>`;
1229 |     }
1230 |     html+=`</div>`;
1231 |   });
1232 |   html+=`</div>`;
1233 |   el.innerHTML=html;
1234 | }

1299 | /* â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•
1300 |    COLLECT FORM DATA
1301 | â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â• */
1302 | function collectData(){
1303 |   const gopt=id=>{const el=document.getElementById(id);return el?.options[el.selectedIndex]?.text||'';};
1304 |   const getv=id=>document.getElementById(id)?.value||'';
1305 |   const answers={};
1306 |   document.querySelectorAll('.ai-sel').forEach(el=>{answers[el.id]=el.options[el.selectedIndex]?.text||'';});
1307 |   document.querySelectorAll('.ai-pills').forEach(grp=>{const on=grp.querySelector('.pill.on');if(on)answers[grp.id]=on.textContent;});
1308 |   document.querySelectorAll('.ai-txt').forEach(el=>{if(el.value)answers[el.id]=el.value;});
1309 |   const chkGroups={};
1310 |   document.querySelectorAll('.ai-chk:checked').forEach(el=>{const g=el.closest('.ckg')?.parentElement?.querySelector('label')?.textContent||'checks';chkGroups[g]=(chkGroups[g]||[]);chkGroups[g].push(el.parentElement.textContent.trim());});
1311 |   Object.assign(answers,chkGroups);
1312 |   return {
1313 |     bizName:getv('bizName')||'Unnamed Business',
1314 |     sector:gopt('sector'),sectorCode:getv('sector'),
1315 |     bizType:gopt('bizType'),bizTypeCode:getv('bizType'),
1316 |     geo:gopt('geo'),geoCode:getv('geo'),
1317 |     problem:getv('problem')||'Not described',
1318 |     stage:document.querySelector('#stagePills .pill.on')?.textContent||'Not specified',
1319 |     answers,
1320 |   };
1321 | }
1322 | 
1323 | /* â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•
1324 |    LOADER
1325 | â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â• */
1326 | function setLoader(n,msg,pct){
1327 |   for(let i=1;i<=5;i++){const el=document.getElementById('ls'+i);if(!el)continue;el.className='ld-step'+(i<n?' done':i===n?' active':'');}
1328 |   document.getElementById('ldStatus').textContent=msg||'';
1329 |   document.getElementById('ldBar').style.width=(pct||0)+'%';
1330 | }
1331 | function showLoader(){document.getElementById('assessShell').style.display='none';document.getElementById('loaderShell').style.display='flex';}
1332 | function hideLoader(){document.getElementById('loaderShell').style.display='none';}
1333 | 
1334 | /* â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•
1335 |    MAIN BUILD
1336 | â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â• */
1337 | async function buildDashboard(){
1338 |   const fd=collectData();
1339 |   showLoader();
1340 |   setLoader(1,'Reading your inputsâ€¦',8);
1341 |   await tick(200);
1342 |   let analysis;
1343 |   try{
1344 |     setLoader(2,`Searching live ${fd.sector} market data in ${fd.geo}â€¦`,25);
1345 |     await tick(150);
1346 |     setLoader(3,'Fetching real-time competitor profiles & funding dataâ€¦',48);
1347 |     analysis=await callAPI(fd);
1348 |     setLoader(4,'Calculating TAM/SAM/SOM, scores & 12-month projectionsâ€¦',75);
1349 |     await tick(300);
1350 |     setLoader(5,'Assembling your market intelligence dashboardâ€¦',95);
1351 |     await tick(400);
1352 |   }catch(e){
1353 |     console.warn('API failed, using fallback:',e.message);
1354 |     setLoader(5,'Running offline analysisâ€¦',95);
1355 |     analysis=offlineAnalysis(fd);
1356 |     await tick(600);
1357 |   }
1358 |   renderDash(fd,analysis);
1359 | }
1360 | const tick=ms=>new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,ms));
1361 |

1466 |   // Exponential backoff helper (shared pattern)
1467 |   const fetchWithRetry=async(url,opts,maxTries=3)=>{
1468 |     for(let attempt=1;attempt<=maxTries;attempt++){
1469 |       const r=await fetch(url,opts);
1470 |       if((r.status===429||r.status===529||r.status>=500)&&attempt<maxTries){
1471 |         await new Promise(res=>setTimeout(res,Math.min(2000*Math.pow(2,attempt-1),16000)));
1472 |         continue;
1473 |       }
1474 |       return r;
1475 |     }
1476 |   };

1492 | 
1493 |   // Find outermost JSON object
1494 |   const s0=raw.indexOf('{'), e0=raw.lastIndexOf('}');
1495 |   if(s0===-1||e0===-1) throw new Error('No JSON in response');
1496 |   raw=raw.slice(s0,e0+1);
1497 | 
1498 |   // Parse with truncation repair fallback
1499 |   let parsed;
1500 |   try{ parsed=JSON.parse(raw); }
1501 |   catch(_){
1502 |     try{ parsed=JSON.parse(repairTruncatedJSON(raw)); }
1503 |     catch(e2){ throw new Error('JSON parse failed: '+e2.message); }
1504 |   }

1518 | function offlineAnalysis(fd){
1519 |   const sc=fd.sectorCode;
1520 |   const gc=fd.geoCode;
1521 |   const isIndia=['T1','T2','PI'].includes(gc);
1522 |   const TAM={IT:2800,HC:1400,FS:3500,EC:8000,ED:650,MF:12000,RE:6000,LG:4500,ME:1200,AG:900,EN:2200,OT:500};
1523 |   const GR={IT:28,HC:22,FS:25,EC:35,ED:30,MF:15,RE:12,LG:14,ME:18,AG:20,EN:32,OT:18};
1524 |   const tamC=(TAM[sc]||500)*(isIndia?0.18:1.0);
1525 |   const gr=GR[sc]||20;
1526 |   const t=+document.getElementById('liveScore').textContent||50;
1527 |   const tgtPct=Math.round(2+t/100*8);
1528 | 
1529 |   // Always use sector default competitors â€” never fall back to empty
1530 |   const defComps={
1531 |     IT:['Zoho','Freshworks','LeadSquared'],
1532 |     HC:['Practo','Mfine','Portea'],
1533 |     FS:['Razorpay','Zerodha','PayU'],
1534 |     EC:['Meesho','Flipkart','Nykaa'],
1535 |     ED:["BYJU'S",'Unacademy','upGrad'],

1539 |     ME:['Zee5','SonyLiv','MXPlayer'],
1540 |     AG:['DeHaat','Ninjacart','Agristack'],
1541 |     EN:['ReNew Power','Greenko','Adani Green'],
1542 |     OT:['Competitor A','Competitor B','Competitor C']
1543 |   };
1544 |   const compList=(defComps[sc]||['Competitor A','Competitor B','Competitor C']).slice(0,3);
1545 | 
1546 |   const rem=100-tgtPct;
1547 |   const spl=[0.35,0.27,0.20,0.12];
1548 | 
1549 |   // Market share â€” always 5 entries: product + 3 competitors + Others
1550 |   const mshare=[
1551 |     {name:fd.bizName, pct:tgtPct, val:'â‚¹'+Math.round(tamC*tgtPct/100)+'Cr'},
1552 |     {name:compList[0], pct:Math.round(rem*spl[0]), val:'â‚¹'+Math.round(tamC*rem*spl[0]/100)+'Cr'},

2037 |           const t=m/11;
2038 |           const base=peakPct*(t*t*(3-2*t));
2039 |           // Add slight natural volatility â€” wins some months, dips others
2040 |           const noise=peakPct*0.06*Math.sin(m*1.3+0.5);
2041 |           return +Math.max(0,base+noise).toFixed(1);
2042 |         });
2043 |       }
2044 |     } else {
2045 |       // Competitors: use Gemini data if valid
2046 |       // Only override if data is missing or completely flat
2047 |       if(!validVals.length||mx===0){
2048 |         const share=a.marketShare?.[i]?.pct||20;
2049 |         const gr=(a.growthRate||20)/100;
2050 |         data=Array.from({length:12},(_,m)=>{
2051 |           const t=m/11;
2052 |           return +(share*(0.9+0.2*t)+Math.sin(m*0.7)*0.3).toFixed(1);
2053 |         });
2054 |       } else if(spread<2){
2055 |         // Data is too flat â€” add meaningful market fluctuation
2056 |         // Simulate real market dynamics: dips in summer, peak in Q4
2057 |         const volatility=Math.max(mx*0.08, 1.5);
2058 |         data=data.map((v,m)=>{
2059 |           const seasonal=Math.sin(m*0.9+1)*volatility*0.6;
2060 |           const trend=mx*(0.92+m*0.007); // slight upward drift
2061 |           return +Math.max(0.1,(trend+seasonal)).toFixed(1);
2062 |         });
2063 |       }
2064 |     }
2065 |     // Fill any NaN or missing months
2066 |     data=data.map((v,m)=>typeof v==='number'&&!isNaN(v)?v:+(data.filter(x=>!isNaN(x))[0]||0));
2067 |     return {...s, data};
2068 |   });

2293 |   function renderMap(world){

2299 |     svgEl.setAttribute('width',W);svgEl.setAttribute('height',H);
2300 |     svgEl.setAttribute('viewBox',`0 0 ${W} ${H}`);

2302 |     const svg=d3.select(svgEl);svg.selectAll('*').remove();

2663 |       const cx=W/2, cy=100, R=72, sw=12;
2664 |       const pct=Math.max(0,Math.min(100,score))/100;
2665 |       const arcColor=score>=70?'#10B981':score>=50?'#F59E0B':'#EF4444';
2666 |       const gradId='g'+Math.random().toString(36).slice(2,6);
2667 |       // Arc endpoints: left=180deg, right=0deg, going clockwise (bottom open)
2668 |       const sx=cx-R, sy=cy;
2669 |       const ex=cx+R, ey=cy;
2670 |       const scX=cx+R*Math.cos(Math.PI*(1-pct));
2671 |       const scY=cy-R*Math.sin(Math.PI*pct);
2672 |       const lg=pct>0.5?1:0;
2673 |       // Grade label
2674 |       const grade=score>=70?'Strong':score>=50?'Moderate':'Needs Work';
2675 |       return `<svg width="${W}" height="118" viewBox="0 0 ${W} 118" style="display:block;overflow:visible;">
2676 |         <defs>
2677 |           <linearGradient id="${gradId}" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="0%">
2678 |             <stop offset="0%" stop-color="${arcColor}" stop-opacity="0.4"/>
2679 |             <stop offset="100%" stop-color="${arcColor}"/>
2680 |           </linearGradient>
2681 |         </defs>
2682 |         <!-- Grey track -->
2683 |         <path d="M${sx},${sy} A${R},${R} 0 0,1 ${ex},${ey}"
2684 |               fill="none" stroke="rgba(255,255,255,0.1)" stroke-width="${sw}" stroke-linecap="round"/>
2685 |         <!-- Coloured score arc -->
2686 |         <path d="M${sx},${sy} A${R},${R} 0 ${lg},1 ${scX},${scY}"
2687 |               fill="none" stroke="url(#${gradId})" stroke-width="${sw}" stroke-linecap="round"/>
2688 |         <!-- 0 and 100 end labels -->
2689 |         <text x="${sx-8}" y="${sy+5}" text-anchor="end" font-size="9" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.3)" font-family="'IBM Plex Mono',monospace">0</text>
2690 |         <text x="${ex+8}" y="${ey+5}" text-anchor="start" font-size="9" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.3)" font-family="'IBM Plex Mono',monospace">100</text>
2691 |         <!-- Centre tick at 50 -->
2692 |         <line x1="${cx}" y1="${cy-R-sw/2-2}" x2="${cx}" y2="${cy-R+sw/2+2}" stroke="rgba(255,255,255,0.2)" stroke-width="1.5"/>
2693 |         <text x="${cx}" y="${cy-R-sw/2-6}" text-anchor="middle" font-size="8" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.2)" font-family="'IBM Plex Mono',monospace">50</text>
2694 |         <!-- Needle -->
2695 |         <line x1="${cx}" y1="${cy}" x2="${scX}" y2="${scY}"
2696 |               stroke="rgba(255,255,255,0.7)" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/>
2697 |         <circle cx="${cx}" cy="${cy}" r="5" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.15)" stroke="rgba(255,255,255,0.4)" stroke-width="1"/>
2698 |         <circle cx="${cx}" cy="${cy}" r="2.5" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.8)"/>
2699 |         <!-- Score -->
2700 |         <text x="${cx}" y="${cy-18}" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'IBM Plex Mono',monospace"
2701 |               font-size="34" font-weight="700" fill="${arcColor}">${score}</text>
2702 |         <text x="${cx}" y="${cy-3}" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif"
2703 |               font-size="8.5" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.35)" letter-spacing=".12em">OUT OF 100</text>
2704 |       </svg>`;
2705 |     }

2707 |     // Funnel â€” proper trapezoid shape + side descriptions
2708 |     function funnelSVG(){
2709 |       const tam = +(a.tamCrore)||100;
2710 |       const sam = +(a.samCrore)||30;
2711 |       const som = +(a.somCrore)||5;
2712 |       const fmtV = v => v >= 1000 ? 'â‚¹' + (v/1000).toFixed(1) + 'K Cr' : 'â‚¹' + Math.round(v) + 'Cr';
2713 | 
2714 |       // Layout â€” funnel on left, labels on right
2715 |       const SVG_W = 480;
2716 |       const FW = 200;   // funnel column width
2717 |       const LX = 224;   // label column starts here
2718 |       const SEG = 64;   // height of each segment
2719 |       const GAP = 4;    // gap between segments
2720 |       const SVG_H = SEG * 3 + GAP * 2 + 12;
2721 | 
2722 |       const steps = [
2723 |         {
2724 |           v: tam, l: 'TAM', pct: 100,
2725 |           c: '#1A56B0',
2726 |           title: 'Total Addressable Market',
2727 |           desc: 'The entire market demand for your product category in the target geography.',
2728 |           tw: FW, bw: Math.round(FW * 0.68)
2729 |         },
2730 |         {
2731 |           v: sam, l: 'SAM', pct: Math.round(sam/tam*100),
2732 |           c: '#0891B2',
2733 |           title: 'Serviceable Available Market',
2734 |           desc: 'The segment you can realistically reach with your current model and channels.',
2735 |           tw: Math.round(FW * 0.68), bw: Math.round(FW * 0.38)
2736 |         },
2737 |         {
2738 |           v: som, l: 'SOM', pct: Math.round(som/tam*100),
2739 |           c: '#059669',
2740 |           title: '3-Year Revenue Target',
2741 |           desc: 'Your realistic capture target â€” typically 2-8% of SAM at early stage.',
2742 |           tw: Math.round(FW * 0.38), bw: Math.round(FW * 0.16)
2743 |         }
2744 |       ];
2745 | 
2746 |       const parts = steps.map((s, i) => {
2747 |         const y = 6 + i * (SEG + GAP);
2748 |         const cx = FW / 2;
2749 |         // Trapezoid: top-left, top-right, bottom-right, bottom-left
2750 |         const tlx = cx - s.tw/2, trx = cx + s.tw/2;
2751 |         const blx = cx - s.bw/2, brx = cx + s.bw/2;
2752 |         const path = `M${tlx},${y} L${trx},${y} L${brx},${y+SEG} L${blx},${y+SEG} Z`;
2753 |         const my = y + SEG/2;
2754 | 
2755 |         // Label block on the right
2756 |         const lmy = my;
2757 |         const labelLines = s.desc.match(/.{1,44}(\s|$)/g) || [s.desc];
2758 | 
2759 |         return `
2760 |           <!-- segment ${i} -->
2761 |           <path d="${path}" fill="${s.c}" opacity="0.85"/>
2762 |           <path d="${path}" fill="none" stroke="rgba(255,255,255,0.3)" stroke-width="1.2"/>
2763 |           <!-- value -->
2764 |           <text x="${cx}" y="${my - 9}" text-anchor="middle"
2765 |                 font-family="'IBM Plex Mono',monospace" font-size="15" font-weight="700" fill="#fff">${fmtV(s.v)}</text>
2766 |           <!-- label + pct -->
2767 |           <text x="${cx}" y="${my + 8}" text-anchor="middle"
2768 |                 font-family="'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif" font-size="9" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.8)">${s.l} &nbsp;Â·&nbsp; ${s.pct}% of TAM</text>
2769 |           <!-- connector dot + line -->
2770 |           <circle cx="${FW + 6}" cy="${lmy}" r="4" fill="${s.c}"/>
2771 |           <line x1="${FW + 10}" y1="${lmy}" x2="${LX - 4}" y2="${lmy}" stroke="${s.c}" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-dasharray="3,2"/>
2772 |           <!-- right label -->
2773 |           <text x="${LX}" y="${lmy - 14}" font-family="'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif"
2774 |                 font-size="10" font-weight="700" fill="${s.c}">${s.title}</text>
2775 |           ${labelLines.slice(0,2).map((ln, li) =>
2776 |             `<text x="${LX}" y="${lmy + li * 12}" font-family="'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif"
2777 |                    font-size="8.5" fill="#6B7280">${ln.trim()}</text>`
2778 |           ).join('')}
2779 |         `;
2780 |       }).join('');
2781 | 
2782 |       // Divider lines between segments
2783 |       const dividers = [1,2].map(i => {
2784 |         const y = 6 + i * (SEG + GAP) - GAP;
2785 |         return `<line x1="2" y1="${y}" x2="${FW-2}" y2="${y}"
2786 |                       stroke="rgba(255,255,255,0.2)" stroke-width="1"/>`;
2787 |       }).join('');
2788 | 
2789 |       return `<svg width="${SVG_W}" height="${SVG_H}"
2790 |                    viewBox="0 0 ${SVG_W} ${SVG_H}"
2791 |                    style="display:block;width:100%;max-width:${SVG_W}px;overflow:visible;">
2792 |         ${parts}
2793 |         ${dividers}
2794 |       </svg>`;
2795 |     }

2797 |     // Donut chart â€” pure SVG
2798 |     function donutSVG(data,W,cx,cy,OR,IR){
2799 |       const tot=data.reduce((s,d)=>s+(+d.v||0),0)||100;
2800 |       let ang=-Math.PI/2;
2801 |       return data.map((d,i)=>{
2802 |         const sw=(+d.v||0)/tot*2*Math.PI;
2803 |         if(sw<0.02){ang+=sw;return '';}
2804 |         const x1=cx+OR*Math.cos(ang),y1=cy+OR*Math.sin(ang);
2805 |         const x2=cx+OR*Math.cos(ang+sw),y2=cy+OR*Math.sin(ang+sw);
2806 |         const x3=cx+IR*Math.cos(ang+sw),y3=cy+IR*Math.sin(ang+sw);
2807 |         const x4=cx+IR*Math.cos(ang),y4=cy+IR*Math.sin(ang);
2808 |         const lg=sw>Math.PI?1:0;
2809 |         const mx=cx+(OR+IR)/2*Math.cos(ang+sw/2),my=cy+(OR+IR)/2*Math.sin(ang+sw/2);
2810 |         const pct=Math.round((+d.v||0)/tot*100);
2811 |         const lbl2=pct>=6?`<text x="${mx}" y="${my+3.5}" text-anchor="middle" font-size="9" font-weight="700" fill="rgba(255,255,255,.95)" font-family="'IBM Plex Mono',monospace">${pct}%</text>`:'';
2812 |         ang+=sw;
2813 |         return `<path d="M${x1},${y1} A${OR},${OR} 0 ${lg},1 ${x2},${y2} L${x3},${y3} A${IR},${IR} 0 ${lg},0 ${x4},${y4} Z" fill="${d.c}" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="1.5"/>${lbl2}`;
2814 |       }).join('');
2815 |     }
2816 | 
2817 |     // Horizontal bar chart for dimensions
2818 |     function dimBarsSVG(){
2819 |       const W=380,H=dimDefs.length*36+16, lw=130;
2820 |       const rows=dimDefs.map((d,i)=>{
2821 |         const v=dim[d.k]||0, y=8+i*36;
2822 |         const bw=Math.max(4,(W-lw-40)*v/100);
2823 |         const statusC=colfn(v);
2824 |         return `<text x="${lw-8}" y="${y+16}" text-anchor="end" font-size="10" font-weight="500" fill="#374151" font-family="'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif">${d.l}</text>
2825 |           <rect x="${lw}" y="${y+6}" width="${W-lw-40}" height="16" rx="3" fill="#F3F4F6"/>
2826 |           <rect x="${lw}" y="${y+6}" width="${bw}" height="16" rx="3" fill="${d.c}" opacity="0.85"/>
2827 |           <text x="${lw+bw+5}" y="${y+17}" font-size="10" font-weight="700" fill="${d.c}" font-family="'IBM Plex Mono',monospace">${v}</text>
2828 |           <text x="${W-2}" y="${y+17}" text-anchor="end" font-size="8" font-weight="600" fill="${statusC}" font-family="'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif">${lblfn(v)}</text>`;
2829 |       }).join('');
2830 |       return `<svg width="${W}" height="${H}" viewBox="0 0 ${W} ${H}" style="max-width:100%;">${rows}</svg>`;
2831 |     }

2894 |     // Risk heatmap â€” improved
2895 |     function riskSVG(){
2896 |       const risks2=a.topRisks||[];
2897 |       const items=[
2898 |         {l:'Competitive Response',p:2,i:3},
2899 |         {l:'Regulatory Risk',p:1,i:3},
2900 |         {l:risks2[0]?risks2[0].slice(0,18):'Execution Risk',p:2,i:2},
2901 |         {l:risks2[1]?risks2[1].slice(0,18):'Market Timing',p:3,i:2},
2902 |         {l:'Tech Disruption',p:1,i:2},
2903 |         {l:'Talent Shortage',p:1,i:1},
2904 |       ];
2905 |       const W=280,H=220,lx=52,ty=28,cw=(W-lx)/3,ch=(H-ty-20)/3;
2906 |       const heatfill=(p,iv)=>{const v=p*iv;return v>=6?'rgba(239,68,68,0.12)':v>=4?'rgba(245,158,11,0.12)':v>=2?'rgba(59,130,246,0.08)':'rgba(16,185,129,0.07)';};
2907 |       const cells=[];
2908 |       for(let row=0;row<3;row++)for(let col2=0;col2<3;col2++){
2909 |         cells.push(`<rect x="${lx+col2*cw}" y="${ty+row*ch}" width="${cw}" height="${ch}" fill="${heatfill(3-row,col2+1)}" rx="2"/>
2910 |           <rect x="${lx+col2*cw}" y="${ty+row*ch}" width="${cw}" height="${ch}" fill="none" stroke="#E5E7EB" stroke-width="0.8"/>`);
2911 |       }
2912 |       const dots=items.map((it)=>{
2913 |         const dcx=lx+(it.i-1)*cw+cw/2, dcy=ty+(3-it.p)*ch+ch/2;
2914 |         const dc=it.p*it.i>=6?'#EF4444':it.p*it.i>=4?'#F59E0B':'#3B82F6';
2915 |         return `<circle cx="${dcx}" cy="${dcy}" r="12" fill="${dc}" opacity="0.12"/>
2916 |           <circle cx="${dcx}" cy="${dcy}" r="4.5" fill="${dc}"/>
2917 |           <text x="${dcx}" y="${dcy-16}" text-anchor="middle" font-size="7" fill="#4B5563" font-family="'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif">${it.l.slice(0,14)}</text>`;
2918 |       }).join('');
2919 |       const axY=['High','Med','Low'].map((l,i)=>`<text x="${lx-5}" y="${ty+i*ch+ch/2+4}" text-anchor="end" font-size="8" fill="#6B7280" font-family="'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif">${l}</text>`).join('');
2920 |       const axX=['Low','Medium','High'].map((l,i)=>`<text x="${lx+i*cw+cw/2}" y="${H-4}" text-anchor="middle" font-size="8" fill="#6B7280" font-family="'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif">${l}</text>`).join('');
2921 |       return `<svg width="${W}" height="${H}" viewBox="0 0 ${W} ${H}" style="overflow:visible;max-width:100%;">
2922 |         ${cells.join('')}${dots}${axY}${axX}
2923 |         <text x="${lx-28}" y="${ty+1.5*ch}" text-anchor="middle" font-size="8" fill="#9CA3AF" transform="rotate(-90,${lx-28},${ty+1.5*ch})" font-family="'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif">PROBABILITY</text>
2924 |         <text x="${lx+1.5*cw}" y="${H+2}" text-anchor="middle" font-size="8" fill="#9CA3AF" font-family="'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif">IMPACT</text>
2925 |       </svg>`;
2926 |     }

FILE: README.md
------------------------------------------------------------
   1 | # Infopace â€” React + Supabase Edition
   2 | 
   3 | > AI-powered market intelligence assessment platform.
   4 | > Built with React + Vite + Tailwind CSS + Gemini AI + Supabase.
   5 | 
   6 | ---
   7 | 
   8 | ## What This App Does
   9 | 
  10 | 1. **Onboarding Form** â€” Collects user details (name, email, phone, organization, role, website, LinkedIn, team size, sector, geography, problem statement, stage)
  11 | 2. **AI Assessment** â€” Generates 8 tailored question groups using Gemini AI, with a live market score panel updating as you answer
  12 | 3. **Results Dashboard** â€” Full market intelligence dashboard with:
  13 |    - Score donut + dimension bars + capability radar
  14 |    - Revenue projection chart (conservative / base / optimistic)
  15 |    - TAM / SAM / SOM estimates
  16 |    - Competitor analysis
  17 |    - Key AI-generated insights
  18 |    - 90-day action plan
  19 |    - Full printable report view
  20 |    - Raw JSON data view
  21 | 4. **Supabase Storage** â€” Every submission (user details + all answers + full analysis) is saved to your Supabase database
  22 | 
  23 | ---
  24 | 
  25 | ## Prerequisites
  26 | 
  27 | - Node.js 18+
  28 | - A free [Gemini API key](https://aistudio.google.com) (already in `server.js`)
  29 | - A free [Supabase](https://supabase.com) project
  30 | 
  31 | ---
  32 | 
  33 | ## Quick Start
  34 | 
  35 | ### Step 1 â€” Set up Supabase
  36 | 
  37 | 1. Create a free project at [supabase.com](https://supabase.com)
  38 | 2. Go to **SQL Editor** and paste + run the contents of `supabase_setup.sql`
  39 | 3. Go to **Settings â†’ API** and copy:
  40 |    - **Project URL** (looks like `https://xxxx.supabase.co`)
  41 |    - **anon / public key** (long JWT string)
  42 | 
  43 | ### Step 2 â€” Configure environment
  44 | 
  45 | ```bash
  46 | cp .env.example .env
  47 | ```
  48 | 
  49 | Edit `.env` and fill in your values:
  50 | 
  51 | ```env
  52 | VITE_SUPABASE_URL=https://YOUR_PROJECT_ID.supabase.co
  53 | VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY=YOUR_ANON_PUBLIC_KEY
  54 | ```
  55 | 
  56 | ### Step 3 â€” Install dependencies
  57 | 
  58 | ```bash
  59 | npm install
  60 | ```
  61 | 
  62 | ### Step 4 â€” Run the app (two terminals)
  63 | 
  64 | **Terminal 1** â€” Start the Gemini proxy server (port 4000):
  65 | ```bash
  66 | node server.js
  67 | ```
  68 | 
  69 | **Terminal 2** â€” Start the React dev server (port 3000):
  70 | ```bash
  71 | npm run dev
  72 | ```
  73 | 
  74 | Open **http://localhost:3000**
  75 | 
  76 | The Vite dev server automatically proxies `/api` requests to `server.js` on port 4000.
  77 | 
  78 | ---
  79 | 
  80 | ## Project Structure
  81 | 
  82 | ```
  83 | infopace-react/
  84 | â”œâ”€â”€ server.js                    â† Gemini AI proxy (Node.js, port 4000)
  85 | â”œâ”€â”€ supabase_setup.sql           â† Run once in Supabase SQL Editor
  86 | â”œâ”€â”€ .env.example                 â† Copy to .env and fill in keys
  87 | â”‚
  88 | â”œâ”€â”€ index.html                   â† Vite entry HTML
  89 | â”œâ”€â”€ vite.config.js               â† Dev server + /api proxy config
  90 | â”œâ”€â”€ tailwind.config.js
  91 | â”œâ”€â”€ postcss.config.js
  92 | â”œâ”€â”€ package.json
  93 | â”‚
  94 | â””â”€â”€ src/
  95 |     â”œâ”€â”€ main.jsx                 â† React entry point
  96 |     â”œâ”€â”€ App.jsx                  â† Screen router (onboarding â†’ assessment â†’ results)
  97 |     â”œâ”€â”€ index.css                â† Tailwind + IBM Plex fonts
  98 |     â”‚
  99 |     â”œâ”€â”€ pages/
 100 |     â”‚   â”œâ”€â”€ OnboardingForm.jsx   â† Step 1: User & venture details
 101 |     â”‚   â”œâ”€â”€ AssessmentShell.jsx  â† Step 2: AI questions + live scoring
 102 |     â”‚   â””â”€â”€ ResultsDashboard.jsx â† Step 3: Full dashboard + report
 103 |     â”‚
 104 |     â””â”€â”€ lib/
 105 |         â”œâ”€â”€ supabase.js          â† Supabase client init
 106 |         â”œâ”€â”€ gemini.js            â† Gemini API helpers (questions + analysis)
 107 |         â””â”€â”€ db.js                â† Save / load submissions
 108 | ```
 109 | 
 110 | ---
 111 | 
 112 | ## Data Saved to Supabase
 113 | 
 114 | Every completed assessment saves one row to the `submissions` table:
 115 | 
 116 | | Column | Type | Description |
 117 | |---|---|---|
 118 | | `id` | uuid | Auto-generated primary key |
 119 | | `name` | text | Full name |
 120 | | `email` | text | Email address |
 121 | | `phone` | text | Phone number |
 122 | | `organization` | text | Company name |
 123 | | `role` | text | Job role |
 124 | | `website` | text | Website URL |
 125 | | `linkedin` | text | LinkedIn URL |
 126 | | `team_size` | text | Team size bracket |
 127 | | `sector` | text | e.g. "HealthTech", "B2B SaaS" |
 128 | | `geography` | text | e.g. "PI" (Pan India), "GL" (Global) |
 129 | | `problem` | text | Problem statement |
 130 | | `stage` | text | Business stage (1â€“5) |
 131 | | `answers` | jsonb | All question answers keyed by question ID |
 132 | | `overall_score` | integer | Final market score (0â€“100) |
 133 | | `grade` | text | e.g. "A", "B+", "C" |
 134 | | `dimensions` | jsonb | Six dimension scores |
 135 | | `analysis_json` | jsonb | Complete AI analysis (TAM/SAM/SOM, competitors, insights, action plan, projections) |
 136 | | `created_at` | timestamptz | Submission timestamp |
 137 | 
 138 | ---
 139 | 
 140 | ## Production Deployment
 141 | 
 142 | ### Build the React app
 143 | 
 144 | ```bash
 145 | npm run build
 146 | ```
 147 | 
 148 | This creates a `dist/` folder.
 149 | 
 150 | ### Serve with server.js
 151 | 
 152 | Update `server.js` to serve the `dist/` folder as static files. Replace the static file section at the bottom of `server.js` with:
 153 | 
 154 | ```javascript
 155 | // Serve React build
 156 | let fp = req.url === '/' ? '/index.html' : req.url.split('?')[0];
 157 | 
 158 | // For React Router â€” serve index.html for unknown routes
 159 | const fullPath = path.join(process.cwd(), 'dist', fp);
 160 | fs.readFile(fullPath, (err, data) => {
 161 |   if (err) {
 162 |     // Fallback to index.html for client-side routing
 163 |     fs.readFile(path.join(process.cwd(), 'dist', 'index.html'), (e2, d2) => {
 164 |       if (e2) { res.writeHead(404); res.end('Not found'); return; }
 165 |       res.writeHead(200, { 'Content-Type': 'text/html' });
 166 |       res.end(d2);
 167 |     });
 168 |     return;
 169 |   }
 170 |   res.writeHead(200, { 'Content-Type': MIME[path.extname(fullPath)] || 'text/plain' });
 171 |   res.end(data);
 172 | });
 173 | ```
 174 | 
 175 | Then run just `node server.js` â€” it serves both the API and the React app on port 4000.
 176 | 
 177 | ### Deploy options
 178 | 
 179 | - **Railway / Render / Fly.io** â€” push repo, set env vars, run `node server.js`
 180 | - **Vercel** â€” deploy React app, add serverless function wrapping Gemini calls
 181 | - **VPS** â€” clone repo, `npm run build`, run with `pm2 start server.js`
 182 | 
 183 | ---
 184 | 
 185 | ## Customisation
 186 | 
 187 | ### Change sectors / geographies
 188 | Edit the `SECTORS` and `GEO` arrays at the top of `src/pages/OnboardingForm.jsx`.
 189 | 
 190 | ### Change AI models
 191 | Edit `MODEL_FAST` and `MODEL_SMART` constants in `server.js`.
 192 | 
 193 | ### Change question count
 194 | Edit the prompt in `src/lib/gemini.js` â†’ `generateQuestions()`.
 195 | 
 196 | ### Add email notifications
 197 | After `saveSubmission()` in `AssessmentShell.jsx`, call a Supabase Edge Function or a service like Resend/SendGrid.
 198 | 
 199 | ---
 200 | 
 201 | ## Troubleshooting
 202 | 
 203 | | Problem | Fix |
 204 | |---|---|
 205 | | `/api` returns 500 | Check Gemini API key on line 8 of `server.js` |
 206 | | Supabase save fails | Verify `.env` values and that `supabase_setup.sql` was run |
 207 | | Questions don't load | Gemini API key may be rate-limited; fallback questions will show |
 208 | | Blank dashboard | Open browser console â€” look for JSON parse errors in analysis response |
 209 | 
 210 | ---
 211 |

 213 |

   1 | // ================================================================
   2 | //  Infopace Proxy Server â€” Gemini Edition (FREE)
   3 | //  1. Paste your Gemini API key on line 8
   4 | //     Get free key at: https://aistudio.google.com â†’ Get API Key
   5 | //  2. Run:  node server.js
   6 | //  3. Open: http://localhost:4000
   7 | // ================================================================
   8 | 
   9 | const API_KEY = 'AIzaSyAAYHBlfh9Jh42dyjKHlQfU3dzqvUOOhHc'; // â† paste your Gemini key here
  10 | 
  11 | // â”€â”€ Models â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
  12 | // Flash = fast + free (question generation)
  13 | // Pro   = smart + free (dashboard analysis)
  14 | const MODEL_FAST = 'gemini-2.5-flash';
  15 | const MODEL_SMART = 'gemini-2.5-flash';  // both use flash on free tier
  16 | 
  17 | // â”€â”€ No edits needed below â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
  18 | const http  = require('http');
  19 | const https = require('https');
  20 | const fs    = require('fs');
  21 | const path  = require('path');
  22 | const PORT  = 4000;
  23 | 
  24 | const MIME = {
  25 |   '.html':'text/html', '.js':'application/javascript',
  26 |   '.css':'text/css',   '.json':'application/json',
  27 |   '.png':'image/png',  '.ico':'image/x-icon', '.txt':'text/plain'
  28 | };
  29 | 
  30 | function geminiRequest(model, promptText, callback) {
  31 |   const payload = JSON.stringify({
  32 |     contents: [{ parts: [{ text: promptText }] }],
  33 |     generationConfig: {
  34 |       temperature: 0.7,
  35 |       maxOutputTokens: 8192,
  36 |       responseMimeType: 'text/plain'
  37 |     }
  38 |   });
  39 | 
  40 |   const options = {
  41 |     hostname: 'generativelanguage.googleapis.com',
  42 |     path: `/v1beta/models/${model}:generateContent?key=${API_KEY}`,
  43 |     method: 'POST',
  44 |     headers: {
  45 |       'Content-Type': 'application/json',
  46 |       'Content-Length': Buffer.byteLength(payload)
  47 |     }
  48 |   };
  49 | 
  50 |   const req = https.request(options, res => {
  51 |     let body = '';
  52 |     res.on('data', c => body += c);
  53 |     res.on('end', () => callback(null, res.statusCode, body));
  54 |   });
  55 |   req.on('error', e => callback(e, null, null));
  56 |   req.write(payload);
  57 |   req.end();
  58 | }
  59 | 
  60 | http.createServer((req, res) => {
  61 |   res.setHeader('Access-Control-Allow-Origin', '*');
  62 |   res.setHeader('Access-Control-Allow-Methods', 'GET, POST, OPTIONS');
  63 |   res.setHeader('Access-Control-Allow-Headers', 'Content-Type');
  64 |   if (req.method === 'OPTIONS') { res.writeHead(204); res.end(); return; }
  65 | 
  66 |   // â”€â”€ /api â†’ Gemini proxy â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
  67 |   if (req.url === '/api' && req.method === 'POST') {
  68 |     if (!API_KEY || API_KEY === 'YOUR_GEMINI_KEY_HERE') {
  69 |       res.writeHead(500, {'Content-Type':'application/json'});
  70 |       res.end(JSON.stringify({error:'Gemini API key not set. Edit line 8 of server.js'}));
  71 |       return;
  72 |     }
  73 | 
  74 |     let body = '';
  75 |     req.on('data', c => body += c);
  76 |     req.on('end', () => {
  77 |       let payload;
  78 |       try { payload = JSON.parse(body); }
  79 |       catch(e) { res.writeHead(400); res.end('bad json'); return; }
  80 | 
  81 |       const type   = payload._type || 'analysis';
  82 |       const prompt = payload.prompt || '';
  83 |       const model  = type === 'questions' ? MODEL_FAST : MODEL_SMART;
  84 | 
  85 |       console.log('  â†’  ' + type + ' (' + model + ')');
  86 | 
  87 |       geminiRequest(model, prompt, (err, status, respBody) => {
  88 |         if (err) {
  89 |           console.log('  âŒ Network error:', err.message);
  90 |           res.writeHead(502, {'Content-Type':'application/json'});
  91 |           res.end(JSON.stringify({error: err.message}));
  92 |           return;
  93 |         }
  94 | 
  95 |         const icon = status < 300 ? 'âœ…' : 'âŒ';
  96 |         console.log('  ' + icon + '  ' + status + '  ' + type);
  97 | 
  98 |         if (status !== 200) {
  99 |           try {
 100 |             const e = JSON.parse(respBody);
 101 |             console.log('      Error:', e.error?.message || respBody.slice(0,120));
 102 |           } catch(_) { console.log('      Raw:', respBody.slice(0,120)); }
 103 |         }
 104 | 
 105 |         // Convert Gemini response â†’ Anthropic-style response
 106 |         // so the HTML parsing code works without changes
 107 |         let anthropicStyle;
 108 |         try {
 109 |           const geminiData = JSON.parse(respBody);
 110 |           const text = (geminiData?.candidates?.[0]?.content?.parts||[])
 111 |             .map(p => p.text||'').join('');
 112 |           // Wrap in Anthropic content format
 113 |           anthropicStyle = JSON.stringify({
 114 |             candidates: geminiData.candidates,
 115 |             content: [{ type: 'text', text: text }]
 116 |           });
 117 |         } catch(_) {
 118 |           anthropicStyle = respBody;
 119 |         }
 120 | 
 121 |         res.writeHead(status, {
 122 |           'Content-Type': 'application/json',
 123 |           'Access-Control-Allow-Origin': '*'
 124 |         });
 125 |         res.end(anthropicStyle);
 126 |       });
 127 |     });
 128 |     return;
 129 |   }
 130 | 
 131 |   // â”€â”€ Static files â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
 132 |   let fp = req.url === '/' ? '/index.html' : req.url.split('?')[0];
 133 |   fp = path.join(process.cwd(), fp);
 134 |   fs.readFile(fp, (err, data) => {
 135 |     if (err) { res.writeHead(404); res.end('Not found'); return; }
 136 |     res.writeHead(200, {'Content-Type': MIME[path.extname(fp)] || 'text/plain'});
 137 |     res.end(data);
 138 |   });
 139 | 
 140 | }).listen(PORT, () => {
 141 |   const ok = API_KEY && API_KEY !== 'YOUR_GEMINI_KEY_HERE';
 142 |   console.log('');
 143 |   console.log('  Infopace â€” Gemini Edition (Free)');
 144 |   console.log('  â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€');
 145 |   console.log('  ðŸŒ  http://localhost:' + PORT);
 146 |   console.log('  ðŸ”‘  Gemini key: ' + (ok ? 'âœ… Set (' + API_KEY.slice(0,16) + '...)' : 'âŒ NOT SET â€” edit line 8'));
 147 |   console.log('  ðŸ¤–  Model: ' + MODEL_SMART);
 148 |   console.log('  â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€');
 149 |   if (!ok) {
 150 |     console.log('');
 151 |     console.log('  Get a free key at https://aistudio.google.com');
 152 |     console.log('  Then paste it on line 8 of server.js');
 153 |   }
 154 |   console.log('');
 155 | });

FILE: src\App.jsx
------------------------------------------------------------
   1 | import { useState } from "react";
   2 | import OnboardingForm from "./pages/OnboardingForm";
   3 | import AssessmentAndDashboard from "./pages/AssessmentAndDashboard";
   4 | 
   5 | export default function App() {
   6 |   const [screen, setScreen] = useState("onboarding");
   7 |   const [userData, setUserData] = useState(null);
   8 | 
   9 |   return (
  10 |     <div>
  11 |       {screen === "onboarding" && (
  12 |         <OnboardingForm
  13 |           onComplete={(data) => {
  14 |             setUserData(data);
  15 |             setScreen("assessment");
  16 |           }}
  17 |         />
  18 |       )}
  19 |       {screen === "assessment" && (
  20 |         <AssessmentAndDashboard
  21 |           userData={userData}
  22 |           onRestart={() => {
  23 |             setScreen("onboarding");
  24 |             setUserData(null);
  25 |           }}
  26 |         />
  27 |       )}
  28 |     </div>
  29 |   );
  30 | }

   1 | import { supabase } from "./supabase";
   2 | 
   3 | export async function saveSubmission({ userData, answers, result }) {
   4 |   const { data, error } = await supabase
   5 |     .from("submissions")
   6 |     .insert([
   7 |       {
   8 |         name: userData.name,
   9 |         email: userData.email,
  10 |         phone: userData.phone,
  11 |         organization: userData.organization,
  12 |         role: userData.role,
  13 |         website: userData.website || null,
  14 |         linkedin: userData.linkedin || null,
  15 |         team_size: userData.teamSize || null,
  16 |         sector: userData.sector,
  17 |         geography: userData.geography,
  18 |         problem: userData.problem,
  19 |         stage: userData.stage,
  20 |         answers: answers,
  21 |         overall_score: result.overallScore,
  22 |         grade: result.grade,
  23 |         dimensions: result.dimensions,
  24 |         analysis_json: result,
  25 |         created_at: new Date().toISOString(),
  26 |       },
  27 |     ])
  28 |     .select()
  29 |     .single();
  30 | 
  31 |   if (error) {
  32 |     console.error("Supabase save error:", error);
  33 |     throw error;
  34 |   }
  35 |   return data;
  36 | }
  37 | 
  38 | export async function getAllSubmissions() {
  39 |   const { data, error } = await supabase
  40 |     .from("submissions")
  41 |     .select("*")
  42 |     .order("created_at", { ascending: false });
  43 |   if (error) throw error;
  44 |   return data;
  45 | }
  46 |

FILE: src\lib\gemini.js

   1 | // Gemini API helper â€” calls the proxy server (server.js) at /api
   2 | export async function geminiCall(prompt, type = "analysis") {
   3 |   const res = await fetch("/api", {
   4 |     method: "POST",
   5 |     headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
   6 |     body: JSON.stringify({ prompt, _type: type }),
   7 |   });
   8 |   if (!res.ok) throw new Error(`API error: ${res.status}`);
   9 |   const data = await res.json();
  10 |   // Extract text from Anthropic-style wrapper (server.js converts it)
  11 |   return data?.content?.[0]?.text || "";
  12 | }
  13 | 
  14 | export async function generateQuestions(sector, geography, problem) {
  15 |   const prompt = `You are an expert market intelligence analyst. Generate exactly 8 groups of 3â€“4 assessment questions for a ${sector} startup targeting ${geography}. 
  16 | Problem they solve: "${problem}"
  17 | 
  18 | Each group covers one of: Market Size, Audience Quality, Competition Edge, Revenue Potential, Risk Profile, Sector Fit, Growth Levers, Strategic Differentiation.
  19 | 
  20 | Return ONLY valid JSON in this exact format:
  21 | {
  22 |   "groups": [
  23 |     {
  24 |       "title": "Market Size",
  25 |       "icon": "ðŸ“Š",
  26 |       "questions": [
  27 |         { "id": "q1_1", "text": "...", "type": "scale", "min": 1, "max": 10 },
  28 |         { "id": "q1_2", "text": "...", "type": "choice", "options": ["Option A","Option B","Option C"] },
  29 |         { "id": "q1_3", "text": "...", "type": "text" }
  30 |       ]
  31 |     }
  32 |   ]
  33 | }
  34 | Types: "scale" (1-10), "choice" (multiple choice), "text" (free text), "multiselect" (array of options).`;
  35 |   return JSON.parse(await geminiCall(prompt, "questions"));
  36 | }
  37 | 
  38 | export async function generateAnalysis(userData, answers) {
  39 |   const GEO_LABELS = {
  40 |     PI: "Pan India", SA: "South Asia (SAARC)", SE: "Southeast Asia",
  41 |     MEA: "Middle East & Africa", EU: "Europe", NA: "North America", GL: "Global",
  42 |   };
  43 |   const geo = GEO_LABELS[userData.geography] || userData.geography;
  44 |   const sector = userData.sector;
  45 |   const biz = userData.organization || "Your Venture";
  46 | 
  47 |   const answersText = Object.entries(answers)
  48 |     .filter(([, v]) => v && v !== "")
  49 |     .map(([k, v]) => `  - ${k}: ${Array.isArray(v) ? v.join(", ") : v}`)
  50 |     .join("\n") || "(no answers provided)";
  51 | 
  52 |   const prompt = `You are a senior market intelligence analyst with deep knowledge of Indian and global markets.
  53 | 
  54 | Analyse this product and produce a data-driven market assessment.
  55 | 
  56 | PRODUCT: ${biz}
  57 | SECTOR: ${sector}
  58 | BUSINESS TYPE: ${userData.role}
  59 | TARGET GEOGRAPHY: ${geo}
  60 | BUSINESS STAGE: Stage ${userData.stage}
  61 | PROBLEM BEING SOLVED: ${userData.problem}
  62 | WHAT THE FOUNDER TOLD US:
  63 | ${answersText}
  64 | 
  65 | Return ONLY raw JSON, no markdown fences, no explanation before or after:
  66 | {
  67 | "overallScore": <0-100>,
  68 | "grade": "Excellent" or "Strong" or "Moderate" or "Needs Work" or "Critical",
  69 | "verdict": "<One specific sentence naming ${biz}, its key opportunity in ${geo}, and its biggest risk>",
  70 | "realTimeInsight": "<One real market fact about ${sector} in ${geo} with actual numbers>",
  71 | "dimensions": {"marketSize":<0-100>,"audienceQuality":<0-100>,"competitionEdge":<0-100>,"revenuePotential":<0-100>,"riskProfile":<0-100>,"sectorFit":<0-100>},
  72 | "tamCrore": <TAM in Crore INR>,
  73 | "samCrore": <SAM in Crore INR>,
  74 | "somCrore": <3-year target in Crore INR>,
  75 | "growthRate": <CAGR % integer>,
  76 | "competitorProfiles": [
  77 |   {"name":"<REAL company>","stage":"<funding/size>","strength":"<strength>","weakness":"<gap>","marketSharePct":<number>},
  78 |   {"name":"<REAL company>","stage":"<funding/size>","strength":"<strength>","weakness":"<gap>","marketSharePct":<number>},
  79 |   {"name":"<REAL company>","stage":"<funding/size>","strength":"<strength>","weakness":"<gap>","marketSharePct":<number>}
  80 | ],
  81 | "marketShare": [
  82 |   {"name":"${biz}","pct":<1-10>,"val":"Rs<som>Cr"},
  83 |   {"name":"<comp1>","pct":<number>,"val":"Rs<amount>Cr"},
  84 |   {"name":"<comp2>","pct":<number>,"val":"Rs<amount>Cr"},
  85 |   {"name":"<comp3>","pct":<number>,"val":"Rs<amount>Cr"},
  86 |   {"name":"Others","pct":<remainder>,"val":"â€”"}
  87 | ],
  88 | "revenueByRegion": {
  89 |   "labels": [<5-6 real cities/regions for ${geo}>],
  90 |   "currentMarket": [<Crore market size per city, 5-6 numbers>],
  91 |   "projected2027": [<projected values, 5-6 numbers>],
  92 |   "ourTarget": [<target values 2-8% of each, 5-6 numbers>]
  93 | },
  94 | "competitorRadar": [
  95 |   {"name":"${biz}","scores":{"pricingPower":<0-100>,"distribution":<0-100>,"brandValue":<0-100>,"innovation":<0-100>,"marketReach":<0-100>,"customerSat":<0-100>},"avg":"<avg>"},
  96 |   {"name":"<comp1>","scores":{"pricingPower":<n>,"distribution":<n>,"brandValue":<n>,"innovation":<n>,"marketReach":<n>,"customerSat":<n>},"avg":"<avg>"},
  97 |   {"name":"<comp2>","scores":{"pricingPower":<n>,"distribution":<n>,"brandValue":<n>,"innovation":<n>,"marketReach":<n>,"customerSat":<n>},"avg":"<avg>"},
  98 |   {"name":"<comp3>","scores":{"pricingPower":<n>,"distribution":<n>,"brandValue":<n>,"innovation":<n>,"marketReach":<n>,"customerSat":<n>},"avg":"<avg>"}
  99 | ],
 100 | "trendData": {
 101 |   "months": ["Apr","May","Jun","Jul","Aug","Sep","Oct","Nov","Dec","Jan","Feb","Mar"],
 102 |   "series": [
 103 |     {"label":"${biz}","dash":[],"data":[<12 monthly share % values, start near 0 grow to 3-8>]},
 104 |     {"label":"<comp1>","dash":[],"data":[<12 monthly values ~20-35%>]},
 105 |     {"label":"<comp2>","dash":[],"data":[<12 monthly values ~15-25%>]},
 106 |     {"label":"<comp3>","dash":[],"data":[<12 monthly values ~10-20%>]}
 107 |   ]
 108 | },
 109 | "geoRegions": {
 110 |   "Asia Pacific": {"rev":"<sector size>","pct":"<% of global>","ids":[4,50,156,356,360,392,410,458,702,704,764]},
 111 |   "North America": {"rev":"<sector size>","pct":"<% of global>","ids":[124,484,840]},
 112 |   "South America": {"rev":"<sector size>","pct":"<% of global>","ids":[32,68,76,152,170]},
 113 |   "Europe": {"rev":"<sector size>","pct":"<% of global>","ids":[276,250,826,380,724,528,208,752]},
 114 |   "Africa": {"rev":"<sector size>","pct":"<% of global>","ids":[566,710,404,818,12]}
 115 | },
 116 | "keyInsights": ["<insight 1>","<insight 2>","<insight 3>","<insight 4>","<insight 5>"],
 117 | "topRisks": ["<risk 1>","<risk 2>","<risk 3>"],
 118 | "quickWins": ["<30-day win 1>","<win 2>","<win 3>"],
 119 | "popups": {
 120 |   "mktshare": "<2 sentences on TAM/SAM/SOM and competitor context>",
 121 |   "revregion": "<2 sentences on which cities are priority and why>",
 122 |   "radar": "<2 sentences on where ${biz} leads and trails>",
 123 |   "trend": "<2 sentences on trajectory and inflection point>",
 124 |   "geomap": "<2 sentences on geographic focus rationale>"
 125 | }
 126 | }`;
 127 | 
 128 |   const text = await geminiCall(prompt, "analysis");
 129 |   let raw = text.trim();
 130 |   const fm = raw.match(/```(?:json)?\s*([\s\S]*?)```/);
 131 |   if (fm) raw = fm[1].trim();
 132 |   const s0 = raw.indexOf("{"), e0 = raw.lastIndexOf("}");
 133 |   if (s0 === -1 || e0 === -1) throw new Error("No JSON in response");
 134 |   raw = raw.slice(s0, e0 + 1);
 135 |   try { return JSON.parse(raw); }
 136 |   catch (_) {
 137 |     // best-effort repair for truncated responses
 138 |     let s = raw.replace(/,\s*$/, "");
 139 |     const opens = [];
 140 |     for (const ch of s) {
 141 |       if (ch === "{" || ch === "[") opens.push(ch === "{" ? "}" : "]");
 142 |       else if (ch === "}" || ch === "]") opens.pop();
 143 |     }
 144 |     return JSON.parse(s + opens.reverse().join(""));
 145 |   }
 146 | }

FILE: src\pages\AssessmentAndDashboard.jsx
------------------------------------------------------------
   1 | import { useEffect, useRef, useState } from "react";
   2 | import { generateAnalysis } from "../lib/gemini";
   3 | import { saveSubmission } from "../lib/db";
   4 | 
   5 | // Maps React onboarding userData â†’ the field codes dashboard.html expects
   6 | function buildPrefill(userData) {
   7 |   const SECTOR_MAP = {
   8 |     "HealthTech": "HC", "EdTech": "ED", "FinTech": "FS",
   9 |     "AgriTech": "AG", "CleanTech": "EN", "B2B SaaS": "IT",
  10 |     "D2C / Consumer": "EC", "Logistics / Supply Chain": "LG",
  11 |     "HR Tech": "IT", "LegalTech": "OT", "PropTech": "RE",
  12 |     "Manufacturing / DeepTech": "MF", "Media / Content": "ME",
  13 |     "RetailTech": "EC", "GovTech": "OT", "Other": "OT",
  14 |   };
  15 |   const ROLE_BIZ_TYPE_MAP = {
  16 |     "Founder / Co-Founder": "B2B_SME", "CEO / MD": "B2B_ENT",
  17 |     "CTO / CPO": "B2B_SME", "CMO / VP Marketing": "B2C_MASS",
  18 |     "Business Development": "B2B_SME", "Product Manager": "B2B_SME",
  19 |     "Investor / VC": "B2B_ENT", "Consultant / Advisor": "B2B_SME", "Other": "B2B_SME",
  20 |   };
  21 |   const GEO_MAP = {
  22 |     PI: "PI", SA: "SA", SE: "SE", MEA: "MEA", EU: "EU", NA: "NA", GL: "GL",
  23 |   };
  24 | 
  25 |   return {
  26 |     organization: userData.organization,
  27 |     sectorCode: SECTOR_MAP[userData.sector] || "OT",
  28 |     bizTypeCode: ROLE_BIZ_TYPE_MAP[userData.role] || "B2B_SME",
  29 |     geoCode: GEO_MAP[userData.geography] || "PI",
  30 |     problem: userData.problem,
  31 |     stage: userData.stage,
  32 |   };
  33 | }
  34 | 
  35 | const LOADER_STEPS = [
  36 |   { n: 1, msg: "Reading your inputsâ€¦", pct: 8 },
  37 |   { n: 2, msg: "Searching live market data & sector sizingâ€¦", pct: 25 },
  38 |   { n: 3, msg: "Fetching real-time competitor profiles & funding dataâ€¦", pct: 48 },
  39 |   { n: 4, msg: "Calculating TAM/SAM/SOM, scores & 12-month projectionsâ€¦", pct: 75 },
  40 |   { n: 5, msg: "Assembling your market intelligence dashboardâ€¦", pct: 95 },
  41 | ];
  42 | 
  43 | export default function AssessmentAndDashboard({ userData, onRestart }) {
  44 |   const iframeRef = useRef(null);
  45 |   const prefillSentRef = useRef(false);
  46 | 
  47 |   function postToIframe(msg) {
  48 |     iframeRef.current?.contentWindow?.postMessage(msg, "*");
  49 |   }
  50 | 
  51 |   async function handleSubmit(fd) {
  52 |     // Drive the loader steps in the iframe
  53 |     for (const s of LOADER_STEPS) {
  54 |       postToIframe({ type: "INFOPACE_LOADER_STEP", step: s.n, msg: s.msg, pct: s.pct });
  55 |       await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, s.n === 3 ? 150 : 300));
  56 |     }
  57 | 
  58 |     try {
  59 |       const result = await generateAnalysis(userData, fd.answers || {});
  60 | 
  61 |       // Save to Supabase (non-blocking)
  62 |       saveSubmission({ userData, answers: fd.answers || {}, result })
  63 |         .catch(e => console.warn("DB save failed:", e.message));
  64 | 
  65 |       // Send result to iframe to render the dashboard
  66 |       postToIframe({ type: "INFOPACE_RENDER", fd, analysis: result });
  67 | 
  68 |     } catch (err) {
  69 |       console.error("Analysis failed:", err);
  70 |       // Let iframe show error via its own fallback
  71 |       postToIframe({ type: "INFOPACE_LOADER_STEP", step: 5, msg: "Running offline analysisâ€¦", pct: 95 });
  72 |       setTimeout(() => {
  73 |         // Trigger iframe's own offline fallback by sending empty analysis
  74 |         postToIframe({ type: "INFOPACE_RENDER", fd, analysis: {} });
  75 |       }, 800);
  76 |     }
  77 |   }
  78 | 
  79 |   useEffect(() => {
  80 |     function handleMessage(event) {
  81 |       if (!event.data) return;
  82 | 
  83 |       // Iframe loaded â€” send prefill data
  84 |       if (event.data.type === "INFOPACE_LOADED") {
  85 |         if (!prefillSentRef.current) {
  86 |           prefillSentRef.current = true;
  87 |           const prefill = buildPrefill(userData);
  88 |           postToIframe({ type: "INFOPACE_PREFILL", userData: prefill });
  89 |         }
  90 |       }
  91 | 
  92 |       // User clicked "Generate Dashboard" â€” run analysis
  93 |       if (event.data.type === "INFOPACE_SUBMIT") {
  94 |         handleSubmit(event.data.fd);
  95 |       }
  96 | 
  97 |       // "New Assessment" clicked inside dashboard
  98 |       if (event.data.type === "INFOPACE_RESET") {
  99 |         onRestart();
 100 |       }
 101 |     }
 102 | 
 103 |     window.addEventListener("message", handleMessage);
 104 |     return () => window.removeEventListener("message", handleMessage);
 105 |   }, [userData]);
 106 | 
 107 |   return (
 108 |     <iframe
 109 |       ref={iframeRef}
 110 |       src="/dashboard.html"
 111 |       style={{ position: "fixed", inset: 0, border: "none", width: "100%", height: "100%" }}
 112 |       title="Infopace Assessment"
 113 |       sandbox="allow-scripts allow-same-origin allow-popups allow-downloads"
 114 |     />
 115 |   );
 116 | }
 117 |

FILE: src\pages\OnboardingForm.jsx

   1 | import { useState } from "react";
   2 | 
   3 | const SECTORS = [
   4 |   "HealthTech", "EdTech", "FinTech", "AgriTech", "CleanTech",
   5 |   "B2B SaaS", "D2C / Consumer", "Logistics / Supply Chain",
   6 |   "HR Tech", "LegalTech", "PropTech", "Manufacturing / DeepTech",
   7 |   "Media / Content", "RetailTech", "GovTech", "Other",
   8 | ];
   9 | const GEO = [
  10 |   { v: "PI", l: "Pan India" }, { v: "SA", l: "South Asia (SAARC)" },
  11 |   { v: "SE", l: "Southeast Asia" }, { v: "MEA", l: "Middle East & Africa" },
  12 |   { v: "EU", l: "Europe" }, { v: "NA", l: "North America" }, { v: "GL", l: "Global" },
  13 | ];
  14 | const STAGES = ["Idea Stage", "MVP / Prototype", "Live Pilots", "Paying Customers", "Scaling / Growth"];
  15 | const TEAM_SIZES = ["Solo / 1", "2â€“5", "6â€“15", "16â€“50", "51â€“200", "200+"];
  16 | const ROLES = [
  17 |   "Founder / Co-Founder", "CEO / MD", "CTO / CPO", "CMO / VP Marketing",
  18 |   "Business Development", "Product Manager", "Investor / VC", "Consultant / Advisor", "Other",
  19 | ];
  20 | 
  21 | export default function OnboardingForm({ onComplete }) {
  22 |   const [step, setStep] = useState(1); // 1 = personal, 2 = company
  23 |   const [form, setForm] = useState({
  24 |     name: "", email: "", phone: "", organization: "", role: "",
  25 |     website: "", linkedin: "", teamSize: "",
  26 |     sector: "", geography: "", problem: "", stage: "",
  27 |   });
  28 |   const [errors, setErrors] = useState({});
  29 | 
  30 |   const set = (k, v) => setForm((f) => ({ ...f, [k]: v }));
  31 |   const err = (k, msg) => setErrors((e) => ({ ...e, [k]: msg }));
  32 |   const clearErr = (k) => setErrors((e) => { const n = { ...e }; delete n[k]; return n; });
  33 | 
  34 |   function validateStep1() {
  35 |     let ok = true;
  36 |     if (!form.name.trim()) { err("name", "Required"); ok = false; }
  37 |     if (!form.email.match(/^[^\s@]+@[^\s@]+\.[^\s@]+$/)) { err("email", "Valid email required"); ok = false; }
  38 |     if (!form.phone.match(/^\+?[\d\s\-]{8,}$/)) { err("phone", "Valid phone required"); ok = false; }
  39 |     if (!form.organization.trim()) { err("organization", "Required"); ok = false; }
  40 |     if (!form.role) { err("role", "Required"); ok = false; }
  41 |     return ok;
  42 |   }
  43 | 
  44 |   function validateStep2() {
  45 |     let ok = true;
  46 |     if (!form.sector) { err("sector", "Required"); ok = false; }
  47 |     if (!form.geography) { err("geography", "Required"); ok = false; }
  48 |     if (!form.problem.trim() || form.problem.trim().length < 20) { err("problem", "Please describe in at least 20 characters"); ok = false; }
  49 |     if (!form.stage) { err("stage", "Required"); ok = false; }
  50 |     return ok;
  51 |   }
  52 | 
  53 |   const handleNext = () => {
  54 |     setErrors({});
  55 |     if (step === 1 && validateStep1()) setStep(2);
  56 |     else if (step === 2 && validateStep2()) onComplete(form);
  57 |   };
  58 | 
  59 |   const inputCls = (k) =>
  60 |     `w-full px-3 py-2.5 text-sm border rounded-sm bg-[#EEF2F7] text-[#08152A] outline-none transition-all
  61 |     focus:border-[#0091DA] focus:shadow-[0_0_0_3px_rgba(0,145,218,0.1)] focus:bg-white
  62 |     ${errors[k] ? "border-red-400 bg-red-50" : "border-[#D6DFED]"}`;
  63 | 
  64 |   return (
  65 |     <div className="min-h-screen bg-[#EEF2F7]" style={{ fontFamily: "'IBM Plex Sans', sans-serif" }}>
  66 |       {/* Topbar */}
  67 |       <div className="sticky top-0 z-50 bg-[#00338D] h-12 flex items-center justify-between px-6 shadow-lg">
  68 |         <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
  69 |           <div className="w-8 h-8 bg-[#0091DA] rounded flex items-center justify-center font-mono font-bold text-xs text-white">IP</div>
  70 |           <div>
  71 |             <div className="text-[11px] font-bold tracking-widest text-white uppercase">Infopace</div>
  72 |             <div className="text-[7px] text-white/40 tracking-wider uppercase">Market Intelligence Platform</div>
  73 |           </div>
  74 |         </div>
  75 |         <div className="text-[9px] text-white/50 uppercase tracking-wider">Assessment Registration</div>
  76 |       </div>
  77 | 
  78 |       <div className="max-w-2xl mx-auto px-4 py-12">
  79 |         {/* Hero */}
  80 |         <div className="mb-8">
  81 |           <div className="inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 text-[9px] font-bold tracking-wider uppercase text-[#0091DA] bg-[#EEF2FB] border border-[#C5D5F5] rounded px-2 py-1 mb-4">
  82 |             âœ¦ AI-POWERED MARKET INTELLIGENCE

------------------------------------------------------------
FILE: supabase_setup.sql
------------------------------------------------------------
   1 | -- ================================================================
   2 | --  Infopace â€” Supabase Database Setup
   3 | --  Run this entire file in: Supabase â†’ SQL Editor â†’ Run
   4 | -- ================================================================
   5 | 
   6 | -- 1. Create the submissions table
   7 | create table if not exists public.submissions (
   8 |   id            uuid        default gen_random_uuid() primary key,
   9 |   name          text        not null,
  10 |   email         text        not null,
  11 |   phone         text,
  12 |   organization  text,
  13 |   role          text,
  14 |   website       text,
  15 |   linkedin      text,
  16 |   team_size     text,
  17 |   sector        text,
  18 |   geography     text,
  19 |   problem       text,
  20 |   stage         text,
  21 |   answers       jsonb,
  22 |   overall_score integer,
  23 |   grade         text,
  24 |   dimensions    jsonb,
  25 |   analysis_json jsonb,
  26 |   created_at    timestamptz default now()
  27 | );
  28 | 
  29 | -- 2. Enable Row Level Security
  30 | alter table public.submissions enable row level security;
  31 | 
  32 | -- 3. Policy: anyone can INSERT (submit assessment)
  33 | create policy "Allow public inserts"
  34 |   on public.submissions
  35 |   for insert
  36 |   with check (true);
  37 | 
  38 | -- 4. Policy: anyone can SELECT (view results in-app)
  39 | --    Tighten this later if you add auth
  40 | create policy "Allow public reads"
  41 |   on public.submissions
  42 |   for select
  43 |   using (true);
  44 | 
  45 | -- 5. Optional: index on email for fast lookups
  46 | create index if not exists submissions_email_idx
  47 |   on public.submissions (email);
  48 | 
  49 | -- 6. Optional: index on created_at for dashboard sorting
  50 | create index if not exists submissions_created_at_idx
  51 |   on public.submissions (created_at desc);
  52 | 
  53 | -- ================================================================
  54 | --  DONE. You should see the `submissions` table in Table Editor.
  55 | -- ================================================================
  56 |
