3681 |  828 | /* â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•
3682 |  829 |    LIVE SCORING
3683 |  830 | â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â• */
3684 |  831 | function calcLive(){
3685 |  832 |   // â”€â”€ Step 0 context fields â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
3686 |  833 |   const hasSector  = document.getElementById('sector').value?1:0;
3687 |  834 |   const hasBizType = document.getElementById('bizType').value?1:0;
3688 |  835 |   const hasGeo     = document.getElementById('geo').value?1:0;
3689 |  836 |   const probLen    = document.getElementById('problem').value.length;
3690 |  837 |   const probScore  = probLen>120?5:probLen>60?3:probLen>20?1:0;
3691 |  838 |   const stageVal   = +(document.querySelector('#stagePills .pill.on')?.dataset.val)||0;
3692 |  839 | 
3693 |  840 |   // Only score if context is filled
3694 |  841 |   const contextFilled = hasSector&&hasBizType&&hasGeo;
3695 |  842 | 
3696 |  843 |   // â”€â”€ Read actual selected values from AI questions â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
3697 |  844 |   // Each select has data-w (weight) and returns v (1-5)
3698 |  845 |   // We track which section each question belongs to via ID prefix
3699 |  846 |   const selScores={d1:[],d2:[],d3:[],d4:[],d5:[],d6:[]};
3700 |  847 | 
3701 |  848 |   // Map question IDs to dimensions
3702 |  849 |   // s1=Market Size(d1), s2=Audience(d2), s3=Competition(d3),
3703 |  850 |   // s4=Revenue(d4), s5=Risk(d5), s6=GTM(d4), s7=PMF(d2), s8=SectorFit(d6)
3704 |  851 |   const dimMap={'s1':'d1','s2':'d2','s3':'d3','s4':'d4','s5':'d5','s6':'d4','s7':'d2','s8':'d6','f1':'d1','f2':'d2','f3':'d3','f4':'d4','f5':'d5','f6':'d4','f7':'d2','f8':'d6'};
3705 |  852 | 
3706 |  853 |   document.querySelectorAll('.ai-sel').forEach(el=>{
3707 |  854 |     if(!el.value)return;
3708 |  855 |     const v=+(el.value)||0;          // actual selected value 1-5
3709 |  856 |     const w=+(el.dataset.w)||2;      // weight of this question
3710 |  857 |     const prefix=el.id.replace(/q\d+$/,'').replace(/^s/,'s').slice(0,2); // e.g. s1, s2
3711 |  858 |     const dim=dimMap[prefix]||dimMap[el.id.slice(0,2)]||'d1';
3712 |  859 |     (selScores[dim]=selScores[dim]||[]).push({v,w});
3713 |  860 |   });
3714 |  861 | 
3715 |  862 |   document.querySelectorAll('.ai-pills').forEach(grp=>{
3716 |  863 |     const on=grp.querySelector('.pill.on');
3717 |  864 |     if(!on)return;
3718 |  865 |     const v=+(on.dataset.val)||3;
3719 |  866 |     const id=grp.id||'';
3720 |  867 |     const prefix=id.slice(0,2);
3721 |  868 |     const dim=dimMap[prefix]||'d1';
3722 |  869 |     (selScores[dim]=selScores[dim]||[]).push({v,w:2});
3723 |  870 |   });
3724 |  871 | 
3725 |  872 |   document.querySelectorAll('.ai-chk:checked').forEach(el=>{
3726 |  873 |     const section=el.closest('.sec');
3727 |  874 |     const secId=section?.id||'sec1';
3728 |  875 |     const secNum=+secId.replace('sec','')||1;
3729 |  876 |     const dimKeys=['d1','d2','d3','d4','d5','d4','d2','d6'];
3730 |  877 |     const dim=dimKeys[secNum-1]||'d6';
3731 |  878 |     (selScores[dim]=selScores[dim]||[]).push({v:4,w:1}); // checkboxes = moderate positive
3732 |  879 |   });
3733 |  880 | 
3734 |  881 |   // â”€â”€ Calculate each dimension score (0-100) â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
3735 |  882 |   function dimScore(key){
3736 |  883 |     const items=selScores[key]||[];
3737 |  884 |     if(!items.length)return null; // not yet answered
3738 |  885 |     const totalW=items.reduce((s,i)=>s+i.w,0);
3739 |  886 |     const weighted=items.reduce((s,i)=>s+(i.v*i.w),0);
3740 |  887 |     // weighted average on 1-5 scale â†’ convert to 0-100
3741 |  888 |     return Math.round(((weighted/totalW)-1)/4*100);
3742 |  889 |   }
3743 |  890 | 
3744 |  891 |   const d1=dimScore('d1'); // Market Size
3745 |  892 |   const d2=dimScore('d2'); // Audience Quality
3746 |  893 |   const d3=dimScore('d3'); // Competition Edge
3747 |  894 |   const d4=dimScore('d4'); // Revenue Potential
3748 |  895 |   const d5=dimScore('d5'); // Risk Profile
3749 |  896 |   const d6=dimScore('d6'); // Sector Fit
3750 |  897 | 
3751 |  898 |   // â”€â”€ Context bonus (filling basics) â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
3752 |  899 |   // Max 15 points for context â€” NOT for just having a sector selected
3753 |  900 |   const contextBonus=contextFilled?(hasSector*3+hasBizType*3+hasGeo*2+probScore+Math.min(stageVal,5)):0;
3754 |  901 | 
3755 |  902 |   // â”€â”€ Overall score = weighted average of dims + context â”€
3756 |  903 |   // Dims that haven't been answered yet are excluded from average
3757 |  904 |   const answeredDims=[d1,d2,d3,d4,d5,d6].filter(v=>v!==null);
3758 |  905 |   let overall=0;
3759 |  906 |   if(!contextFilled||answeredDims.length===0){
3760 |  907 |     // Nothing meaningful answered â€” score is 0
3761 |  908 |     overall=0;
3762 |  909 |   } else {
3763 |  910 |     // Weighted: competition(d3) and revenue(d4) matter most
3764 |  911 |     const weights=[15,20,25,25,10,5]; // d1 d2 d3 d4 d5 d6
3765 |  912 |     const allDims=[d1,d2,d3,d4,d5,d6];
3766 |  913 |     let wSum=0, wTotal=0;
3767 |  914 |     allDims.forEach((v,i)=>{
3768 |  915 |       if(v!==null){wSum+=v*weights[i];wTotal+=weights[i];}
3769 |  916 |     });
3770 |  917 |     const dimAvg=wTotal>0?wSum/wTotal:0;
3771 |  918 | 
3772 |  919 |     // Context bonus adds up to 15 points on top of dim average
3773 |  920 |     // But only if at least 2 sections answered
3774 |  921 |     const bonus=answeredDims.length>=2?Math.round(contextBonus/15*15):0;
3775 |  922 |     overall=Math.min(100,Math.round(dimAvg*0.85+bonus));
3776 |  923 | 
3777 |  924 |     // Penalty: if less than 3 sections answered, cap score at 60
3778 |  925 |     if(answeredDims.length<3)overall=Math.min(overall,60);
3779 |  926 |     // Penalty: if problem statement too short, cap at 70
3780 |  927 |     if(probLen<40&&overall>70)overall=70;
3781 |  928 |   }
3782 |  929 | 
3783 |  930 |   // â”€â”€ Update UI â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
3784 |  931 |   const lsEl=document.getElementById('liveScore');
3785 |  932 |   const lgEl=document.getElementById('liveGrade');
3786 |  933 |   if(overall===0){
3787 |  934 |     lsEl.textContent='0';lsEl.className='big-sc sc-zero';
3788 |  935 |     lgEl.textContent='Fill in the form';lgEl.style.color='#9BAABB';
3789 |  936 |     document.getElementById('topScoreWrap').style.display='none';
3790 |  937 |     // Reset dim bars
3791 |  938 |     ['bf1','bf2','bf3','bf4','bf5','bf6'].forEach(id=>{const el=document.getElementById(id);if(el)el.style.width='0%';});
3792 |  939 |     ['d1lbl','d2lbl','d3lbl','d4lbl','d5lbl','d6lbl'].forEach(id=>{const el=document.getElementById(id);if(el)el.textContent='â€”';});
3793 |  940 |     return;
3794 |  941 |   }
3795 |  942 |   lsEl.textContent=overall;
3796 |  943 |   if(overall>=70){lsEl.className='big-sc sc-high';lgEl.textContent='High Potential âœ“';lgEl.style.color='#00A3A1';}
3797 |  944 |   else if(overall>=45){lsEl.className='big-sc sc-mid';lgEl.textContent='Moderate Potential';lgEl.style.color='#E8A000';}
3798 |  945 |   else{lsEl.className='big-sc sc-low';lgEl.textContent='Needs Strengthening';lgEl.style.color='#C8002D';}
3799 |  946 | 
3800 |  947 |   document.getElementById('topScoreWrap').style.display='flex';
3801 |  948 |   document.getElementById('topScore').textContent=overall+'/100';
3802 |  949 | 
3803 |  950 |   // â”€â”€ Update individual dimension bars â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
3804 |  951 |   const dimVals=[d1,d2,d3,d4,d5,d6];
3805 |  952 |   const dimColors=['#00338D','#0091DA','#E8A000','#005EB8','#6D2077','#00A3A1'];
3806 |  953 |   ['bf1','bf2','bf3','bf4','bf5','bf6'].forEach((id,i)=>{
3807 |  954 |     const el=document.getElementById(id);
3808 |  955 |     if(!el)return;
3809 |  956 |     const v=dimVals[i];
3810 |  957 |     el.style.width=(v!==null?v:0)+'%';
3811 |  958 |     el.style.background=dimColors[i];
3812 |  959 |   });
3813 |  960 |   ['d1lbl','d2lbl','d3lbl','d4lbl','d5lbl','d6lbl'].forEach((id,i)=>{
3814 |  961 |     const el=document.getElementById(id);
3815 |  962 |     if(!el)return;
3816 |  963 |     const v=dimVals[i];
3817 |  964 |     el.textContent=v!==null?v+'/100':'â€”';
3818 |  965 |   });
3819 |  966 | 
3820 |  967 |   buildLiveInsights(overall,{d1,d2,d3,d4,d5,d6});
3821 |  968 | }
3822 |  969 | 
3823 |  970 | function buildLiveInsights(t,dims){
3824 |  971 |   const sec=document.getElementById('sector').value;
3825 |  972 |   const geo=document.getElementById('geo').value;

4025 | 1172 | 
4026 | 1173 | /* Repair a truncated JSON string by closing any open structures */
4027 | 1174 | function repairTruncatedJSON(s){
4028 | 1175 |   // Walk the string tracking depth; truncate at last complete top-level section
4029 | 1176 |   // Strategy: find the last occurrence of "}]}" or "}]," and close from there
4030 | 1177 |   let best=s;
4031 | 1178 |   // Try progressively shorter slices to find parseable JSON
4032 | 1179 |   for(let i=s.length-1;i>s.length*0.4;i--){
4033 | 1180 |     const c=s[i];
4034 | 1181 |     if(c==='}'){
4035 | 1182 |       try{
4036 | 1183 |         const candidate=closeJSON(s.slice(0,i+1));
4037 | 1184 |         JSON.parse(candidate);
4038 | 1185 |         best=candidate;
4039 | 1186 |         break;
4040 | 1187 |       }catch(_){}
4041 | 1188 |     }
4042 | 1189 |   }
4043 | 1190 |   return best;
4044 | 1191 | }
4045 | 1192 | 
4046 | 1193 | function closeJSON(s){
4047 | 1194 |   // Count open brackets/braces
4048 | 1195 |   let depth=0; const stack=[];
4049 | 1196 |   for(const c of s){
4050 | 1197 |     if(c==='{'){stack.push('}');}
4051 | 1198 |     else if(c==='['){stack.push(']');}
4052 | 1199 |     else if(c==='}'||c===']'){stack.pop();}
4053 | 1200 |   }
4054 | 1201 |   // Close any trailing comma before we close
4055 | 1202 |   let result=s.replace(/,\s*$/,'');
4056 | 1203 |   return result+stack.reverse().join('');
4057 | 1204 | }

4319 | 1466 |   // Exponential backoff helper (shared pattern)
4320 | 1467 |   const fetchWithRetry=async(url,opts,maxTries=3)=>{
4321 | 1468 |     for(let attempt=1;attempt<=maxTries;attempt++){
4322 | 1469 |       const r=await fetch(url,opts);
4323 | 1470 |       if((r.status===429||r.status===529||r.status>=500)&&attempt<maxTries){
4324 | 1471 |         await new Promise(res=>setTimeout(res,Math.min(2000*Math.pow(2,attempt-1),16000)));
4325 | 1472 |         continue;
4326 | 1473 |       }
4327 | 1474 |       return r;
4328 | 1475 |     }
4329 | 1476 |   };

5650 | 2797 |     // Donut chart â€” pure SVG
5651 | 2798 |     function donutSVG(data,W,cx,cy,OR,IR){
5652 | 2799 |       const tot=data.reduce((s,d)=>s+(+d.v||0),0)||100;
5653 | 2800 |       let ang=-Math.PI/2;
5654 | 2801 |       return data.map((d,i)=>{
5655 | 2802 |         const sw=(+d.v||0)/tot*2*Math.PI;
5656 | 2803 |         if(sw<0.02){ang+=sw;return '';}
5657 | 2804 |         const x1=cx+OR*Math.cos(ang),y1=cy+OR*Math.sin(ang);
5658 | 2805 |         const x2=cx+OR*Math.cos(ang+sw),y2=cy+OR*Math.sin(ang+sw);
5659 | 2806 |         const x3=cx+IR*Math.cos(ang+sw),y3=cy+IR*Math.sin(ang+sw);
5660 | 2807 |         const x4=cx+IR*Math.cos(ang),y4=cy+IR*Math.sin(ang);
5661 | 2808 |         const lg=sw>Math.PI?1:0;
5662 | 2809 |         const mx=cx+(OR+IR)/2*Math.cos(ang+sw/2),my=cy+(OR+IR)/2*Math.sin(ang+sw/2);
5663 | 2810 |         const pct=Math.round((+d.v||0)/tot*100);
5664 | 2811 |         const lbl2=pct>=6?`<text x="${mx}" y="${my+3.5}" text-anchor="middle" font-size="9" font-weight="700" fill="rgba(255,255,255,.95)" font-family="'IBM Plex Mono',monospace">${pct}%</text>`:'';
5665 | 2812 |         ang+=sw;
5666 | 2813 |         return `<path d="M${x1},${y1} A${OR},${OR} 0 ${lg},1 ${x2},${y2} L${x3},${y3} A${IR},${IR} 0 ${lg},0 ${x4},${y4} Z" fill="${d.c}" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="1.5"/>${lbl2}`;
5667 | 2814 |       }).join('');
5668 | 2815 |     }

6118 | ------------------------------------------------------------
6119 | FILE: README.md
6120 | ------------------------------------------------------------
6121 |    1 | # Infopace â€” React + Supabase Edition
6122 |    2 | 
6123 |    3 | > AI-powered market intelligence assessment platform.
6124 |    4 | > Built with React + Vite + Tailwind CSS + Gemini AI + Supabase.
6125 |    5 | 
6126 |    6 | ---
6127 |    7 | 
6128 |    8 | ## What This App Does
6129 |    9 | 
6130 |   10 | 1. **Onboarding Form** â€” Collects user details (name, email, phone, organization, role, website, LinkedIn, team size, sector, geography, problem statement, stage)
6131 |   11 | 2. **AI Assessment** â€” Generates 8 tailored question groups using Gemini AI, with a live market score panel updating as you answer
6132 |   12 | 3. **Results Dashboard** â€” Full market intelligence dashboard with:
6133 |   13 |    - Score donut + dimension bars + capability radar
6134 |   14 |    - Revenue projection chart (conservative / base / optimistic)
6135 |   15 |    - TAM / SAM / SOM estimates
6136 |   16 |    - Competitor analysis
6137 |   17 |    - Key AI-generated insights
6138 |   18 |    - 90-day action plan
6139 |   19 |    - Full printable report view
6140 |   20 |    - Raw JSON data view
6141 |   21 | 4. **Supabase Storage** â€” Every submission (user details + all answers + full analysis) is saved to your Supabase database
6142 |   22 | 
6143 |   23 | ---
6144 |   24 | 
6145 |   25 | ## Prerequisites
6146 |   26 | 
6147 |   27 | - Node.js 18+
6148 |   28 | - A free [Gemini API key](https://aistudio.google.com) (already in `server.js`)
6149 |   29 | - A free [Supabase](https://supabase.com) project
6150 |   30 | 
6151 |   31 | ---
6152 |   32 | 
6153 |   33 | ## Quick Start
6154 |   34 | 
6155 |   35 | ### Step 1 â€” Set up Supabase
6156 |   36 | 
6157 |   37 | 1. Create a free project at [supabase.com](https://supabase.com)
6158 |   38 | 2. Go to **SQL Editor** and paste + run the contents of `supabase_setup.sql`
6159 |   39 | 3. Go to **Settings â†’ API** and copy:
6160 |   40 |    - **Project URL** (looks like `https://xxxx.supabase.co`)
6161 |   41 |    - **anon / public key** (long JWT string)
6162 |   42 | 
6163 |   43 | ### Step 2 â€” Configure environment
6164 |   44 | 
6165 |   45 | ```bash
6166 |   46 | cp .env.example .env
6167 |   47 | ```
6168 |   48 | 
6169 |   49 | Edit `.env` and fill in your values:
6170 |   50 | 
6171 |   51 | ```env
6172 |   52 | VITE_SUPABASE_URL=https://YOUR_PROJECT_ID.supabase.co
6173 |   53 | VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY=YOUR_ANON_PUBLIC_KEY
6174 |   54 | ```
6175 |   55 | 
6176 |   56 | ### Step 3 â€” Install dependencies
6177 |   57 | 
6178 |   58 | ```bash
6179 |   59 | npm install
6180 |   60 | ```
6181 |   61 | 
6182 |   62 | ### Step 4 â€” Run the app (two terminals)
6183 |   63 | 
6184 |   64 | **Terminal 1** â€” Start the Gemini proxy server (port 4000):
6185 |   65 | ```bash
6186 |   66 | node server.js
6187 |   67 | ```
6188 |   68 | 
6189 |   69 | **Terminal 2** â€” Start the React dev server (port 3000):
6190 |   70 | ```bash
6191 |   71 | npm run dev
6192 |   72 | ```
6193 |   73 | 
6194 |   74 | Open **http://localhost:3000**
6195 |   75 | 
6196 |   76 | The Vite dev server automatically proxies `/api` requests to `server.js` on port 4000.
6197 |   77 | 
6198 |   78 | ---
6199 |   79 | 
6200 |   80 | ## Project Structure
6201 |   81 | 
6202 |   82 | ```
6203 |   83 | infopace-react/
6204 |   84 | â”œâ”€â”€ server.js                    â† Gemini AI proxy (Node.js, port 4000)
6205 |   85 | â”œâ”€â”€ supabase_setup.sql           â† Run once in Supabase SQL Editor
6206 |   86 | â”œâ”€â”€ .env.example                 â† Copy to .env and fill in keys
6207 |   87 | â”‚
6208 |   88 | â”œâ”€â”€ index.html                   â† Vite entry HTML
6209 |   89 | â”œâ”€â”€ vite.config.js               â† Dev server + /api proxy config
6210 |   90 | â”œâ”€â”€ tailwind.config.js
6211 |   91 | â”œâ”€â”€ postcss.config.js
6212 |   92 | â”œâ”€â”€ package.json
6213 |   93 | â”‚
6214 |   94 | â””â”€â”€ src/
6215 |   95 |     â”œâ”€â”€ main.jsx                 â† React entry point
6216 |   96 |     â”œâ”€â”€ App.jsx                  â† Screen router (onboarding â†’ assessment â†’ results)
6217 |   97 |     â”œâ”€â”€ index.css                â† Tailwind + IBM Plex fonts
6218 |   98 |     â”‚
6219 |   99 |     â”œâ”€â”€ pages/
6220 |  100 |     â”‚   â”œâ”€â”€ OnboardingForm.jsx   â† Step 1: User & venture details
6221 |  101 |     â”‚   â”œâ”€â”€ AssessmentShell.jsx  â† Step 2: AI questions + live scoring
6222 |  102 |     â”‚   â””â”€â”€ ResultsDashboard.jsx â† Step 3: Full dashboard + report
6223 |  103 |     â”‚
6224 |  104 |     â””â”€â”€ lib/
6225 |  105 |         â”œâ”€â”€ supabase.js          â† Supabase client init
6226 |  106 |         â”œâ”€â”€ gemini.js            â† Gemini API helpers (questions + analysis)
6227 |  107 |         â””â”€â”€ db.js                â† Save / load submissions
6228 |  108 | ```
6229 |  109 | 
6230 |  110 | ---
6231 |  111 | 
6232 |  112 | ## Data Saved to Supabase
6233 |  113 | 
6234 |  114 | Every completed assessment saves one row to the `submissions` table:
6235 |  115 | 
6236 |  116 | | Column | Type | Description |
6237 |  117 | |---|---|---|
6238 |  118 | | `id` | uuid | Auto-generated primary key |
6239 |  119 | | `name` | text | Full name |
6240 |  120 | | `email` | text | Email address |
6241 |  121 | | `phone` | text | Phone number |
6242 |  122 | | `organization` | text | Company name |
6243 |  123 | | `role` | text | Job role |
6244 |  124 | | `website` | text | Website URL |
6245 |  125 | | `linkedin` | text | LinkedIn URL |
6246 |  126 | | `team_size` | text | Team size bracket |
6247 |  127 | | `sector` | text | e.g. "HealthTech", "B2B SaaS" |
6248 |  128 | | `geography` | text | e.g. "PI" (Pan India), "GL" (Global) |
6249 |  129 | | `problem` | text | Problem statement |
6250 |  130 | | `stage` | text | Business stage (1â€“5) |
6251 |  131 | | `answers` | jsonb | All question answers keyed by question ID |
6252 |  132 | | `overall_score` | integer | Final market score (0â€“100) |
6253 |  133 | | `grade` | text | e.g. "A", "B+", "C" |
6254 |  134 | | `dimensions` | jsonb | Six dimension scores |
6255 |  135 | | `analysis_json` | jsonb | Complete AI analysis (TAM/SAM/SOM, competitors, insights, action plan, projections) |
6256 |  136 | | `created_at` | timestamptz | Submission timestamp |
6257 |  137 | 
6258 |  138 | ---
6259 |  139 | 
6260 |  140 | ## Production Deployment
6261 |  141 | 
6262 |  142 | ### Build the React app
6263 |  143 | 
6264 |  144 | ```bash
6265 |  145 | npm run build
6266 |  146 | ```
6267 |  147 | 
6268 |  148 | This creates a `dist/` folder.
6269 |  149 | 
6270 |  150 | ### Serve with server.js
6271 |  151 | 
6272 |  152 | Update `server.js` to serve the `dist/` folder as static files. Replace the static file section at the bottom of `server.js` with:
6273 |  153 | 
6274 |  154 | ```javascript
6275 |  155 | // Serve React build
6276 |  156 | let fp = req.url === '/' ? '/index.html' : req.url.split('?')[0];
6277 |  157 | 
6278 |  158 | // For React Router â€” serve index.html for unknown routes
6279 |  159 | const fullPath = path.join(process.cwd(), 'dist', fp);
6280 |  160 | fs.readFile(fullPath, (err, data) => {
6281 |  161 |   if (err) {
6282 |  162 |     // Fallback to index.html for client-side routing
6283 |  163 |     fs.readFile(path.join(process.cwd(), 'dist', 'index.html'), (e2, d2) => {
6284 |  164 |       if (e2) { res.writeHead(404); res.end('Not found'); return; }
6285 |  165 |       res.writeHead(200, { 'Content-Type': 'text/html' });
6286 |  166 |       res.end(d2);
6287 |  167 |     });
6288 |  168 |     return;
6289 |  169 |   }
6290 |  170 |   res.writeHead(200, { 'Content-Type': MIME[path.extname(fullPath)] || 'text/plain' });
6291 |  171 |   res.end(data);
6292 |  172 | });
6293 |  173 | ```
6294 |  174 | 
6295 |  175 | Then run just `node server.js` â€” it serves both the API and the React app on port 4000.
6296 |  176 | 
6297 |  177 | ### Deploy options
6298 |  178 | 
6299 |  179 | - **Railway / Render / Fly.io** â€” push repo, set env vars, run `node server.js`
6300 |  180 | - **Vercel** â€” deploy React app, add serverless function wrapping Gemini calls
6301 |  181 | - **VPS** â€” clone repo, `npm run build`, run with `pm2 start server.js`
6302 |  182 | 
6303 |  183 | ---
6304 |  184 | 
6305 |  185 | ## Customisation
6306 |  186 | 
6307 |  187 | ### Change sectors / geographies
6308 |  188 | Edit the `SECTORS` and `GEO` arrays at the top of `src/pages/OnboardingForm.jsx`.
6309 |  189 | 
6310 |  190 | ### Change AI models
6311 |  191 | Edit `MODEL_FAST` and `MODEL_SMART` constants in `server.js`.
6312 |  192 | 
6313 |  193 | ### Change question count
6314 |  194 | Edit the prompt in `src/lib/gemini.js` â†’ `generateQuestions()`.
6315 |  195 | 
6316 |  196 | ### Add email notifications
6317 |  197 | After `saveSubmission()` in `AssessmentShell.jsx`, call a Supabase Edge Function or a service like Resend/SendGrid.
6318 |  198 | 
6319 |  199 | ---
6320 |  200 | 
6321 |  201 | ## Troubleshooting
6322 |  202 | 
6323 |  203 | | Problem | Fix |
6324 |  204 | |---|---|
6325 |  205 | | `/api` returns 500 | Check Gemini API key on line 8 of `server.js` |
6326 |  206 | | Supabase save fails | Verify `.env` values and that `supabase_setup.sql` was run |
6327 |  207 | | Questions don't load | Gemini API key may be rate-limited; fallback questions will show |
6328 |  208 | | Blank dashboard | Open browser console â€” look for JSON parse errors in analysis response |
6329 |  209 | 
6330 |  210 | ---

6369 |   30 | function geminiRequest(model, promptText, callback) {
6370 |   31 |   const payload = JSON.stringify({
6371 |   32 |     contents: [{ parts: [{ text: promptText }] }],
6372 |   33 |     generationConfig: {
6373 |   34 |       temperature: 0.7,
6374 |   35 |       maxOutputTokens: 8192,
6375 |   36 |       responseMimeType: 'text/plain'
6376 |   37 |     }
6377 |   38 |   });
6378 |   39 | 
6379 |   40 |   const options = {
6380 |   41 |     hostname: 'generativelanguage.googleapis.com',
6381 |   42 |     path: `/v1beta/models/${model}:generateContent?key=${API_KEY}`,
6382 |   43 |     method: 'POST',
6383 |   44 |     headers: {
6384 |   45 |       'Content-Type': 'application/json',
6385 |   46 |       'Content-Length': Buffer.byteLength(payload)
6386 |   47 |     }
6387 |   48 |   };
6388 |   49 | 
6389 |   50 |   const req = https.request(options, res => {
6390 |   51 |     let body = '';
6391 |   52 |     res.on('data', c => body += c);
6392 |   53 |     res.on('end', () => callback(null, res.statusCode, body));
6393 |   54 |   });
6394 |   55 |   req.on('error', e => callback(e, null, null));
6395 |   56 |   req.write(payload);
6396 |   57 |   req.end();
6397 |   58 | }
6398 |   59 | 
6399 |   60 | http.createServer((req, res) => {
6400 |   61 |   res.setHeader('Access-Control-Allow-Origin', '*');
6401 |   62 |   res.setHeader('Access-Control-Allow-Methods', 'GET, POST, OPTIONS');
6402 |   63 |   res.setHeader('Access-Control-Allow-Headers', 'Content-Type');
6403 |   64 |   if (req.method === 'OPTIONS') { res.writeHead(204); res.end(); return; }
6404 |   65 | 
6405 |   66 |   // â”€â”€ /api â†’ Gemini proxy â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
6406 |   67 |   if (req.url === '/api' && req.method === 'POST') {
6407 |   68 |     if (!API_KEY || API_KEY === 'YOUR_GEMINI_KEY_HERE') {
6408 |   69 |       res.writeHead(500, {'Content-Type':'application/json'});
6409 |   70 |       res.end(JSON.stringify({error:'Gemini API key not set. Edit line 8 of server.js'}));
6410 |   71 |       return;
6411 |   72 |     }
6412 |   73 | 
6413 |   74 |     let body = '';
6414 |   75 |     req.on('data', c => body += c);
6415 |   76 |     req.on('end', () => {
6416 |   77 |       let payload;
6417 |   78 |       try { payload = JSON.parse(body); }
6418 |   79 |       catch(e) { res.writeHead(400); res.end('bad json'); return; }
6419 |   80 | 
6420 |   81 |       const type   = payload._type || 'analysis';
6421 |   82 |       const prompt = payload.prompt || '';
6422 |   83 |       const model  = type === 'questions' ? MODEL_FAST : MODEL_SMART;
6423 |   84 | 
6424 |   85 |       console.log('  â†’  ' + type + ' (' + model + ')');
6425 |   86 | 
6426 |   87 |       geminiRequest(model, prompt, (err, status, respBody) => {
6427 |   88 |         if (err) {
6428 |   89 |           console.log('  âŒ Network error:', err.message);
6429 |   90 |           res.writeHead(502, {'Content-Type':'application/json'});
6430 |   91 |           res.end(JSON.stringify({error: err.message}));
6431 |   92 |           return;
6432 |   93 |         }
6433 |   94 | 
6434 |   95 |         const icon = status < 300 ? 'âœ…' : 'âŒ';
6435 |   96 |         console.log('  ' + icon + '  ' + status + '  ' + type);
6436 |   97 | 
6437 |   98 |         if (status !== 200) {
6438 |   99 |           try {
6439 |  100 |             const e = JSON.parse(respBody);
6440 |  101 |             console.log('      Error:', e.error?.message || respBody.slice(0,120));
6441 |  102 |           } catch(_) { console.log('      Raw:', respBody.slice(0,120)); }
6442 |  103 |         }
6443 |  104 | 
6444 |  105 |         // Convert Gemini response â†’ Anthropic-style response
6445 |  106 |         // so the HTML parsing code works without changes
6446 |  107 |         let anthropicStyle;
6447 |  108 |         try {
6448 |  109 |           const geminiData = JSON.parse(respBody);
6449 |  110 |           const text = (geminiData?.candidates?.[0]?.content?.parts||[])
6450 |  111 |             .map(p => p.text||'').join('');
6451 |  112 |           // Wrap in Anthropic content format
6452 |  113 |           anthropicStyle = JSON.stringify({
6453 |  114 |             candidates: geminiData.candidates,
6454 |  115 |             content: [{ type: 'text', text: text }]
6455 |  116 |           });
6456 |  117 |         } catch(_) {
6457 |  118 |           anthropicStyle = respBody;
6458 |  119 |         }
6459 |  120 | 
6460 |  121 |         res.writeHead(status, {
6461 |  122 |           'Content-Type': 'application/json',
6462 |  123 |           'Access-Control-Allow-Origin': '*'
6463 |  124 |         });
6464 |  125 |         res.end(anthropicStyle);
6465 |  126 |       });
6466 |  127 |     });
6467 |  128 |     return;
6468 |  129 |   }
6469 |  130 | 
6470 |  131 |   // â”€â”€ Static files â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
6471 |  132 |   let fp = req.url === '/' ? '/index.html' : req.url.split('?')[0];

6578 |    3 | export async function saveSubmission({ userData, answers, result }) {
6579 |    4 |   const { data, error } = await supabase
6580 |    5 |     .from("submissions")
6581 |    6 |     .insert([
6582 |    7 |       {
6583 |    8 |         name: userData.name,
6584 |    9 |         email: userData.email,
6585 |   10 |         phone: userData.phone,
6586 |   11 |         organization: userData.organization,
6587 |   12 |         role: userData.role,
6588 |   13 |         website: userData.website || null,
6589 |   14 |         linkedin: userData.linkedin || null,
6590 |   15 |         team_size: userData.teamSize || null,
6591 |   16 |         sector: userData.sector,
6592 |   17 |         geography: userData.geography,
6593 |   18 |         problem: userData.problem,
6594 |   19 |         stage: userData.stage,
6595 |   20 |         answers: answers,
6596 |   21 |         overall_score: result.overallScore,
6597 |   22 |         grade: result.grade,
6598 |   23 |         dimensions: result.dimensions,
6599 |   24 |         analysis_json: result,
6600 |   25 |         created_at: new Date().toISOString(),
6601 |   26 |       },
6602 |   27 |     ])
6603 |   28 |     .select()
6604 |   29 |     .single();
6605 |   30 | 
6606 |   31 |   if (error) {
6607 |   32 |     console.error("Supabase save error:", error);
6608 |   33 |     throw error;
6609 |   34 |   }
6610 |   35 |   return data;
6611 |   36 | }
6612 |   37 | 
6613 |   38 | export async function getAllSubmissions() {
6614 |   39 |   const { data, error } = await supabase
6615 |   40 |     .from("submissions")
6616 |   41 |     .select("*")
6617 |   42 |     .order("created_at", { ascending: false });
6618 |   43 |   if (error) throw error;
6619 |   44 |   return data;
6620 |   45 | }

6624 | FILE: src\lib\gemini.js
6625 | ------------------------------------------------------------
6626 |    1 | // Gemini API helper â€” calls the proxy server (server.js) at /api
6627 |    2 | export async function geminiCall(prompt, type = "analysis") {
6628 |    3 |   const res = await fetch("/api", {
6629 |    4 |     method: "POST",
6630 |    5 |     headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
6631 |    6 |     body: JSON.stringify({ prompt, _type: type }),
6632 |    7 |   });
6633 |    8 |   if (!res.ok) throw new Error(`API error: ${res.status}`);
6634 |    9 |   const data = await res.json();
6635 |   10 |   // Extract text from Anthropic-style wrapper (server.js converts it)
6636 |   11 |   return data?.content?.[0]?.text || "";
6637 |   12 | }
6638 |   13 | 
6639 |   14 | export async function generateQuestions(sector, geography, problem) {
6640 |   15 |   const prompt = `You are an expert market intelligence analyst. Generate exactly 8 groups of 3â€“4 assessment questions for a ${sector} startup targeting ${geography}. 
6641 |   16 | Problem they solve: "${problem}"
6642 |   17 | 
6643 |   18 | Each group covers one of: Market Size, Audience Quality, Competition Edge, Revenue Potential, Risk Profile, Sector Fit, Growth Levers, Strategic Differentiation.
6644 |   19 | 
6645 |   20 | Return ONLY valid JSON in this exact format:
6646 |   21 | {
6647 |   22 |   "groups": [
6648 |   23 |     {
6649 |   24 |       "title": "Market Size",

6655 |   30 |       ]
6656 |   31 |     }
6657 |   32 |   ]
6658 |   33 | }

6660 |   35 |   return JSON.parse(await geminiCall(prompt, "questions"));
6661 |   36 | }

6663 |   38 | export async function generateAnalysis(userData, answers) {
6664 |   39 |   const GEO_LABELS = {

6666 |   41 |     MEA: "Middle East & Africa", EU: "Europe", NA: "North America", GL: "Global",
6667 |   42 |   };

6670 |   45 |   const biz = userData.organization || "Your Venture";
6671 |   46 |

6673 |   48 |     .filter(([, v]) => v && v !== "")
6674 |   49 |     .map(([k, v]) => `  - ${k}: ${Array.isArray(v) ? v.join(", ") : v}`)
6675 |   50 |     .join("\n") || "(no answers provided)";
6676 |   51 |

6739 |  114 |   "Africa": {"rev":"<sector size>","pct":"<% of global>","ids":[566,710,404,818,12]}

6746 |  121 |   "revregion": "<2 sentences on which cities are priority and why>",

6748 |  123 |   "trend": "<2 sentences on trajectory and inflection point>",
6749 |  124 |   "geomap": "<2 sentences on geographic focus rationale>"
6750 |  125 | }
6751 |  126 | }`;
6752 |  127 | 
6753 |  128 |   const text = await geminiCall(prompt, "analysis");
6754 |  129 |   let raw = text.trim();
6755 |  130 |   const fm = raw.match(/```(?:json)?\s*([\s\S]*?)```/);
6756 |  131 |   if (fm) raw = fm[1].trim();
6757 |  132 |   const s0 = raw.indexOf("{"), e0 = raw.lastIndexOf("}");
6758 |  133 |   if (s0 === -1 || e0 === -1) throw new Error("No JSON in response");
6759 |  134 |   raw = raw.slice(s0, e0 + 1);
6760 |  135 |   try { return JSON.parse(raw); }
6761 |  136 |   catch (_) {
6762 |  137 |     // best-effort repair for truncated responses
6763 |  138 |     let s = raw.replace(/,\s*$/, "");
6764 |  139 |     const opens = [];
6765 |  140 |     for (const ch of s) {
6766 |  141 |       if (ch === "{" || ch === "[") opens.push(ch === "{" ? "}" : "]");
6767 |  142 |       else if (ch === "}" || ch === "]") opens.pop();
6768 |  143 |     }
6769 |  144 |     return JSON.parse(s + opens.reverse().join(""));
6770 |  145 |   }
6771 |  146 | }

6810 |    4 | 
6811 |    5 | // Maps React onboarding userData â†’ the field codes dashboard.html expects
6812 |    6 | function buildPrefill(userData) {
6813 |    7 |   const SECTOR_MAP = {
6814 |    8 |     "HealthTech": "HC", "EdTech": "ED", "FinTech": "FS",
6815 |    9 |     "AgriTech": "AG", "CleanTech": "EN", "B2B SaaS": "IT",
6816 |   10 |     "D2C / Consumer": "EC", "Logistics / Supply Chain": "LG",
6817 |   11 |     "HR Tech": "IT", "LegalTech": "OT", "PropTech": "RE",
6818 |   12 |     "Manufacturing / DeepTech": "MF", "Media / Content": "ME",
6819 |   13 |     "RetailTech": "EC", "GovTech": "OT", "Other": "OT",
6820 |   14 |   };
6821 |   15 |   const ROLE_BIZ_TYPE_MAP = {
6822 |   16 |     "Founder / Co-Founder": "B2B_SME", "CEO / MD": "B2B_ENT",
6823 |   17 |     "CTO / CPO": "B2B_SME", "CMO / VP Marketing": "B2C_MASS",
6824 |   18 |     "Business Development": "B2B_SME", "Product Manager": "B2B_SME",
6825 |   19 |     "Investor / VC": "B2B_ENT", "Consultant / Advisor": "B2B_SME", "Other": "B2B_SME",
6826 |   20 |   };
6827 |   21 |   const GEO_MAP = {
6828 |   22 |     PI: "PI", SA: "SA", SE: "SE", MEA: "MEA", EU: "EU", NA: "NA", GL: "GL",
6829 |   23 |   };
6830 |   24 | 
6831 |   25 |   return {
6832 |   26 |     organization: userData.organization,
6833 |   27 |     sectorCode: SECTOR_MAP[userData.sector] || "OT",
6834 |   28 |     bizTypeCode: ROLE_BIZ_TYPE_MAP[userData.role] || "B2B_SME",
6835 |   29 |     geoCode: GEO_MAP[userData.geography] || "PI",
6836 |   30 |     problem: userData.problem,
6837 |   31 |     stage: userData.stage,
6838 |   32 |   };
6839 |   33 | }
6840 |   34 | 
6841 |   35 | const LOADER_STEPS = [
6842 |   36 |   { n: 1, msg: "Reading your inputsâ€¦", pct: 8 },
6843 |   37 |   { n: 2, msg: "Searching live market data & sector sizingâ€¦", pct: 25 },
6844 |   38 |   { n: 3, msg: "Fetching real-time competitor profiles & funding dataâ€¦", pct: 48 },
6845 |   39 |   { n: 4, msg: "Calculating TAM/SAM/SOM, scores & 12-month projectionsâ€¦", pct: 75 },
6846 |   40 |   { n: 5, msg: "Assembling your market intelligence dashboardâ€¦", pct: 95 },
6847 |   41 | ];
6848 |   42 | 
6849 |   43 | export default function AssessmentAndDashboard({ userData, onRestart }) {
6850 |   44 |   const iframeRef = useRef(null);
6851 |   45 |   const prefillSentRef = useRef(false);
6852 |   46 | 
6853 |   47 |   function postToIframe(msg) {
6854 |   48 |     iframeRef.current?.contentWindow?.postMessage(msg, "*");
6855 |   49 |   }
6856 |   50 | 
6857 |   51 |   async function handleSubmit(fd) {
6858 |   52 |     // Drive the loader steps in the iframe
6859 |   53 |     for (const s of LOADER_STEPS) {
6860 |   54 |       postToIframe({ type: "INFOPACE_LOADER_STEP", step: s.n, msg: s.msg, pct: s.pct });
6861 |   55 |       await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, s.n === 3 ? 150 : 300));
6862 |   56 |     }
6863 |   57 | 
6864 |   58 |     try {
6865 |   59 |       const result = await generateAnalysis(userData, fd.answers || {});
6866 |   60 | 
6867 |   61 |       // Save to Supabase (non-blocking)
6868 |   62 |       saveSubmission({ userData, answers: fd.answers || {}, result })
6869 |   63 |         .catch(e => console.warn("DB save failed:", e.message));
6870 |   64 | 
6871 |   65 |       // Send result to iframe to render the dashboard
6872 |   66 |       postToIframe({ type: "INFOPACE_RENDER", fd, analysis: result });
6873 |   67 | 
6874 |   68 |     } catch (err) {
6875 |   69 |       console.error("Analysis failed:", err);
6876 |   70 |       // Let iframe show error via its own fallback
6877 |   71 |       postToIframe({ type: "INFOPACE_LOADER_STEP", step: 5, msg: "Running offline analysisâ€¦", pct: 95 });
6878 |   72 |       setTimeout(() => {
6879 |   73 |         // Trigger iframe's own offline fallback by sending empty analysis
6880 |   74 |         postToIframe({ type: "INFOPACE_RENDER", fd, analysis: {} });
6881 |   75 |       }, 800);
6882 |   76 |     }
6883 |   77 |   }
6884 |   78 | 
6885 |   79 |   useEffect(() => {
6886 |   80 |     function handleMessage(event) {
6887 |   81 |       if (!event.data) return;
6888 |   82 | 
6889 |   83 |       // Iframe loaded â€” send prefill data
6890 |   84 |       if (event.data.type === "INFOPACE_LOADED") {
6891 |   85 |         if (!prefillSentRef.current) {
6892 |   86 |           prefillSentRef.current = true;
6893 |   87 |           const prefill = buildPrefill(userData);
6894 |   88 |           postToIframe({ type: "INFOPACE_PREFILL", userData: prefill });
6895 |   89 |         }
6896 |   90 |       }
6897 |   91 | 
6898 |   92 |       // User clicked "Generate Dashboard" â€” run analysis
6899 |   93 |       if (event.data.type === "INFOPACE_SUBMIT") {
6900 |   94 |         handleSubmit(event.data.fd);
6901 |   95 |       }
6902 |   96 | 
6903 |   97 |       // "New Assessment" clicked inside dashboard
6904 |   98 |       if (event.data.type === "INFOPACE_RESET") {
6905 |   99 |         onRestart();
6906 |  100 |       }
6907 |  101 |     }
6908 |  102 | 
6909 |  103 |     window.addEventListener("message", handleMessage);
6910 |  104 |     return () => window.removeEventListener("message", handleMessage);
6911 |  105 |   }, [userData]);
6912 |  106 | 
6913 |  107 |   return (
6914 |  108 |     <iframe
6915 |  109 |       ref={iframeRef}
6916 |  110 |       src="/dashboard.html"
6917 |  111 |       style={{ position: "fixed", inset: 0, border: "none", width: "100%", height: "100%" }}
6918 |  112 |       title="Infopace Assessment"
6919 |  113 |       sandbox="allow-scripts allow-same-origin allow-popups allow-downloads"
6920 |  114 |     />
6921 |  115 |   );
6922 |  116 | }
6923 |  117 |

6950 |   23 |   const [form, setForm] = useState({
6951 |   24 |     name: "", email: "", phone: "", organization: "", role: "",
6952 |   25 |     website: "", linkedin: "", teamSize: "",
6953 |   26 |     sector: "", geography: "", problem: "", stage: "",
6954 |   27 |   });
6955 |   28 |   const [errors, setErrors] = useState({});
6956 |   29 | 
6957 |   30 |   const set = (k, v) => setForm((f) => ({ ...f, [k]: v }));
6958 |   31 |   const err = (k, msg) => setErrors((e) => ({ ...e, [k]: msg }));
6959 |   32 |   const clearErr = (k) => setErrors((e) => { const n = { ...e }; delete n[k]; return n; });
6960 |   33 | 
6961 |   34 |   function validateStep1() {
6962 |   35 |     let ok = true;
6963 |   36 |     if (!form.name.trim()) { err("name", "Required"); ok = false; }
6964 |   37 |     if (!form.email.match(/^[^\s@]+@[^\s@]+\.[^\s@]+$/)) { err("email", "Valid email required"); ok = false; }
6965 |   38 |     if (!form.phone.match(/^\+?[\d\s\-]{8,}$/)) { err("phone", "Valid phone required"); ok = false; }
6966 |   39 |     if (!form.organization.trim()) { err("organization", "Required"); ok = false; }
6967 |   40 |     if (!form.role) { err("role", "Required"); ok = false; }
6968 |   41 |     return ok;
6969 |   42 |   }
6970 |   43 | 
6971 |   44 |   function validateStep2() {
6972 |   45 |     let ok = true;
6973 |   46 |     if (!form.sector) { err("sector", "Required"); ok = false; }
6974 |   47 |     if (!form.geography) { err("geography", "Required"); ok = false; }
6975 |   48 |     if (!form.problem.trim() || form.problem.trim().length < 20) { err("problem", "Please describe in at least 20 characters"); ok = false; }
6976 |   49 |     if (!form.stage) { err("stage", "Required"); ok = false; }
6977 |   50 |     return ok;
6978 |   51 |   }
6979 |   52 | 
6980 |   53 |   const handleNext = () => {
6981 |   54 |     setErrors({});
6982 |   55 |     if (step === 1 && validateStep1()) setStep(2);
6983 |   56 |     else if (step === 2 && validateStep2()) onComplete(form);
6984 |   57 |   };
6985 |   58 |

6989 |   62 |     ${errors[k] ? "border-red-400 bg-red-50" : "border-[#D6DFED]"}`;

6991 |   64 |   return (

6993 |   66 |       {/* Topbar */}
6994 |   67 |       <div className="sticky top-0 z-50 bg-[#00338D] h-12 flex items-center justify-between px-6 shadow-lg">
6995 |   68 |         <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
6996 |   69 |           <div className="w-8 h-8 bg-[#0091DA] rounded flex items-center justify-center font-mono font-bold text-xs text-white">IP</div>

7219 | ------------------------------------------------------------
7220 | FILE: supabase_setup.sql
7221 | ------------------------------------------------------------
7222 |    1 | -- ================================================================
7223 |    2 | --  Infopace â€” Supabase Database Setup
7224 |    3 | --  Run this entire file in: Supabase â†’ SQL Editor â†’ Run
7225 |    4 | -- ================================================================
7226 |    5 | 
7227 |    6 | -- 1. Create the submissions table
7228 |    7 | create table if not exists public.submissions (
7229 |    8 |   id            uuid        default gen_random_uuid() primary key,
7230 |    9 |   name          text        not null,
7231 |   10 |   email         text        not null,
7232 |   11 |   phone         text,
7233 |   12 |   organization  text,
7234 |   13 |   role          text,
7235 |   14 |   website       text,
7236 |   15 |   linkedin      text,
7237 |   16 |   team_size     text,
7238 |   17 |   sector        text,
7239 |   18 |   geography     text,
7240 |   19 |   problem       text,
7241 |   20 |   stage         text,
7242 |   21 |   answers       jsonb,
7243 |   22 |   overall_score integer,
7244 |   23 |   grade         text,
7245 |   24 |   dimensions    jsonb,
7246 |   25 |   analysis_json jsonb,
7247 |   26 |   created_at    timestamptz default now()
7248 |   27 | );
7249 |   28 | 
7250 |   29 | -- 2. Enable Row Level Security
7251 |   30 | alter table public.submissions enable row level security;
7252 |   31 | 
7253 |   32 | -- 3. Policy: anyone can INSERT (submit assessment)
7254 |   33 | create policy "Allow public inserts"
7255 |   34 |   on public.submissions
7256 |   35 |   for insert
7257 |   36 |   with check (true);
7258 |   37 | 
7259 |   38 | -- 4. Policy: anyone can SELECT (view results in-app)
7260 |   39 | --    Tighten this later if you add auth
7261 |   40 | create policy "Allow public reads"
7262 |   41 |   on public.submissions
7263 |   42 |   for select
7264 |   43 |   using (true);
7265 |   44 | 
7266 |   45 | -- 5. Optional: index on email for fast lookups
7267 |   46 | create index if not exists submissions_email_idx
7268 |   47 |   on public.submissions (email);
7269 |   48 | 
7270 |   49 | -- 6. Optional: index on created_at for dashboard sorting
7271 |   50 | create index if not exists submissions_created_at_idx
7272 |   51 |   on public.submissions (created_at desc);
7273 |   52 | 
7274 |   53 | -- ================================================================
7275 |   54 | --  DONE. You should see the `submissions` table in Table Editor.
7276 |   55 | -- ================================================================

 763 | Chart.register(ChartDataLabels);

 770 | const rga=(h,a)=>{const r=parseInt(h.slice(1,3),16),g=parseInt(h.slice(3,5),16),b=parseInt(h.slice(5,7),16);return `rgba(${r},${g},${b},${a})`;};

 794 | function goTo(s){
 795 |   document.querySelectorAll('.sec').forEach(x=>x.classList.remove('active'));
 796 |   document.getElementById('sec'+s).classList.add('active');
 797 |   for(let i=0;i<9;i++){const b=document.getElementById('sb'+i);if(!b)continue;b.classList.remove('active','done');if(i<s)b.classList.add('done');}
 798 |   document.getElementById('sb'+s).classList.add('active');
 799 |   step=s;
 800 |   document.getElementById('prevBtn').style.visibility=s===0?'hidden':'visible';
 801 |   document.getElementById('nextBtn').textContent=s===8?'Generate Dashboard â†’':'Next â†’';
 802 |   document.getElementById('nextBtn').className=s===8?'btn btn-go':'btn btn-primary';
 803 |   document.getElementById('slbl').textContent=`Step ${s+1} of 9`;
 804 |   document.getElementById('progBar').style.width=((s+1)/9*100)+'%';
 805 | }

 807 | function navigate(d){
 808 |   const n=step+d;
 809 |   if(n<0)return;
 810 |   if(n>8){buildDashboard();return;}
 811 |   if(step===0&&n===1&&ctxReady()){
 812 |     generateAIQuestions().then(()=>goTo(1));
 813 |   }else{
 814 |     goTo(n);
 815 |   }
 816 | }

 824 |   else{tag.textContent='All Sectors';tag.classList.remove('active');}

 827 | 
 828 | /* â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•
 829 |    LIVE SCORING
 830 | â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â• */
 831 | function calcLive(){
 832 |   // â”€â”€ Step 0 context fields â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
 833 |   const hasSector  = document.getElementById('sector').value?1:0;
 834 |   const hasBizType = document.getElementById('bizType').value?1:0;
 835 |   const hasGeo     = document.getElementById('geo').value?1:0;
 836 |   const probLen    = document.getElementById('problem').value.length;
 837 |   const probScore  = probLen>120?5:probLen>60?3:probLen>20?1:0;
 838 |   const stageVal   = +(document.querySelector('#stagePills .pill.on')?.dataset.val)||0;
 839 | 
 840 |   // Only score if context is filled
 841 |   const contextFilled = hasSector&&hasBizType&&hasGeo;
 842 | 
 843 |   // â”€â”€ Read actual selected values from AI questions â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
 844 |   // Each select has data-w (weight) and returns v (1-5)
 845 |   // We track which section each question belongs to via ID prefix
 846 |   const selScores={d1:[],d2:[],d3:[],d4:[],d5:[],d6:[]};
 847 | 
 848 |   // Map question IDs to dimensions
 849 |   // s1=Market Size(d1), s2=Audience(d2), s3=Competition(d3),
 850 |   // s4=Revenue(d4), s5=Risk(d5), s6=GTM(d4), s7=PMF(d2), s8=SectorFit(d6)
 851 |   const dimMap={'s1':'d1','s2':'d2','s3':'d3','s4':'d4','s5':'d5','s6':'d4','s7':'d2','s8':'d6','f1':'d1','f2':'d2','f3':'d3','f4':'d4','f5':'d5','f6':'d4','f7':'d2','f8':'d6'};
 852 | 
 853 |   document.querySelectorAll('.ai-sel').forEach(el=>{
 854 |     if(!el.value)return;
 855 |     const v=+(el.value)||0;          // actual selected value 1-5
 856 |     const w=+(el.dataset.w)||2;      // weight of this question
 857 |     const prefix=el.id.replace(/q\d+$/,'').replace(/^s/,'s').slice(0,2); // e.g. s1, s2
 858 |     const dim=dimMap[prefix]||dimMap[el.id.slice(0,2)]||'d1';
 859 |     (selScores[dim]=selScores[dim]||[]).push({v,w});
 860 |   });
 861 | 
 862 |   document.querySelectorAll('.ai-pills').forEach(grp=>{
 863 |     const on=grp.querySelector('.pill.on');
 864 |     if(!on)return;
 865 |     const v=+(on.dataset.val)||3;
 866 |     const id=grp.id||'';
 867 |     const prefix=id.slice(0,2);
 868 |     const dim=dimMap[prefix]||'d1';
 869 |     (selScores[dim]=selScores[dim]||[]).push({v,w:2});
 870 |   });
 871 | 
 872 |   document.querySelectorAll('.ai-chk:checked').forEach(el=>{
 873 |     const section=el.closest('.sec');
 874 |     const secId=section?.id||'sec1';
 875 |     const secNum=+secId.replace('sec','')||1;
 876 |     const dimKeys=['d1','d2','d3','d4','d5','d4','d2','d6'];
 877 |     const dim=dimKeys[secNum-1]||'d6';
 878 |     (selScores[dim]=selScores[dim]||[]).push({v:4,w:1}); // checkboxes = moderate positive
 879 |   });
 880 | 
 881 |   // â”€â”€ Calculate each dimension score (0-100) â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
 882 |   function dimScore(key){
 883 |     const items=selScores[key]||[];
 884 |     if(!items.length)return null; // not yet answered
 885 |     const totalW=items.reduce((s,i)=>s+i.w,0);
 886 |     const weighted=items.reduce((s,i)=>s+(i.v*i.w),0);
 887 |     // weighted average on 1-5 scale â†’ convert to 0-100
 888 |     return Math.round(((weighted/totalW)-1)/4*100);
 889 |   }
 890 | 
 891 |   const d1=dimScore('d1'); // Market Size
 892 |   const d2=dimScore('d2'); // Audience Quality
 893 |   const d3=dimScore('d3'); // Competition Edge
 894 |   const d4=dimScore('d4'); // Revenue Potential
 895 |   const d5=dimScore('d5'); // Risk Profile
 896 |   const d6=dimScore('d6'); // Sector Fit
 897 | 
 898 |   // â”€â”€ Context bonus (filling basics) â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
 899 |   // Max 15 points for context â€” NOT for just having a sector selected
 900 |   const contextBonus=contextFilled?(hasSector*3+hasBizType*3+hasGeo*2+probScore+Math.min(stageVal,5)):0;
 901 | 
 902 |   // â”€â”€ Overall score = weighted average of dims + context â”€
 903 |   // Dims that haven't been answered yet are excluded from average
 904 |   const answeredDims=[d1,d2,d3,d4,d5,d6].filter(v=>v!==null);
 905 |   let overall=0;
 906 |   if(!contextFilled||answeredDims.length===0){
 907 |     // Nothing meaningful answered â€” score is 0
 908 |     overall=0;
 909 |   } else {
 910 |     // Weighted: competition(d3) and revenue(d4) matter most
 911 |     const weights=[15,20,25,25,10,5]; // d1 d2 d3 d4 d5 d6
 912 |     const allDims=[d1,d2,d3,d4,d5,d6];
 913 |     let wSum=0, wTotal=0;
 914 |     allDims.forEach((v,i)=>{
 915 |       if(v!==null){wSum+=v*weights[i];wTotal+=weights[i];}
 916 |     });
 917 |     const dimAvg=wTotal>0?wSum/wTotal:0;
 918 | 
 919 |     // Context bonus adds up to 15 points on top of dim average
 920 |     // But only if at least 2 sections answered
 921 |     const bonus=answeredDims.length>=2?Math.round(contextBonus/15*15):0;
 922 |     overall=Math.min(100,Math.round(dimAvg*0.85+bonus));
 923 | 
 924 |     // Penalty: if less than 3 sections answered, cap score at 60
 925 |     if(answeredDims.length<3)overall=Math.min(overall,60);
 926 |     // Penalty: if problem statement too short, cap at 70
 927 |     if(probLen<40&&overall>70)overall=70;
 928 |   }
 929 | 
 930 |   // â”€â”€ Update UI â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
 931 |   const lsEl=document.getElementById('liveScore');
 932 |   const lgEl=document.getElementById('liveGrade');
 933 |   if(overall===0){
 934 |     lsEl.textContent='0';lsEl.className='big-sc sc-zero';
 935 |     lgEl.textContent='Fill in the form';lgEl.style.color='#9BAABB';
 936 |     document.getElementById('topScoreWrap').style.display='none';
 937 |     // Reset dim bars
 938 |     ['bf1','bf2','bf3','bf4','bf5','bf6'].forEach(id=>{const el=document.getElementById(id);if(el)el.style.width='0%';});
 939 |     ['d1lbl','d2lbl','d3lbl','d4lbl','d5lbl','d6lbl'].forEach(id=>{const el=document.getElementById(id);if(el)el.textContent='â€”';});
 940 |     return;
 941 |   }
 942 |   lsEl.textContent=overall;
 943 |   if(overall>=70){lsEl.className='big-sc sc-high';lgEl.textContent='High Potential âœ“';lgEl.style.color='#00A3A1';}
 944 |   else if(overall>=45){lsEl.className='big-sc sc-mid';lgEl.textContent='Moderate Potential';lgEl.style.color='#E8A000';}
 945 |   else{lsEl.className='big-sc sc-low';lgEl.textContent='Needs Strengthening';lgEl.style.color='#C8002D';}
 946 | 
 947 |   document.getElementById('topScoreWrap').style.display='flex';
 948 |   document.getElementById('topScore').textContent=overall+'/100';
 949 | 
 950 |   // â”€â”€ Update individual dimension bars â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
 951 |   const dimVals=[d1,d2,d3,d4,d5,d6];
 952 |   const dimColors=['#00338D','#0091DA','#E8A000','#005EB8','#6D2077','#00A3A1'];
 953 |   ['bf1','bf2','bf3','bf4','bf5','bf6'].forEach((id,i)=>{
 954 |     const el=document.getElementById(id);
 955 |     if(!el)return;
 956 |     const v=dimVals[i];
 957 |     el.style.width=(v!==null?v:0)+'%';
 958 |     el.style.background=dimColors[i];
 959 |   });
 960 |   ['d1lbl','d2lbl','d3lbl','d4lbl','d5lbl','d6lbl'].forEach((id,i)=>{
 961 |     const el=document.getElementById(id);
 962 |     if(!el)return;
 963 |     const v=dimVals[i];
 964 |     el.textContent=v!==null?v+'/100':'â€”';
 965 |   });
 966 | 
 967 |   buildLiveInsights(overall,{d1,d2,d3,d4,d5,d6});
 968 | }
 969 | 
 970 | function buildLiveInsights(t,dims){
 971 |   const sec=document.getElementById('sector').value;
 972 |   const geo=document.getElementById('geo').value;
 973 |   const items=[];
 974 |   dims=dims||{};
 975 | 
 976 |   // Score-based headline
 977 |   if(t>=70)items.push('Strong overall market potential â€” fundamentals solid across answered dimensions.');
 978 |   else if(t>=50)items.push('Moderate potential â€” see which dimensions below need strengthening.');
 979 |   else if(t>=30)items.push('Several dimensions are weak â€” fill more steps to get precise guidance.');
 980 |   else if(t>0)items.push('Early stage â€” complete all 9 steps for a full and accurate score.');
 981 | 
 982 |   // Dimension-specific insights â€” only shown when that dim is answered
 983 |   const dimNames={d1:'Market Size',d2:'Audience Quality',d3:'Competition Edge',d4:'Revenue Potential',d5:'Risk Profile',d6:'Sector Fit'};
 984 |   const weakDims=Object.entries(dims).filter(([,v])=>v!==null&&v<45).sort((a,b)=>a[1]-b[1]);
 985 |   const strongDims=Object.entries(dims).filter(([,v])=>v!==null&&v>=70).sort((a,b)=>b[1]-a[1]);
 986 | 
 987 |   if(weakDims.length>0){

1051 | async function generateAIQuestions(){
1052 |   const sEl=document.getElementById('sector');
1053 |   const tEl=document.getElementById('bizType');
1054 |   const gEl=document.getElementById('geo');
1055 |   const sector=sEl.options[sEl.selectedIndex].text;
1056 |   const bizType=tEl.options[tEl.selectedIndex].text;
1057 |   const geo=gEl.options[gEl.selectedIndex].text;
1058 |   const problem=document.getElementById('problem').value||'Not specified';
1059 |   const bizName=document.getElementById('bizName').value||'the product';
1060 |   const stage=document.querySelector('#stagePills .pill.on')?.textContent||'Not specified';
1061 | 
1062 |   // Show skeletons while loading
1063 |   [1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8].forEach(i=>{
1064 |     const el=document.getElementById('q'+i);
1065 |     if(el)el.innerHTML='<div class="ql-skeleton"><div class="ql-skel-item"></div><div class="ql-skel-item"></div><div class="ql-skel-item"></div></div>';
1066 |   });
1067 | 
1068 |   try{
1069 |     // Retry with long wait for Gemini 429 rate limits (free tier = 15 req/min)
1070 |     const fetchWithRetry=async(url,opts,maxTries=2)=>{
1071 |       for(let attempt=1;attempt<=maxTries;attempt++){
1072 |         const r=await fetch(url,opts);
1073 |         if(r.status===429||r.status===529){
1074 |           if(attempt===maxTries) return r;
1075 |           const wait=62000; // Gemini free tier resets every 60s â€” wait 62s
1076 |           [1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8].forEach(i=>{
1077 |             const el=document.getElementById('q'+i);
1078 |             if(el)el.innerHTML=`<div style="padding:16px;font-size:12px;color:#627289;text-align:center">â³ Rate limit reached â€” waiting 62s for Gemini free tier resetâ€¦<br><br><span style="font-size:10px;color:#9BAABB">(Free tier: 15 requests/min. This is normal.)</span></div>`;
1079 |           });
1080 |           // Countdown display
1081 |           let remaining=62;
1082 |           const timer=setInterval(()=>{
1083 |             remaining--;
1084 |             [1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8].forEach(i=>{
1085 |               const el=document.getElementById('q'+i);
1086 |               if(el)el.innerHTML=`<div style="padding:16px;font-size:12px;color:#627289;text-align:center">â³ Rate limit â€” retrying in <strong style="color:#00338D">${remaining}s</strong>â€¦<br><br><span style="font-size:10px;color:#9BAABB">Gemini free tier resets every 60 seconds.</span></div>`;
1087 |             });
1088 |             if(remaining<=0)clearInterval(timer);
1089 |           },1000);
1090 |           await new Promise(res=>setTimeout(res,wait));
1091 |           clearInterval(timer);
1092 |           continue;
1093 |         }
1094 |         if(r.status>=500&&attempt<maxTries){
1095 |           await new Promise(res=>setTimeout(res,3000));
1096 |           continue;
1097 |         }
1098 |         return r;
1099 |       }
1100 |     };
1101 | 
1102 |     const _KEY='USE_SERVER_KEY';
1103 |     const resp=await fetchWithRetry('/api',{

1105 |       headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},

1137 | 
1138 |     // Strip any markdown fences the model may have added
1139 |     let raw=allText.trim();
1140 |     const fenceMatch=raw.match(/```(?:json)?\s*([\s\S]*?)```/);
1141 |     if(fenceMatch) raw=fenceMatch[1].trim();
1142 | 
1143 |     // Find the outermost { â€¦ } â€” handles leading prose
1144 |     const start=raw.indexOf('{');
1145 |     const end=raw.lastIndexOf('}');
1146 |     if(start===-1||end===-1) throw new Error('No JSON object found in response');
1147 |     raw=raw.slice(start,end+1);
1148 | 
1149 |     // Attempt parse; on failure try to repair truncated JSON
1150 |     let parsed;
1151 |     try{
1152 |       parsed=JSON.parse(raw);
1153 |     }catch(parseErr){
1154 |       // Repair: truncate to last complete section by finding last complete "}]}" pattern
1155 |       const repaired=repairTruncatedJSON(raw);
1156 |       parsed=JSON.parse(repaired);
1157 |     }
1158 | 
1159 |     aiQs=parsed;
1160 |     if(aiQs.sb8txt)document.getElementById('sb8txt').textContent=aiQs.sb8txt;
1161 |     if(aiQs.d6name)document.getElementById('d6name').textContent=aiQs.d6name;
1162 |     if(aiQs.realTimeData)window._rtData=aiQs.realTimeData;
1163 | 
1164 |     if(!Array.isArray(aiQs.sections)||aiQs.sections.length===0) throw new Error('No sections in parsed JSON');
1165 |     aiQs.sections.forEach((sec,i)=>renderSection(i+1,sec));
1166 | 
1167 |   }catch(e){
1168 |     console.warn('AI question gen failed, using fallback:',e.message);
1169 |     useFallbackQuestions(sector,bizType,geo);
1170 |   }
1171 | }
1172 | 
1173 | /* Repair a truncated JSON string by closing any open structures */
1174 | function repairTruncatedJSON(s){
1175 |   // Walk the string tracking depth; truncate at last complete top-level section
1176 |   // Strategy: find the last occurrence of "}]}" or "}]," and close from there
1177 |   let best=s;
1178 |   // Try progressively shorter slices to find parseable JSON
1179 |   for(let i=s.length-1;i>s.length*0.4;i--){
1180 |     const c=s[i];
1181 |     if(c==='}'){
1182 |       try{
1183 |         const candidate=closeJSON(s.slice(0,i+1));
1184 |         JSON.parse(candidate);
1185 |         best=candidate;
1186 |         break;
1187 |       }catch(_){}
1188 |     }
1189 |   }
1190 |   return best;
1191 | }
1192 | 
1193 | function closeJSON(s){
1194 |   // Count open brackets/braces
1195 |   let depth=0; const stack=[];
1196 |   for(const c of s){
1197 |     if(c==='{'){stack.push('}');}
1198 |     else if(c==='['){stack.push(']');}
1199 |     else if(c==='}'||c===']'){stack.pop();}
1200 |   }
1201 |   // Close any trailing comma before we close
1202 |   let result=s.replace(/,\s*$/,'');
1203 |   return result+stack.reverse().join('');
1204 | }
1205 | 
1206 | function renderSection(idx,sec){
1207 |   const el=document.getElementById('q'+idx);
1208 |   if(!el||!sec)return;
1209 |   let html=`<div class="sec-hd"><div class="sec-icon">${sec.icon||'ðŸ“‹'}</div><div><div class="sec-ttl">${sec.title}</div><div class="sec-sub">${sec.subtitle||''}</div></div></div><div class="fg">`;
1210 |   (sec.questions||[]).forEach(q=>{
1211 |     const wide=q.type==='checks'||q.type==='textarea';
1212 |     html+=`<div class="fd ${wide?'s2':''}">`;
1213 |     html+=`<label>${q.label}</label>`;
1214 |     if(q.hint)html+=`<div class="hint">ðŸ’¡ ${q.hint}</div>`;
1215 |     if(q.type==='select'){
1216 |       html+=`<select class="ai-sel" id="${q.id}" data-w="${q.w||2}" onchange="calcLive()"><option value="">Selectâ€¦</option>`;
1217 |       (q.options||[]).forEach(o=>{html+=`<option value="${o.v}">${o.t}</option>`;});
1218 |       html+=`</select>`;
1219 |     }else if(q.type==='pills'){
1220 |       html+=`<div class="pills ai-pills" id="${q.id}_pills">`;
1221 |       (q.options||[]).forEach(o=>{html+=`<span class="pill" data-val="${o.v||3}" onclick="pickAIPill(this)">${o.t}</span>`;});
1222 |       html+=`</div>`;
1223 |     }else if(q.type==='checks'){
1224 |       html+=`<div class="ckg">`;
1225 |       (q.options||[]).forEach(o=>{html+=`<label class="cki"><input type="checkbox" class="ai-chk" onchange="calcLive()"> ${o.t}</label>`;});
1226 |       html+=`</div>`;
1227 |     }else if(q.type==='text'){
1228 |       html+=`<input type="text" class="ai-txt" id="${q.id}" placeholder="${q.placeholder||'Enter valueâ€¦'}" oninput="calcLive()"/>`;
1229 |     }
1230 |     html+=`</div>`;
1231 |   });
1232 |   html+=`</div>`;
1233 |   el.innerHTML=html;
1234 | }

1299 | /* â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•
1300 |    COLLECT FORM DATA
1301 | â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â• */
1302 | function collectData(){
1303 |   const gopt=id=>{const el=document.getElementById(id);return el?.options[el.selectedIndex]?.text||'';};
1304 |   const getv=id=>document.getElementById(id)?.value||'';
1305 |   const answers={};
1306 |   document.querySelectorAll('.ai-sel').forEach(el=>{answers[el.id]=el.options[el.selectedIndex]?.text||'';});
1307 |   document.querySelectorAll('.ai-pills').forEach(grp=>{const on=grp.querySelector('.pill.on');if(on)answers[grp.id]=on.textContent;});
1308 |   document.querySelectorAll('.ai-txt').forEach(el=>{if(el.value)answers[el.id]=el.value;});
1309 |   const chkGroups={};
1310 |   document.querySelectorAll('.ai-chk:checked').forEach(el=>{const g=el.closest('.ckg')?.parentElement?.querySelector('label')?.textContent||'checks';chkGroups[g]=(chkGroups[g]||[]);chkGroups[g].push(el.parentElement.textContent.trim());});
1311 |   Object.assign(answers,chkGroups);
1312 |   return {
1313 |     bizName:getv('bizName')||'Unnamed Business',
1314 |     sector:gopt('sector'),sectorCode:getv('sector'),
1315 |     bizType:gopt('bizType'),bizTypeCode:getv('bizType'),
1316 |     geo:gopt('geo'),geoCode:getv('geo'),
1317 |     problem:getv('problem')||'Not described',
1318 |     stage:document.querySelector('#stagePills .pill.on')?.textContent||'Not specified',
1319 |     answers,
1320 |   };
1321 | }
1322 | 
1323 | /* â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•
1324 |    LOADER
1325 | â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â• */
1326 | function setLoader(n,msg,pct){
1327 |   for(let i=1;i<=5;i++){const el=document.getElementById('ls'+i);if(!el)continue;el.className='ld-step'+(i<n?' done':i===n?' active':'');}
1328 |   document.getElementById('ldStatus').textContent=msg||'';
1329 |   document.getElementById('ldBar').style.width=(pct||0)+'%';
1330 | }
1331 | function showLoader(){document.getElementById('assessShell').style.display='none';document.getElementById('loaderShell').style.display='flex';}
1332 | function hideLoader(){document.getElementById('loaderShell').style.display='none';}
1333 | 
1334 | /* â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•
1335 |    MAIN BUILD
1336 | â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â• */
1337 | async function buildDashboard(){
1338 |   const fd=collectData();
1339 |   showLoader();
1340 |   setLoader(1,'Reading your inputsâ€¦',8);
1341 |   await tick(200);
1342 |   let analysis;
1343 |   try{
1344 |     setLoader(2,`Searching live ${fd.sector} market data in ${fd.geo}â€¦`,25);
1345 |     await tick(150);
1346 |     setLoader(3,'Fetching real-time competitor profiles & funding dataâ€¦',48);
1347 |     analysis=await callAPI(fd);
1348 |     setLoader(4,'Calculating TAM/SAM/SOM, scores & 12-month projectionsâ€¦',75);
1349 |     await tick(300);
1350 |     setLoader(5,'Assembling your market intelligence dashboardâ€¦',95);
1351 |     await tick(400);
1352 |   }catch(e){
1353 |     console.warn('API failed, using fallback:',e.message);
1354 |     setLoader(5,'Running offline analysisâ€¦',95);
1355 |     analysis=offlineAnalysis(fd);
1356 |     await tick(600);
1357 |   }
1358 |   renderDash(fd,analysis);
1359 | }
1360 | const tick=ms=>new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,ms));
1361 |

1366 |   const answersText=Object.entries(fd.answers).map(([k,v])=>`â€¢ ${k}: ${Array.isArray(v)?v.join(', '):v}`).join('\n')||'(form answers not yet filled)';

1466 |   // Exponential backoff helper (shared pattern)
1467 |   const fetchWithRetry=async(url,opts,maxTries=3)=>{
1468 |     for(let attempt=1;attempt<=maxTries;attempt++){
1469 |       const r=await fetch(url,opts);
1470 |       if((r.status===429||r.status===529||r.status>=500)&&attempt<maxTries){
1471 |         await new Promise(res=>setTimeout(res,Math.min(2000*Math.pow(2,attempt-1),16000)));
1472 |         continue;
1473 |       }
1474 |       return r;
1475 |     }
1476 |   };
1477 | 
1478 |   const _KEY2='USE_SERVER_KEY';
1479 |   const resp=await fetchWithRetry('/api',{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify({
1480 |     _type:'analysis',
1481 |     prompt:prompt})});
1482 |   // â”€â”€ Gemini response parsing â”€â”€
1483 |   if(!resp.ok) throw new Error('HTTP '+resp.status);
1484 |   const data=await resp.json();
1485 |   const allText=(data?.candidates?.[0]?.content?.parts||[]).map(p=>p.text||'').join('');
1486 |   if(!allText) throw new Error('Empty API response');
1487 | 
1488 |   // Strip markdown fences
1489 |   let raw=allText.trim();
1490 |   const fm=raw.match(/```(?:json)?\s*([\s\S]*?)```/);
1491 |   if(fm) raw=fm[1].trim();
1492 | 
1493 |   // Find outermost JSON object
1494 |   const s0=raw.indexOf('{'), e0=raw.lastIndexOf('}');
1495 |   if(s0===-1||e0===-1) throw new Error('No JSON in response');
1496 |   raw=raw.slice(s0,e0+1);
1497 | 
1498 |   // Parse with truncation repair fallback
1499 |   let parsed;
1500 |   try{ parsed=JSON.parse(raw); }
1501 |   catch(_){
1502 |     try{ parsed=JSON.parse(repairTruncatedJSON(raw)); }
1503 |     catch(e2){ throw new Error('JSON parse failed: '+e2.message); }
1504 |   }

1671 | /* â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•

1674 | function renderDash(fd,a){
1675 |   const biz=fd.bizName;
1676 |   dd={fd,a};
1677 | 
1678 |   /* â”€â”€ Header â”€â”€ */
1679 |   const scoreCol=a.overallScore>=55?'#7FDEBD':a.overallScore>=40?'#F5C842':'#FF8080';
1680 |   document.getElementById('dhTitle').textContent=`${biz} Â· Market Potential Assessment`;
1681 |   const liveTag=a.realTimeInsight?' Â· ðŸŸ¢ AI-Powered Live Data':' Â· ðŸŸ¡ Offline Estimate';
1682 |   document.getElementById('dhSub').textContent=`${fd.sector} Â· ${fd.bizType} Â· ${fd.geo}${liveTag} Â· Infopace Management Pvt Ltd`;
1683 |   // Smart merge: use AI data where present, fill gaps from offline fallback
1684 |   // This means real Gemini data is always shown, nothing is silently replaced
1685 |   const offline=offlineAnalysis(fd);
1686 |   const merge=(aiVal,fbVal)=>(aiVal!==undefined&&aiVal!==null&&aiVal!=='')?aiVal:fbVal;
1687 | 
1688 |   a.tamCrore    = merge(a.tamCrore,    offline.tamCrore);
1689 |   a.samCrore    = merge(a.samCrore,    offline.samCrore);
1690 |   a.somCrore    = merge(a.somCrore,    offline.somCrore);
1691 |   a.overallScore= merge(a.overallScore,offline.overallScore);
1692 |   a.growthRate  = merge(a.growthRate,  offline.growthRate);
1693 |   a.grade       = merge(a.grade,       offline.grade);
1694 |   a.verdict     = merge(a.verdict,     offline.verdict);
1695 |   a.keyInsights = (Array.isArray(a.keyInsights)&&a.keyInsights.length)?a.keyInsights:offline.keyInsights;
1696 |   a.topRisks    = (Array.isArray(a.topRisks)&&a.topRisks.length)?a.topRisks:offline.topRisks;
1697 |   a.quickWins   = (Array.isArray(a.quickWins)&&a.quickWins.length)?a.quickWins:offline.quickWins;
1698 |   a.popups      = (a.popups&&Object.keys(a.popups).length)?a.popups:offline.popups;
1699 |   a.geoRegions  = a.geoRegions||offline.geoRegions||null;
1700 |   a.dimensions  = (a.dimensions&&a.dimensions.marketSize)?a.dimensions:offline.dimensions;
1701 |   a.marketShare = (Array.isArray(a.marketShare)&&a.marketShare.length>2)?a.marketShare:offline.marketShare;
1702 |   a.competitorRadar = (Array.isArray(a.competitorRadar)&&a.competitorRadar.length>1)?a.competitorRadar:offline.competitorRadar;
1703 |   a.trendData   = (a.trendData&&Array.isArray(a.trendData.series)&&a.trendData.series.length>2)?a.trendData:offline.trendData;
1704 |   a.revenueByRegion = (a.revenueByRegion&&Array.isArray(a.revenueByRegion.labels)&&a.revenueByRegion.labels[0]!=='Region 1'&&a.revenueByRegion.labels[0]!=='Region1')?a.revenueByRegion:offline.revenueByRegion;
1705 |   a.competitorProfiles = (Array.isArray(a.competitorProfiles)&&a.competitorProfiles.length)?a.competitorProfiles:offline.competitorProfiles;
1706 | 
1707 |   // Log what came from AI vs fallback for debugging
1708 |   const aiFields=Object.keys(a).filter(k=>a[k]!==undefined);
1709 |   console.log('Dashboard data sources â€” AI fields used:', aiFields.length);
1710 |   document.getElementById('dhTam').textContent=`â‚¹${Math.round(a.tamCrore)}Cr`;
1711 |   document.getElementById('dhSam').textContent=`â‚¹${Math.round(a.samCrore)}Cr`;
1712 |   if(document.getElementById('dhSom'))document.getElementById('dhSom').textContent=`â‚¹${Math.round(a.somCrore)}Cr`;
1713 |   document.getElementById('dhScore').textContent=`${a.overallScore}/100`;
1714 |   document.getElementById('dhScore').style.color=scoreCol;
1715 |   document.getElementById('dhBadge').textContent=`â†‘ ${a.growthRate}% CAGR Â· ${a.grade}`;
1716 |   document.getElementById('dhBadge').style.color=scoreCol;
1717 |   document.getElementById('tmTam').textContent=`â‚¹${Math.round(a.tamCrore)}Cr`;
1718 |   document.getElementById('tmScore').textContent=`${a.overallScore}/100`;
1719 |   document.getElementById('tmGrowth').textContent=`+${a.growthRate}%`;
1720 | 
1721 |   /* destroy old charts */
1722 |   Object.values(dashCharts).forEach(c=>c&&c.destroy&&c.destroy());
1723 |   dashCharts={};
1724 |

2041 |     const mx=validVals.length?Math.max(...validVals):0;
2042 |     const mn=validVals.length?Math.min(...validVals):0;
2043 |     const spread=mx-mn;
2044 |

2417 | function openPop(key){
2418 |   const a=dd.a;if(!a)return;
2419 |   const pi=a.popups||{};
2420 |   const titles={mktshare:'ðŸ¥§ Market Share & TAM Analysis',revregion:'ðŸ“Š Revenue by Region',radar:'ðŸ•¸ï¸ Competitive Intelligence',trend:'ðŸ“ˆ Market Trajectory',geomap:'ðŸ—ºï¸ Geographic Opportunity'};
2421 |   let html='';
2422 |

2424 |   if(a.realTimeInsight){
2425 |     html+=`<div class="pi-block" style="background:#EEF2FB;border-color:#C5D5F5"><div class="pi-lbl" style="color:#0091DA">ðŸ”´ Live Market Data</div><div class="pi-txt">${a.realTimeInsight}</div></div>`;
2426 |   }
2427 |

2429 | 
2430 |   if(key==='mktshare'){

2676 |     // Score gauge â€” clean minimal
2677 |     function scoreGaugeSVG(score,W,H){
2678 |       const cx=W/2, cy=100, R=72, sw=12;
2679 |       const pct=Math.max(0,Math.min(100,score))/100;
2680 |       const arcColor=score>=70?'#10B981':score>=50?'#F59E0B':'#EF4444';
2681 |       const gradId='g'+Math.random().toString(36).slice(2,6);
2682 |       // Arc endpoints: left=180deg, right=0deg, going clockwise (bottom open)
2683 |       const sx=cx-R, sy=cy;
2684 |       const ex=cx+R, ey=cy;
2685 |       const scX=cx+R*Math.cos(Math.PI*(1-pct));
2686 |       const scY=cy-R*Math.sin(Math.PI*pct);
2687 |       const lg=pct>0.5?1:0;
2688 |       // Grade label
2689 |       const grade=score>=70?'Strong':score>=50?'Moderate':'Needs Work';
2690 |       return `<svg width="${W}" height="118" viewBox="0 0 ${W} 118" style="display:block;overflow:visible;">
2691 |         <defs>
2692 |           <linearGradient id="${gradId}" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="0%">
2693 |             <stop offset="0%" stop-color="${arcColor}" stop-opacity="0.4"/>
2694 |             <stop offset="100%" stop-color="${arcColor}"/>
2695 |           </linearGradient>
2696 |         </defs>
2697 |         <!-- Grey track -->
2698 |         <path d="M${sx},${sy} A${R},${R} 0 0,1 ${ex},${ey}"
2699 |               fill="none" stroke="rgba(255,255,255,0.1)" stroke-width="${sw}" stroke-linecap="round"/>
2700 |         <!-- Coloured score arc -->
2701 |         <path d="M${sx},${sy} A${R},${R} 0 ${lg},1 ${scX},${scY}"
2702 |               fill="none" stroke="url(#${gradId})" stroke-width="${sw}" stroke-linecap="round"/>
2703 |         <!-- 0 and 100 end labels -->
2704 |         <text x="${sx-8}" y="${sy+5}" text-anchor="end" font-size="9" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.3)" font-family="'IBM Plex Mono',monospace">0</text>
2705 |         <text x="${ex+8}" y="${ey+5}" text-anchor="start" font-size="9" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.3)" font-family="'IBM Plex Mono',monospace">100</text>
2706 |         <!-- Centre tick at 50 -->
2707 |         <line x1="${cx}" y1="${cy-R-sw/2-2}" x2="${cx}" y2="${cy-R+sw/2+2}" stroke="rgba(255,255,255,0.2)" stroke-width="1.5"/>
2708 |         <text x="${cx}" y="${cy-R-sw/2-6}" text-anchor="middle" font-size="8" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.2)" font-family="'IBM Plex Mono',monospace">50</text>
2709 |         <!-- Needle -->
2710 |         <line x1="${cx}" y1="${cy}" x2="${scX}" y2="${scY}"
2711 |               stroke="rgba(255,255,255,0.7)" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/>
2712 |         <circle cx="${cx}" cy="${cy}" r="5" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.15)" stroke="rgba(255,255,255,0.4)" stroke-width="1"/>
2713 |         <circle cx="${cx}" cy="${cy}" r="2.5" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.8)"/>
2714 |         <!-- Score -->
2715 |         <text x="${cx}" y="${cy-18}" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'IBM Plex Mono',monospace"
2716 |               font-size="34" font-weight="700" fill="${arcColor}">${score}</text>
2717 |         <text x="${cx}" y="${cy-3}" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif"
2718 |               font-size="8.5" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.35)" letter-spacing=".12em">OUT OF 100</text>
2719 |       </svg>`;
2720 |     }
2721 | 
2722 |     // Funnel â€” proper trapezoid shape + side descriptions
2723 |     function funnelSVG(){
2724 |       const tam = +(a.tamCrore)||100;
2725 |       const sam = +(a.samCrore)||30;
2726 |       const som = +(a.somCrore)||5;
2727 |       const fmtV = v => v >= 1000 ? 'â‚¹' + (v/1000).toFixed(1) + 'K Cr' : 'â‚¹' + Math.round(v) + 'Cr';
2728 | 
2729 |       // Layout â€” funnel on left, labels on right
2730 |       const SVG_W = 480;
2731 |       const FW = 200;   // funnel column width
2732 |       const LX = 224;   // label column starts here
2733 |       const SEG = 64;   // height of each segment
2734 |       const GAP = 4;    // gap between segments
2735 |       const SVG_H = SEG * 3 + GAP * 2 + 12;
2736 | 
2737 |       const steps = [
2738 |         {
2739 |           v: tam, l: 'TAM', pct: 100,
2740 |           c: '#1A56B0',
2741 |           title: 'Total Addressable Market',
2742 |           desc: 'The entire market demand for your product category in the target geography.',
2743 |           tw: FW, bw: Math.round(FW * 0.68)
2744 |         },
2745 |         {
2746 |           v: sam, l: 'SAM', pct: Math.round(sam/tam*100),
2747 |           c: '#0891B2',
2748 |           title: 'Serviceable Available Market',
2749 |           desc: 'The segment you can realistically reach with your current model and channels.',
2750 |           tw: Math.round(FW * 0.68), bw: Math.round(FW * 0.38)
2751 |         },
2752 |         {
2753 |           v: som, l: 'SOM', pct: Math.round(som/tam*100),
2754 |           c: '#059669',
2755 |           title: '3-Year Revenue Target',
2756 |           desc: 'Your realistic capture target â€” typically 2-8% of SAM at early stage.',
2757 |           tw: Math.round(FW * 0.38), bw: Math.round(FW * 0.16)
2758 |         }
2759 |       ];
2760 | 
2761 |       const parts = steps.map((s, i) => {
2762 |         const y = 6 + i * (SEG + GAP);
2763 |         const cx = FW / 2;
2764 |         // Trapezoid: top-left, top-right, bottom-right, bottom-left
2765 |         const tlx = cx - s.tw/2, trx = cx + s.tw/2;
2766 |         const blx = cx - s.bw/2, brx = cx + s.bw/2;
2767 |         const path = `M${tlx},${y} L${trx},${y} L${brx},${y+SEG} L${blx},${y+SEG} Z`;
2768 |         const my = y + SEG/2;
2769 | 
2770 |         // Label block on the right
2771 |         const lmy = my;
2772 |         const labelLines = s.desc.match(/.{1,44}(\s|$)/g) || [s.desc];
2773 | 
2774 |         return `
2775 |           <!-- segment ${i} -->
2776 |           <path d="${path}" fill="${s.c}" opacity="0.85"/>
2777 |           <path d="${path}" fill="none" stroke="rgba(255,255,255,0.3)" stroke-width="1.2"/>
2778 |           <!-- value -->
2779 |           <text x="${cx}" y="${my - 9}" text-anchor="middle"
2780 |                 font-family="'IBM Plex Mono',monospace" font-size="15" font-weight="700" fill="#fff">${fmtV(s.v)}</text>
2781 |           <!-- label + pct -->
2782 |           <text x="${cx}" y="${my + 8}" text-anchor="middle"
2783 |                 font-family="'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif" font-size="9" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.8)">${s.l} &nbsp;Â·&nbsp; ${s.pct}% of TAM</text>
2784 |           <!-- connector dot + line -->
2785 |           <circle cx="${FW + 6}" cy="${lmy}" r="4" fill="${s.c}"/>
2786 |           <line x1="${FW + 10}" y1="${lmy}" x2="${LX - 4}" y2="${lmy}" stroke="${s.c}" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-dasharray="3,2"/>
2787 |           <!-- right label -->
2788 |           <text x="${LX}" y="${lmy - 14}" font-family="'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif"
2789 |                 font-size="10" font-weight="700" fill="${s.c}">${s.title}</text>
2790 |           ${labelLines.slice(0,2).map((ln, li) =>
2791 |             `<text x="${LX}" y="${lmy + li * 12}" font-family="'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif"
2792 |                    font-size="8.5" fill="#6B7280">${ln.trim()}</text>`
2793 |           ).join('')}
2794 |         `;
2795 |       }).join('');
2796 | 
2797 |       // Divider lines between segments
2798 |       const dividers = [1,2].map(i => {
2799 |         const y = 6 + i * (SEG + GAP) - GAP;
2800 |         return `<line x1="2" y1="${y}" x2="${FW-2}" y2="${y}"
2801 |                       stroke="rgba(255,255,255,0.2)" stroke-width="1"/>`;
2802 |       }).join('');
2803 |

2805 |                    viewBox="0 0 ${SVG_W} ${SVG_H}"
2806 |                    style="display:block;width:100%;max-width:${SVG_W}px;overflow:visible;">
2807 |         ${parts}
2808 |         ${dividers}
2809 |       </svg>`;
2810 |     }
