2812 |     // Donut chart â€” pure SVG
2813 |     function donutSVG(data,W,cx,cy,OR,IR){
2814 |       const tot=data.reduce((s,d)=>s+(+d.v||0),0)||100;
2815 |       let ang=-Math.PI/2;
2816 |       return data.map((d,i)=>{
2817 |         const sw=(+d.v||0)/tot*2*Math.PI;
2818 |         if(sw<0.02){ang+=sw;return '';}
2819 |         const x1=cx+OR*Math.cos(ang),y1=cy+OR*Math.sin(ang);
2820 |         const x2=cx+OR*Math.cos(ang+sw),y2=cy+OR*Math.sin(ang+sw);
2821 |         const x3=cx+IR*Math.cos(ang+sw),y3=cy+IR*Math.sin(ang+sw);
2822 |         const x4=cx+IR*Math.cos(ang),y4=cy+IR*Math.sin(ang);
2823 |         const lg=sw>Math.PI?1:0;
2824 |         const mx=cx+(OR+IR)/2*Math.cos(ang+sw/2),my=cy+(OR+IR)/2*Math.sin(ang+sw/2);
2825 |         const pct=Math.round((+d.v||0)/tot*100);
2826 |         const lbl2=pct>=6?`<text x="${mx}" y="${my+3.5}" text-anchor="middle" font-size="9" font-weight="700" fill="rgba(255,255,255,.95)" font-family="'IBM Plex Mono',monospace">${pct}%</text>`:'';
2827 |         ang+=sw;
2828 |         return `<path d="M${x1},${y1} A${OR},${OR} 0 ${lg},1 ${x2},${y2} L${x3},${y3} A${IR},${IR} 0 ${lg},0 ${x4},${y4} Z" fill="${d.c}" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="1.5"/>${lbl2}`;
2829 |       }).join('');
2830 |     }
2831 | 
2832 |     // Horizontal bar chart for dimensions
2833 |     function dimBarsSVG(){
2834 |       const W=380,H=dimDefs.length*36+16, lw=130;
2835 |       const rows=dimDefs.map((d,i)=>{
2836 |         const v=dim[d.k]||0, y=8+i*36;
2837 |         const bw=Math.max(4,(W-lw-40)*v/100);
2838 |         const statusC=colfn(v);
2839 |         return `<text x="${lw-8}" y="${y+16}" text-anchor="end" font-size="10" font-weight="500" fill="#374151" font-family="'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif">${d.l}</text>
2840 |           <rect x="${lw}" y="${y+6}" width="${W-lw-40}" height="16" rx="3" fill="#F3F4F6"/>
2841 |           <rect x="${lw}" y="${y+6}" width="${bw}" height="16" rx="3" fill="${d.c}" opacity="0.85"/>
2842 |           <text x="${lw+bw+5}" y="${y+17}" font-size="10" font-weight="700" fill="${d.c}" font-family="'IBM Plex Mono',monospace">${v}</text>
2843 |           <text x="${W-2}" y="${y+17}" text-anchor="end" font-size="8" font-weight="600" fill="${statusC}" font-family="'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif">${lblfn(v)}</text>`;
2844 |       }).join('');
2845 |       return `<svg width="${W}" height="${H}" viewBox="0 0 ${W} ${H}" style="max-width:100%;">${rows}</svg>`;
2846 |     }

2909 |     // Risk heatmap â€” improved
2910 |     function riskSVG(){
2911 |       const risks2=a.topRisks||[];
2912 |       const items=[
2913 |         {l:'Competitive Response',p:2,i:3},
2914 |         {l:'Regulatory Risk',p:1,i:3},

2919 |       ];
2920 |       const W=280,H=220,lx=52,ty=28,cw=(W-lx)/3,ch=(H-ty-20)/3;
2921 |       const heatfill=(p,iv)=>{const v=p*iv;return v>=6?'rgba(239,68,68,0.12)':v>=4?'rgba(245,158,11,0.12)':v>=2?'rgba(59,130,246,0.08)':'rgba(16,185,129,0.07)';};
2922 |       const cells=[];
2923 |       for(let row=0;row<3;row++)for(let col2=0;col2<3;col2++){
2924 |         cells.push(`<rect x="${lx+col2*cw}" y="${ty+row*ch}" width="${cw}" height="${ch}" fill="${heatfill(3-row,col2+1)}" rx="2"/>
2925 |           <rect x="${lx+col2*cw}" y="${ty+row*ch}" width="${cw}" height="${ch}" fill="none" stroke="#E5E7EB" stroke-width="0.8"/>`);
2926 |       }
2927 |       const dots=items.map((it)=>{
2928 |         const dcx=lx+(it.i-1)*cw+cw/2, dcy=ty+(3-it.p)*ch+ch/2;
2929 |         const dc=it.p*it.i>=6?'#EF4444':it.p*it.i>=4?'#F59E0B':'#3B82F6';
2930 |         return `<circle cx="${dcx}" cy="${dcy}" r="12" fill="${dc}" opacity="0.12"/>
2931 |           <circle cx="${dcx}" cy="${dcy}" r="4.5" fill="${dc}"/>
2932 |           <text x="${dcx}" y="${dcy-16}" text-anchor="middle" font-size="7" fill="#4B5563" font-family="'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif">${it.l.slice(0,14)}</text>`;
2933 |       }).join('');
2934 |       const axY=['High','Med','Low'].map((l,i)=>`<text x="${lx-5}" y="${ty+i*ch+ch/2+4}" text-anchor="end" font-size="8" fill="#6B7280" font-family="'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif">${l}</text>`).join('');
2935 |       const axX=['Low','Medium','High'].map((l,i)=>`<text x="${lx+i*cw+cw/2}" y="${H-4}" text-anchor="middle" font-size="8" fill="#6B7280" font-family="'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif">${l}</text>`).join('');
2936 |       return `<svg width="${W}" height="${H}" viewBox="0 0 ${W} ${H}" style="overflow:visible;max-width:100%;">
2937 |         ${cells.join('')}${dots}${axY}${axX}
2938 |         <text x="${lx-28}" y="${ty+1.5*ch}" text-anchor="middle" font-size="8" fill="#9CA3AF" transform="rotate(-90,${lx-28},${ty+1.5*ch})" font-family="'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif">PROBABILITY</text>
2939 |         <text x="${lx+1.5*cw}" y="${H+2}" text-anchor="middle" font-size="8" fill="#9CA3AF" font-family="'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif">IMPACT</text>

   1 | # Infopace â€” React + Supabase Edition
   2 | 
   3 | > AI-powered market intelligence assessment platform.
   4 | > Built with React + Vite + Tailwind CSS + Gemini AI + Supabase.
   5 | 
   6 | ---
   7 | 
   8 | ## What This App Does
   9 | 
  10 | 1. **Onboarding Form** â€” Collects user details (name, email, phone, organization, role, website, LinkedIn, team size, sector, geography, problem statement, stage)
  11 | 2. **AI Assessment** â€” Generates 8 tailored question groups using Gemini AI, with a live market score panel updating as you answer
  12 | 3. **Results Dashboard** â€” Full market intelligence dashboard with:
  13 |    - Score donut + dimension bars + capability radar
  14 |    - Revenue projection chart (conservative / base / optimistic)
  15 |    - TAM / SAM / SOM estimates
  16 |    - Competitor analysis
  17 |    - Key AI-generated insights
  18 |    - 90-day action plan
  19 |    - Full printable report view
  20 |    - Raw JSON data view
  21 | 4. **Supabase Storage** â€” Every submission (user details + all answers + full analysis) is saved to your Supabase database
  22 | 
  23 | ---
  24 | 
  25 | ## Prerequisites
  26 | 
  27 | - Node.js 18+
  28 | - A free [Gemini API key](https://aistudio.google.com) (already in `server.js`)
  29 | - A free [Supabase](https://supabase.com) project
  30 | 
  31 | ---
  32 | 
  33 | ## Quick Start
  34 | 
  35 | ### Step 1 â€” Set up Supabase
  36 | 
  37 | 1. Create a free project at [supabase.com](https://supabase.com)
  38 | 2. Go to **SQL Editor** and paste + run the contents of `supabase_setup.sql`
  39 | 3. Go to **Settings â†’ API** and copy:
  40 |    - **Project URL** (looks like `https://xxxx.supabase.co`)
  41 |    - **anon / public key** (long JWT string)
  42 | 
  43 | ### Step 2 â€” Configure environment
  44 | 
  45 | ```bash
  46 | cp .env.example .env
  47 | ```
  48 | 
  49 | Edit `.env` and fill in your values:
  50 | 
  51 | ```env
  52 | VITE_SUPABASE_URL=https://YOUR_PROJECT_ID.supabase.co
  53 | VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY=YOUR_ANON_PUBLIC_KEY
  54 | ```
  55 | 
  56 | ### Step 3 â€” Install dependencies
  57 | 
  58 | ```bash
  59 | npm install
  60 | ```
  61 | 
  62 | ### Step 4 â€” Run the app (two terminals)
  63 | 
  64 | **Terminal 1** â€” Start the Gemini proxy server (port 4000):
  65 | ```bash
  66 | node server.js
  67 | ```
  68 | 
  69 | **Terminal 2** â€” Start the React dev server (port 3000):
  70 | ```bash
  71 | npm run dev
  72 | ```
  73 | 
  74 | Open **http://localhost:3000**
  75 | 
  76 | The Vite dev server automatically proxies `/api` requests to `server.js` on port 4000.
  77 | 
  78 | ---
  79 | 
  80 | ## Project Structure
  81 | 
  82 | ```
  83 | infopace-react/
  84 | â”œâ”€â”€ server.js                    â† Gemini AI proxy (Node.js, port 4000)
  85 | â”œâ”€â”€ supabase_setup.sql           â† Run once in Supabase SQL Editor
  86 | â”œâ”€â”€ .env.example                 â† Copy to .env and fill in keys
  87 | â”‚
  88 | â”œâ”€â”€ index.html                   â† Vite entry HTML
  89 | â”œâ”€â”€ vite.config.js               â† Dev server + /api proxy config
  90 | â”œâ”€â”€ tailwind.config.js
  91 | â”œâ”€â”€ postcss.config.js
  92 | â”œâ”€â”€ package.json
  93 | â”‚
  94 | â””â”€â”€ src/
  95 |     â”œâ”€â”€ main.jsx                 â† React entry point
  96 |     â”œâ”€â”€ App.jsx                  â† Screen router (onboarding â†’ assessment â†’ results)
  97 |     â”œâ”€â”€ index.css                â† Tailwind + IBM Plex fonts
  98 |     â”‚
  99 |     â”œâ”€â”€ pages/
 100 |     â”‚   â”œâ”€â”€ OnboardingForm.jsx   â† Step 1: User & venture details
 101 |     â”‚   â”œâ”€â”€ AssessmentShell.jsx  â† Step 2: AI questions + live scoring
 102 |     â”‚   â””â”€â”€ ResultsDashboard.jsx â† Step 3: Full dashboard + report
 103 |     â”‚
 104 |     â””â”€â”€ lib/
 105 |         â”œâ”€â”€ supabase.js          â† Supabase client init
 106 |         â”œâ”€â”€ gemini.js            â† Gemini API helpers (questions + analysis)
 107 |         â””â”€â”€ db.js                â† Save / load submissions
 108 | ```
 109 | 
 110 | ---
 111 | 
 112 | ## Data Saved to Supabase
 113 | 
 114 | Every completed assessment saves one row to the `submissions` table:
 115 | 
 116 | | Column | Type | Description |
 117 | |---|---|---|
 118 | | `id` | uuid | Auto-generated primary key |
 119 | | `name` | text | Full name |
 120 | | `email` | text | Email address |
 121 | | `phone` | text | Phone number |
 122 | | `organization` | text | Company name |
 123 | | `role` | text | Job role |
 124 | | `website` | text | Website URL |
 125 | | `linkedin` | text | LinkedIn URL |
 126 | | `team_size` | text | Team size bracket |
 127 | | `sector` | text | e.g. "HealthTech", "B2B SaaS" |
 128 | | `geography` | text | e.g. "PI" (Pan India), "GL" (Global) |
 129 | | `problem` | text | Problem statement |
 130 | | `stage` | text | Business stage (1â€“5) |
 131 | | `answers` | jsonb | All question answers keyed by question ID |
 132 | | `overall_score` | integer | Final market score (0â€“100) |
 133 | | `grade` | text | e.g. "A", "B+", "C" |
 134 | | `dimensions` | jsonb | Six dimension scores |
 135 | | `analysis_json` | jsonb | Complete AI analysis (TAM/SAM/SOM, competitors, insights, action plan, projections) |
 136 | | `created_at` | timestamptz | Submission timestamp |
 137 | 
 138 | ---
 139 | 
 140 | ## Production Deployment
 141 | 
 142 | ### Build the React app
 143 | 
 144 | ```bash
 145 | npm run build
 146 | ```
 147 | 
 148 | This creates a `dist/` folder.
 149 | 
 150 | ### Serve with server.js
 151 | 
 152 | Update `server.js` to serve the `dist/` folder as static files. Replace the static file section at the bottom of `server.js` with:
 153 | 
 154 | ```javascript
 155 | // Serve React build
 156 | let fp = req.url === '/' ? '/index.html' : req.url.split('?')[0];
 157 | 
 158 | // For React Router â€” serve index.html for unknown routes
 159 | const fullPath = path.join(process.cwd(), 'dist', fp);
 160 | fs.readFile(fullPath, (err, data) => {
 161 |   if (err) {
 162 |     // Fallback to index.html for client-side routing
 163 |     fs.readFile(path.join(process.cwd(), 'dist', 'index.html'), (e2, d2) => {
 164 |       if (e2) { res.writeHead(404); res.end('Not found'); return; }
 165 |       res.writeHead(200, { 'Content-Type': 'text/html' });
 166 |       res.end(d2);
 167 |     });
 168 |     return;
 169 |   }
 170 |   res.writeHead(200, { 'Content-Type': MIME[path.extname(fullPath)] || 'text/plain' });
 171 |   res.end(data);
 172 | });
 173 | ```
 174 | 
 175 | Then run just `node server.js` â€” it serves both the API and the React app on port 4000.
 176 | 
 177 | ### Deploy options
 178 | 
 179 | - **Railway / Render / Fly.io** â€” push repo, set env vars, run `node server.js`
 180 | - **Vercel** â€” deploy React app, add serverless function wrapping Gemini calls
 181 | - **VPS** â€” clone repo, `npm run build`, run with `pm2 start server.js`
 182 | 
 183 | ---
 184 | 
 185 | ## Customisation
 186 | 
 187 | ### Change sectors / geographies
 188 | Edit the `SECTORS` and `GEO` arrays at the top of `src/pages/OnboardingForm.jsx`.
 189 | 
 190 | ### Change AI models
 191 | Edit `MODEL_FAST` and `MODEL_SMART` constants in `server.js`.
 192 | 
 193 | ### Change question count
 194 | Edit the prompt in `src/lib/gemini.js` â†’ `generateQuestions()`.
 195 | 
 196 | ### Add email notifications
 197 | After `saveSubmission()` in `AssessmentShell.jsx`, call a Supabase Edge Function or a service like Resend/SendGrid.
 198 | 
 199 | ---
 200 | 
 201 | ## Troubleshooting
 202 | 
 203 | | Problem | Fix |
 204 | |---|---|
 205 | | `/api` returns 500 | Check Gemini API key on line 8 of `server.js` |
 206 | | Supabase save fails | Verify `.env` values and that `supabase_setup.sql` was run |
 207 | | Questions don't load | Gemini API key may be rate-limited; fallback questions will show |
 208 | | Blank dashboard | Open browser console â€” look for JSON parse errors in analysis response |
 209 | 
 210 | ---
 211 |

 213 | 
 214 | Infopace Management Pvt Ltd â€” Internal Use

   4 | //     Get free key at: https://aistudio.google.com â†’ Get API Key
   5 | //  2. Run:  node server.js
   6 | //  3. Open: http://localhost:4000
   7 | // ================================================================
   8 | 
   9 | const API_KEY = 'AIzaSyAAYHBlfh9Jh42dyjKHlQfU3dzqvUOOhHc'; // â† paste your Gemini key here
  10 | 
  11 | // â”€â”€ Models â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
  12 | // Flash = fast + free (question generation)
  13 | // Pro   = smart + free (dashboard analysis)
  14 | const MODEL_FAST = 'gemini-2.5-flash';
  15 | const MODEL_SMART = 'gemini-2.5-flash';  // both use flash on free tier
  16 | 
  17 | // â”€â”€ No edits needed below â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
  18 | const http  = require('http');
  19 | const https = require('https');
  20 | const fs    = require('fs');
  21 | const path  = require('path');
  22 | const PORT  = 4000;
  23 | 
  24 | const MIME = {
  25 |   '.html':'text/html', '.js':'application/javascript',
  26 |   '.css':'text/css',   '.json':'application/json',
  27 |   '.png':'image/png',  '.ico':'image/x-icon', '.txt':'text/plain'
  28 | };
  29 | 
  30 | function geminiRequest(model, promptText, callback) {
  31 |   const payload = JSON.stringify({
  32 |     contents: [{ parts: [{ text: promptText }] }],
  33 |     generationConfig: {
  34 |       temperature: 0.7,
  35 |       maxOutputTokens: 8192,
  36 |       responseMimeType: 'text/plain'
  37 |     }
  38 |   });
  39 | 
  40 |   const options = {
  41 |     hostname: 'generativelanguage.googleapis.com',
  42 |     path: `/v1beta/models/${model}:generateContent?key=${API_KEY}`,
  43 |     method: 'POST',
  44 |     headers: {
  45 |       'Content-Type': 'application/json',
  46 |       'Content-Length': Buffer.byteLength(payload)
  47 |     }
  48 |   };
  49 | 
  50 |   const req = https.request(options, res => {
  51 |     let body = '';
  52 |     res.on('data', c => body += c);
  53 |     res.on('end', () => callback(null, res.statusCode, body));
  54 |   });
  55 |   req.on('error', e => callback(e, null, null));
  56 |   req.write(payload);
  57 |   req.end();
  58 | }
  59 | 
  60 | http.createServer((req, res) => {
  61 |   res.setHeader('Access-Control-Allow-Origin', '*');
  62 |   res.setHeader('Access-Control-Allow-Methods', 'GET, POST, OPTIONS');
  63 |   res.setHeader('Access-Control-Allow-Headers', 'Content-Type');
  64 |   if (req.method === 'OPTIONS') { res.writeHead(204); res.end(); return; }
  65 | 
  66 |   // â”€â”€ /api â†’ Gemini proxy â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
  67 |   if (req.url === '/api' && req.method === 'POST') {
  68 |     if (!API_KEY || API_KEY === 'YOUR_GEMINI_KEY_HERE') {
  69 |       res.writeHead(500, {'Content-Type':'application/json'});
  70 |       res.end(JSON.stringify({error:'Gemini API key not set. Edit line 8 of server.js'}));
  71 |       return;
  72 |     }
  73 | 
  74 |     let body = '';
  75 |     req.on('data', c => body += c);
  76 |     req.on('end', () => {
  77 |       let payload;
  78 |       try { payload = JSON.parse(body); }
  79 |       catch(e) { res.writeHead(400); res.end('bad json'); return; }
  80 | 
  81 |       const type   = payload._type || 'analysis';
  82 |       const prompt = payload.prompt || '';
  83 |       const model  = type === 'questions' ? MODEL_FAST : MODEL_SMART;
  84 | 
  85 |       console.log('  â†’  ' + type + ' (' + model + ')');
  86 | 
  87 |       geminiRequest(model, prompt, (err, status, respBody) => {
  88 |         if (err) {
  89 |           console.log('  âŒ Network error:', err.message);
  90 |           res.writeHead(502, {'Content-Type':'application/json'});
  91 |           res.end(JSON.stringify({error: err.message}));
  92 |           return;
  93 |         }
  94 | 
  95 |         const icon = status < 300 ? 'âœ…' : 'âŒ';
  96 |         console.log('  ' + icon + '  ' + status + '  ' + type);
  97 | 
  98 |         if (status !== 200) {
  99 |           try {
 100 |             const e = JSON.parse(respBody);
 101 |             console.log('      Error:', e.error?.message || respBody.slice(0,120));
 102 |           } catch(_) { console.log('      Raw:', respBody.slice(0,120)); }
 103 |         }
 104 | 
 105 |         // Convert Gemini response â†’ Anthropic-style response
 106 |         // so the HTML parsing code works without changes
 107 |         let anthropicStyle;
 108 |         try {
 109 |           const geminiData = JSON.parse(respBody);
 110 |           const text = (geminiData?.candidates?.[0]?.content?.parts||[])
 111 |             .map(p => p.text||'').join('');
 112 |           // Wrap in Anthropic content format
 113 |           anthropicStyle = JSON.stringify({
 114 |             candidates: geminiData.candidates,
 115 |             content: [{ type: 'text', text: text }]
 116 |           });
 117 |         } catch(_) {
 118 |           anthropicStyle = respBody;
 119 |         }
 120 | 
 121 |         res.writeHead(status, {
 122 |           'Content-Type': 'application/json',
 123 |           'Access-Control-Allow-Origin': '*'
 124 |         });
 125 |         res.end(anthropicStyle);
 126 |       });
 127 |     });
 128 |     return;
 129 |   }
 130 | 
 131 |   // â”€â”€ Static files â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
 132 |   let fp = req.url === '/' ? '/index.html' : req.url.split('?')[0];
 133 |   fp = path.join(process.cwd(), fp);
 134 |   fs.readFile(fp, (err, data) => {
 135 |     if (err) { res.writeHead(404); res.end('Not found'); return; }
 136 |     res.writeHead(200, {'Content-Type': MIME[path.extname(fp)] || 'text/plain'});
 137 |     res.end(data);
 138 |   });
 139 | 
 140 | }).listen(PORT, () => {
 141 |   const ok = API_KEY && API_KEY !== 'YOUR_GEMINI_KEY_HERE';
 142 |   console.log('');
 143 |   console.log('  Infopace â€” Gemini Edition (Free)');
 144 |   console.log('  â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€');
 145 |   console.log('  ðŸŒ  http://localhost:' + PORT);
 146 |   console.log('  ðŸ”‘  Gemini key: ' + (ok ? 'âœ… Set (' + API_KEY.slice(0,16) + '...)' : 'âŒ NOT SET â€” edit line 8'));
 147 |   console.log('  ðŸ¤–  Model: ' + MODEL_SMART);
 148 |   console.log('  â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€');
 149 |   if (!ok) {
 150 |     console.log('');
 151 |     console.log('  Get a free key at https://aistudio.google.com');
 152 |     console.log('  Then paste it on line 8 of server.js');
 153 |   }
 154 |   console.log('');
 155 | });

FILE: src\App.jsx
============================================================
   1 | import { useState } from "react";
   2 | import OnboardingForm from "./pages/OnboardingForm";
   3 | import AssessmentAndDashboard from "./pages/AssessmentAndDashboard";
   4 | 
   5 | export default function App() {
   6 |   const [screen, setScreen] = useState("onboarding");
   7 |   const [userData, setUserData] = useState(null);
   8 | 
   9 |   return (
  10 |     <div>
  11 |       {screen === "onboarding" && (
  12 |         <OnboardingForm
  13 |           onComplete={(data) => {
  14 |             setUserData(data);
  15 |             setScreen("assessment");
  16 |           }}
  17 |         />
  18 |       )}
  19 |       {screen === "assessment" && (
  20 |         <AssessmentAndDashboard
  21 |           userData={userData}
  22 |           onRestart={() => {
  23 |             setScreen("onboarding");
  24 |             setUserData(null);
  25 |           }}
  26 |         />
  27 |       )}
  28 |     </div>
  29 |   );
  30 | }

FILE: src\lib\db.js
============================================================
   1 | import { supabase } from "./supabase";
   2 | 
   3 | export async function saveSubmission({ userData, answers, result }) {
   4 |   const { data, error } = await supabase
   5 |     .from("submissions")
   6 |     .insert([
   7 |       {
   8 |         name: userData.name,
   9 |         email: userData.email,
  10 |         phone: userData.phone,
  11 |         organization: userData.organization,
  12 |         role: userData.role,
  13 |         website: userData.website || null,
  14 |         linkedin: userData.linkedin || null,
  15 |         team_size: userData.teamSize || null,
  16 |         sector: userData.sector,
  17 |         geography: userData.geography,
  18 |         problem: userData.problem,
  19 |         stage: userData.stage,
  20 |         answers: answers,
  21 |         overall_score: result.overallScore,
  22 |         grade: result.grade,
  23 |         dimensions: result.dimensions,
  24 |         analysis_json: result,
  25 |         created_at: new Date().toISOString(),
  26 |       },
  27 |     ])
  28 |     .select()
  29 |     .single();
  30 | 
  31 |   if (error) {
  32 |     console.error("Supabase save error:", error);
  33 |     throw error;
  34 |   }
  35 |   return data;
  36 | }
  37 | 
  38 | export async function getAllSubmissions() {
  39 |   const { data, error } = await supabase
  40 |     .from("submissions")
  41 |     .select("*")
  42 |     .order("created_at", { ascending: false });
  43 |   if (error) throw error;
  44 |   return data;
  45 | }
  46 |

FILE: src\lib\gemini.js
============================================================
   1 | // Gemini API helper â€” calls the proxy server (server.js) at /api
   2 | export async function geminiCall(prompt, type = "analysis") {
   3 |   const res = await fetch("/api", {
   4 |     method: "POST",
   5 |     headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
   6 |     body: JSON.stringify({ prompt, _type: type }),
   7 |   });
   8 |   if (!res.ok) throw new Error(`API error: ${res.status}`);
   9 |   const data = await res.json();
  10 |   // Extract text from Anthropic-style wrapper (server.js converts it)
  11 |   return data?.content?.[0]?.text || "";
  12 | }
  13 | 
  14 | export async function generateQuestions(sector, geography, problem) {
  15 |   const prompt = `You are an expert market intelligence analyst. Generate exactly 8 groups of 3â€“4 assessment questions for a ${sector} startup targeting ${geography}. 
  16 | Problem they solve: "${problem}"
  17 | 
  18 | Each group covers one of: Market Size, Audience Quality, Competition Edge, Revenue Potential, Risk Profile, Sector Fit, Growth Levers, Strategic Differentiation.
  19 | 
  20 | Return ONLY valid JSON in this exact format:
  21 | {
  22 |   "groups": [
  23 |     {
  24 |       "title": "Market Size",
  25 |       "icon": "ðŸ“Š",
  26 |       "questions": [
  27 |         { "id": "q1_1", "text": "...", "type": "scale", "min": 1, "max": 10 },
  28 |         { "id": "q1_2", "text": "...", "type": "choice", "options": ["Option A","Option B","Option C"] },
  29 |         { "id": "q1_3", "text": "...", "type": "text" }
  30 |       ]
  31 |     }
  32 |   ]
  33 | }
  34 | Types: "scale" (1-10), "choice" (multiple choice), "text" (free text), "multiselect" (array of options).`;
  35 |   return JSON.parse(await geminiCall(prompt, "questions"));
  36 | }
  37 | 
  38 | export async function generateAnalysis(userData, answers) {
  39 |   const GEO_LABELS = {
  40 |     PI: "Pan India", SA: "South Asia (SAARC)", SE: "Southeast Asia",
  41 |     MEA: "Middle East & Africa", EU: "Europe", NA: "North America", GL: "Global",
  42 |   };
  43 |   const geo = GEO_LABELS[userData.geography] || userData.geography;
  44 |   const sector = userData.sector;
  45 |   const biz = userData.organization || "Your Venture";
  46 | 
  47 |   const answersText = Object.entries(answers)
  48 |     .filter(([, v]) => v && v !== "")
  49 |     .map(([k, v]) => `  - ${k}: ${Array.isArray(v) ? v.join(", ") : v}`)
  50 |     .join("\n") || "(no answers provided)";
  51 | 
  52 |   const prompt = `You are a senior market intelligence analyst with deep knowledge of Indian and global markets.
  53 | 
  54 | Analyse this product and produce a data-driven market assessment.
  55 | 
  56 | PRODUCT: ${biz}
  57 | SECTOR: ${sector}
  58 | BUSINESS TYPE: ${userData.role}
  59 | TARGET GEOGRAPHY: ${geo}
  60 | BUSINESS STAGE: Stage ${userData.stage}
  61 | PROBLEM BEING SOLVED: ${userData.problem}
  62 | WHAT THE FOUNDER TOLD US:
  63 | ${answersText}
  64 | 
  65 | Return ONLY raw JSON, no markdown fences, no explanation before or after:
  66 | {
  67 | "overallScore": <0-100>,
  68 | "grade": "Excellent" or "Strong" or "Moderate" or "Needs Work" or "Critical",
  69 | "verdict": "<One specific sentence naming ${biz}, its key opportunity in ${geo}, and its biggest risk>",
  70 | "realTimeInsight": "<One real market fact about ${sector} in ${geo} with actual numbers>",
  71 | "dimensions": {"marketSize":<0-100>,"audienceQuality":<0-100>,"competitionEdge":<0-100>,"revenuePotential":<0-100>,"riskProfile":<0-100>,"sectorFit":<0-100>},
  72 | "tamCrore": <TAM in Crore INR>,
  73 | "samCrore": <SAM in Crore INR>,
  74 | "somCrore": <3-year target in Crore INR>,
  75 | "growthRate": <CAGR % integer>,
  76 | "competitorProfiles": [
  77 |   {"name":"<REAL company>","stage":"<funding/size>","strength":"<strength>","weakness":"<gap>","marketSharePct":<number>},
  78 |   {"name":"<REAL company>","stage":"<funding/size>","strength":"<strength>","weakness":"<gap>","marketSharePct":<number>},
  79 |   {"name":"<REAL company>","stage":"<funding/size>","strength":"<strength>","weakness":"<gap>","marketSharePct":<number>}
  80 | ],
  81 | "marketShare": [
  82 |   {"name":"${biz}","pct":<1-10>,"val":"Rs<som>Cr"},
  83 |   {"name":"<comp1>","pct":<number>,"val":"Rs<amount>Cr"},
  84 |   {"name":"<comp2>","pct":<number>,"val":"Rs<amount>Cr"},
  85 |   {"name":"<comp3>","pct":<number>,"val":"Rs<amount>Cr"},
  86 |   {"name":"Others","pct":<remainder>,"val":"â€”"}
  87 | ],
  88 | "revenueByRegion": {
  89 |   "labels": [<5-6 real cities/regions for ${geo}>],
  90 |   "currentMarket": [<Crore market size per city, 5-6 numbers>],
  91 |   "projected2027": [<projected values, 5-6 numbers>],
  92 |   "ourTarget": [<target values 2-8% of each, 5-6 numbers>]
  93 | },
  94 | "competitorRadar": [
  95 |   {"name":"${biz}","scores":{"pricingPower":<0-100>,"distribution":<0-100>,"brandValue":<0-100>,"innovation":<0-100>,"marketReach":<0-100>,"customerSat":<0-100>},"avg":"<avg>"},
  96 |   {"name":"<comp1>","scores":{"pricingPower":<n>,"distribution":<n>,"brandValue":<n>,"innovation":<n>,"marketReach":<n>,"customerSat":<n>},"avg":"<avg>"},
  97 |   {"name":"<comp2>","scores":{"pricingPower":<n>,"distribution":<n>,"brandValue":<n>,"innovation":<n>,"marketReach":<n>,"customerSat":<n>},"avg":"<avg>"},
  98 |   {"name":"<comp3>","scores":{"pricingPower":<n>,"distribution":<n>,"brandValue":<n>,"innovation":<n>,"marketReach":<n>,"customerSat":<n>},"avg":"<avg>"}
  99 | ],
 100 | "trendData": {
 101 |   "months": ["Apr","May","Jun","Jul","Aug","Sep","Oct","Nov","Dec","Jan","Feb","Mar"],
 102 |   "series": [
 103 |     {"label":"${biz}","dash":[],"data":[<12 monthly share % values, start near 0 grow to 3-8>]},
 104 |     {"label":"<comp1>","dash":[],"data":[<12 monthly values ~20-35%>]},
 105 |     {"label":"<comp2>","dash":[],"data":[<12 monthly values ~15-25%>]},
 106 |     {"label":"<comp3>","dash":[],"data":[<12 monthly values ~10-20%>]}
 107 |   ]
 108 | },
 109 | "geoRegions": {
 110 |   "Asia Pacific": {"rev":"<sector size>","pct":"<% of global>","ids":[4,50,156,356,360,392,410,458,702,704,764]},
 111 |   "North America": {"rev":"<sector size>","pct":"<% of global>","ids":[124,484,840]},
 112 |   "South America": {"rev":"<sector size>","pct":"<% of global>","ids":[32,68,76,152,170]},
 113 |   "Europe": {"rev":"<sector size>","pct":"<% of global>","ids":[276,250,826,380,724,528,208,752]},
 114 |   "Africa": {"rev":"<sector size>","pct":"<% of global>","ids":[566,710,404,818,12]}
 115 | },
 116 | "keyInsights": ["<insight 1>","<insight 2>","<insight 3>","<insight 4>","<insight 5>"],
 117 | "topRisks": ["<risk 1>","<risk 2>","<risk 3>"],
 118 | "quickWins": ["<30-day win 1>","<win 2>","<win 3>"],
 119 | "popups": {
 120 |   "mktshare": "<2 sentences on TAM/SAM/SOM and competitor context>",
 121 |   "revregion": "<2 sentences on which cities are priority and why>",
 122 |   "radar": "<2 sentences on where ${biz} leads and trails>",
 123 |   "trend": "<2 sentences on trajectory and inflection point>",
 124 |   "geomap": "<2 sentences on geographic focus rationale>"
 125 | }
 126 | }`;
 127 | 
 128 |   const text = await geminiCall(prompt, "analysis");
 129 |   let raw = text.trim();
 130 |   const fm = raw.match(/```(?:json)?\s*([\s\S]*?)```/);
 131 |   if (fm) raw = fm[1].trim();
 132 |   const s0 = raw.indexOf("{"), e0 = raw.lastIndexOf("}");
 133 |   if (s0 === -1 || e0 === -1) throw new Error("No JSON in response");
 134 |   raw = raw.slice(s0, e0 + 1);
 135 |   try { return JSON.parse(raw); }
 136 |   catch (_) {
 137 |     // best-effort repair for truncated responses
 138 |     let s = raw.replace(/,\s*$/, "");
 139 |     const opens = [];
 140 |     for (const ch of s) {
 141 |       if (ch === "{" || ch === "[") opens.push(ch === "{" ? "}" : "]");
 142 |       else if (ch === "}" || ch === "]") opens.pop();
 143 |     }
 144 |     return JSON.parse(s + opens.reverse().join(""));
 145 |   }
 146 | }

FILE: src\pages\AssessmentAndDashboard.jsx
============================================================
   1 | import { useEffect, useRef, useState } from "react";
   2 | import { generateAnalysis } from "../lib/gemini";
   3 | import { saveSubmission } from "../lib/db";
   4 | 
   5 | // Maps React onboarding userData â†’ the field codes dashboard.html expects
   6 | function buildPrefill(userData) {
   7 |   const SECTOR_MAP = {
   8 |     "HealthTech": "HC", "EdTech": "ED", "FinTech": "FS",
   9 |     "AgriTech": "AG", "CleanTech": "EN", "B2B SaaS": "IT",
  10 |     "D2C / Consumer": "EC", "Logistics / Supply Chain": "LG",
  11 |     "HR Tech": "IT", "LegalTech": "OT", "PropTech": "RE",
  12 |     "Manufacturing / DeepTech": "MF", "Media / Content": "ME",
  13 |     "RetailTech": "EC", "GovTech": "OT", "Other": "OT",
  14 |   };
  15 |   const ROLE_BIZ_TYPE_MAP = {
  16 |     "Founder / Co-Founder": "B2B_SME", "CEO / MD": "B2B_ENT",
  17 |     "CTO / CPO": "B2B_SME", "CMO / VP Marketing": "B2C_MASS",
  18 |     "Business Development": "B2B_SME", "Product Manager": "B2B_SME",
  19 |     "Investor / VC": "B2B_ENT", "Consultant / Advisor": "B2B_SME", "Other": "B2B_SME",
  20 |   };
  21 |   const GEO_MAP = {
  22 |     PI: "PI", SA: "SA", SE: "SE", MEA: "MEA", EU: "EU", NA: "NA", GL: "GL",
  23 |   };
  24 | 
  25 |   return {
  26 |     organization: userData.organization,
  27 |     sectorCode: SECTOR_MAP[userData.sector] || "OT",
  28 |     bizTypeCode: ROLE_BIZ_TYPE_MAP[userData.role] || "B2B_SME",
  29 |     geoCode: GEO_MAP[userData.geography] || "PI",
  30 |     problem: userData.problem,
  31 |     stage: userData.stage,
  32 |   };
  33 | }
  34 | 
  35 | const LOADER_STEPS = [
  36 |   { n: 1, msg: "Reading your inputsâ€¦", pct: 8 },
  37 |   { n: 2, msg: "Searching live market data & sector sizingâ€¦", pct: 25 },
  38 |   { n: 3, msg: "Fetching real-time competitor profiles & funding dataâ€¦", pct: 48 },
  39 |   { n: 4, msg: "Calculating TAM/SAM/SOM, scores & 12-month projectionsâ€¦", pct: 75 },
  40 |   { n: 5, msg: "Assembling your market intelligence dashboardâ€¦", pct: 95 },
  41 | ];
  42 | 
  43 | export default function AssessmentAndDashboard({ userData, onRestart }) {
  44 |   const iframeRef = useRef(null);
  45 |   const prefillSentRef = useRef(false);
  46 | 
  47 |   function postToIframe(msg) {
  48 |     iframeRef.current?.contentWindow?.postMessage(msg, "*");
  49 |   }
  50 | 
  51 |   async function handleSubmit(fd) {
  52 |     // Drive the loader steps in the iframe
  53 |     for (const s of LOADER_STEPS) {
  54 |       postToIframe({ type: "INFOPACE_LOADER_STEP", step: s.n, msg: s.msg, pct: s.pct });
  55 |       await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, s.n === 3 ? 150 : 300));
  56 |     }
  57 | 
  58 |     try {
  59 |       const result = await generateAnalysis(userData, fd.answers || {});
  60 | 
  61 |       // Save to Supabase (non-blocking)
  62 |       saveSubmission({ userData, answers: fd.answers || {}, result })
  63 |         .catch(e => console.warn("DB save failed:", e.message));
  64 | 
  65 |       // Send result to iframe to render the dashboard
  66 |       postToIframe({ type: "INFOPACE_RENDER", fd, analysis: result });
  67 | 
  68 |     } catch (err) {
  69 |       console.error("Analysis failed:", err);
  70 |       // Let iframe show error via its own fallback
  71 |       postToIframe({ type: "INFOPACE_LOADER_STEP", step: 5, msg: "Running offline analysisâ€¦", pct: 95 });
  72 |       setTimeout(() => {
  73 |         // Trigger iframe's own offline fallback by sending empty analysis
  74 |         postToIframe({ type: "INFOPACE_RENDER", fd, analysis: {} });
  75 |       }, 800);
  76 |     }
  77 |   }
  78 | 
  79 |   useEffect(() => {
  80 |     function handleMessage(event) {
  81 |       if (!event.data) return;
  82 | 
  83 |       // Iframe loaded â€” send prefill data
  84 |       if (event.data.type === "INFOPACE_LOADED") {
  85 |         if (!prefillSentRef.current) {
  86 |           prefillSentRef.current = true;
  87 |           const prefill = buildPrefill(userData);
  88 |           postToIframe({ type: "INFOPACE_PREFILL", userData: prefill });
  89 |         }
  90 |       }
  91 | 
  92 |       // User clicked "Generate Dashboard" â€” run analysis
  93 |       if (event.data.type === "INFOPACE_SUBMIT") {
  94 |         handleSubmit(event.data.fd);
  95 |       }
  96 | 
  97 |       // "New Assessment" clicked inside dashboard
  98 |       if (event.data.type === "INFOPACE_RESET") {
  99 |         onRestart();
 100 |       }
 101 |     }
 102 | 
 103 |     window.addEventListener("message", handleMessage);
 104 |     return () => window.removeEventListener("message", handleMessage);
 105 |   }, [userData]);
 106 | 
 107 |   return (
 108 |     <iframe
 109 |       ref={iframeRef}
 110 |       src="/dashboard.html"
 111 |       style={{ position: "fixed", inset: 0, border: "none", width: "100%", height: "100%" }}
 112 |       title="Infopace Assessment"
 113 |       sandbox="allow-scripts allow-same-origin allow-popups allow-downloads"
 114 |     />
 115 |   );
 116 | }
 117 |

   1 | import { useState } from "react";
   2 | 
   3 | const SECTORS = [
   4 |   "HealthTech", "EdTech", "FinTech", "AgriTech", "CleanTech",
   5 |   "B2B SaaS", "D2C / Consumer", "Logistics / Supply Chain",
   6 |   "HR Tech", "LegalTech", "PropTech", "Manufacturing / DeepTech",
   7 |   "Media / Content", "RetailTech", "GovTech", "Other",
   8 | ];
   9 | const GEO = [
  10 |   { v: "PI", l: "Pan India" }, { v: "SA", l: "South Asia (SAARC)" },
  11 |   { v: "SE", l: "Southeast Asia" }, { v: "MEA", l: "Middle East & Africa" },
  12 |   { v: "EU", l: "Europe" }, { v: "NA", l: "North America" }, { v: "GL", l: "Global" },
  13 | ];
  14 | const STAGES = ["Idea Stage", "MVP / Prototype", "Live Pilots", "Paying Customers", "Scaling / Growth"];
  15 | const TEAM_SIZES = ["Solo / 1", "2â€“5", "6â€“15", "16â€“50", "51â€“200", "200+"];
  16 | const ROLES = [
  17 |   "Founder / Co-Founder", "CEO / MD", "CTO / CPO", "CMO / VP Marketing",
  18 |   "Business Development", "Product Manager", "Investor / VC", "Consultant / Advisor", "Other",
  19 | ];
  20 | 
  21 | export default function OnboardingForm({ onComplete }) {
  22 |   const [step, setStep] = useState(1); // 1 = personal, 2 = company
  23 |   const [form, setForm] = useState({
  24 |     name: "", email: "", phone: "", organization: "", role: "",
  25 |     website: "", linkedin: "", teamSize: "",
  26 |     sector: "", geography: "", problem: "", stage: "",
  27 |   });
  28 |   const [errors, setErrors] = useState({});
  29 | 
  30 |   const set = (k, v) => setForm((f) => ({ ...f, [k]: v }));
  31 |   const err = (k, msg) => setErrors((e) => ({ ...e, [k]: msg }));
  32 |   const clearErr = (k) => setErrors((e) => { const n = { ...e }; delete n[k]; return n; });
  33 | 
  34 |   function validateStep1() {
  35 |     let ok = true;
  36 |     if (!form.name.trim()) { err("name", "Required"); ok = false; }
  37 |     if (!form.email.match(/^[^\s@]+@[^\s@]+\.[^\s@]+$/)) { err("email", "Valid email required"); ok = false; }
  38 |     if (!form.phone.match(/^\+?[\d\s\-]{8,}$/)) { err("phone", "Valid phone required"); ok = false; }
  39 |     if (!form.organization.trim()) { err("organization", "Required"); ok = false; }
  40 |     if (!form.role) { err("role", "Required"); ok = false; }
  41 |     return ok;
  42 |   }
  43 | 
  44 |   function validateStep2() {
  45 |     let ok = true;
  46 |     if (!form.sector) { err("sector", "Required"); ok = false; }
  47 |     if (!form.geography) { err("geography", "Required"); ok = false; }
  48 |     if (!form.problem.trim() || form.problem.trim().length < 20) { err("problem", "Please describe in at least 20 characters"); ok = false; }
  49 |     if (!form.stage) { err("stage", "Required"); ok = false; }
  50 |     return ok;
  51 |   }
  52 | 
  53 |   const handleNext = () => {
  54 |     setErrors({});
  55 |     if (step === 1 && validateStep1()) setStep(2);
  56 |     else if (step === 2 && validateStep2()) onComplete(form);
  57 |   };
  58 | 
  59 |   const inputCls = (k) =>
  60 |     `w-full px-3 py-2.5 text-sm border rounded-sm bg-[#EEF2F7] text-[#08152A] outline-none transition-all
  61 |     focus:border-[#0091DA] focus:shadow-[0_0_0_3px_rgba(0,145,218,0.1)] focus:bg-white
  62 |     ${errors[k] ? "border-red-400 bg-red-50" : "border-[#D6DFED]"}`;
  63 | 
  64 |   return (
  65 |     <div className="min-h-screen bg-[#EEF2F7]" style={{ fontFamily: "'IBM Plex Sans', sans-serif" }}>
  66 |       {/* Topbar */}
  67 |       <div className="sticky top-0 z-50 bg-[#00338D] h-12 flex items-center justify-between px-6 shadow-lg">
  68 |         <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
  69 |           <div className="w-8 h-8 bg-[#0091DA] rounded flex items-center justify-center font-mono font-bold text-xs text-white">IP</div>
  70 |           <div>
  71 |             <div className="text-[11px] font-bold tracking-widest text-white uppercase">Infopace</div>
  72 |             <div className="text-[7px] text-white/40 tracking-wider uppercase">Market Intelligence Platform</div>
  73 |           </div>
  74 |         </div>
  75 |         <div className="text-[9px] text-white/50 uppercase tracking-wider">Assessment Registration</div>
  76 |       </div>
  77 | 
  78 |       <div className="max-w-2xl mx-auto px-4 py-12">
  79 |         {/* Hero */}
  80 |         <div className="mb-8">
  81 |           <div className="inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 text-[9px] font-bold tracking-wider uppercase text-[#0091DA] bg-[#EEF2FB] border border-[#C5D5F5] rounded px-2 py-1 mb-4">
  82 |             âœ¦ AI-POWERED MARKET INTELLIGENCE
  83 |           </div>
  84 |           <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold text-[#08152A] leading-tight tracking-tight">
  85 |             {step === 1 ? "Tell us about yourself" : "Tell us about your venture"}
  86 |             <br />
  87 |             
  88 |           </h1>
  89 |           <p className="mt-3 text-sm text-[#627289] leading-relaxed">
  90 |             {step === 1
  91 |               ? "Your details help us personalise the market intelligence report and keep your results on record."
  92 |               : "This context powers the AI to generate tailored questions and a full market analysis dashboard."}
  93 |           </p>
  94 |         </div>
  95 | 
  96 |         {/* Step indicator */}
  97 |         <div className="flex gap-0 bg-white border border-[#D6DFED] rounded p-1.5 mb-8">
  98 |           {["Personal Details", "Venture Context"].map((label, i) => (
  99 |             <div
 100 |               key={i}
 101 |               className={`flex-1 flex items-center gap-2 justify-center py-2 px-3 rounded-sm text-xs font-medium transition-all
 102 |                 ${step === i + 1 ? "bg-[#00338D] text-white" : step > i + 1 ? "text-[#00A3A1]" : "text-[#627289]"}`}
 103 |             >
 104 |               <span className={`w-4 h-4 rounded-full border-[1.5px] flex items-center justify-center text-[9px] font-bold
 105 |                 ${step === i + 1 ? "border-[#0091DA] bg-[#0091DA] text-white" : step > i + 1 ? "border-[#00A3A1]" : "border-current"}`}>
 106 |                 {step > i + 1 ? "âœ“" : i + 1}
 107 |               </span>
 108 |               {label}
 109 |             </div>
 110 |           ))}
 111 |         </div>
 112 | 
 113 |         {/* Progress */}
 114 |         <div className="h-0.5 bg-[#D6DFED] rounded mb-8 overflow-hidden">
 115 |           <div className="h-full bg-[#0091DA] rounded transition-all duration-500" style={{ width: step === 1 ? "50%" : "100%" }} />
 116 |         </div>
 117 | 
 118 |         {/* Card */}
 119 |         <div className="bg-white border border-[#D6DFED] rounded shadow-sm overflow-hidden relative">
 120 |           <div className="absolute top-0 left-0 right-0 h-[3px] bg-[#00338D]" />
 121 | 
 122 |           {step === 1 && (
 123 |             <div className="p-7">
 124 |               <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-6 pb-4 border-b border-[#D6DFED]">
 125 |                 <div className="w-10 h-10 bg-[#EEF2FB] rounded flex items-center justify-center text-lg">ðŸ‘¤</div>
 126 |                 <div>
 127 |                   <div className="text-sm font-bold text-[#08152A]">Personal Information</div>

 135 |                   <input className={inputCls("name")} placeholder="Jane Doe" value={form.name}
 136 |                     onChange={(e) => { set("name", e.target.value); clearErr("name"); }} />

 150 |                     onChange={(e) => { set("phone", e.target.value); clearErr("phone"); }} />
 151 |                   {errors.phone && <span className="text-[10px] text-red-500">{errors.phone}</span>}
 152 |                 </div>
 153 | 
 154 |                 <div className="flex flex-col gap-1.5">

 157 |                     onChange={(e) => { set("organization", e.target.value); clearErr("organization"); }} />

 163 |                   <select className={inputCls("role")} value={form.role}
 164 |                     onChange={(e) => { set("role", e.target.value); clearErr("role"); }}>
 165 |                     <option value="">Select your roleâ€¦</option>
 166 |                     {ROLES.map((r) => <option key={r}>{r}</option>)}
 167 |                   </select>
 168 |                   {errors.role && <span className="text-[10px] text-red-500">{errors.role}</span>}

   1 | -- ================================================================
   2 | --  Infopace â€” Supabase Database Setup
   3 | --  Run this entire file in: Supabase â†’ SQL Editor â†’ Run
   4 | -- ================================================================
   5 | 
   6 | -- 1. Create the submissions table
   7 | create table if not exists public.submissions (
   8 |   id            uuid        default gen_random_uuid() primary key,
   9 |   name          text        not null,
  10 |   email         text        not null,
  11 |   phone         text,
  12 |   organization  text,
  13 |   role          text,
  14 |   website       text,
  15 |   linkedin      text,
  16 |   team_size     text,
  17 |   sector        text,
  18 |   geography     text,
  19 |   problem       text,
  20 |   stage         text,
  21 |   answers       jsonb,
  22 |   overall_score integer,
  23 |   grade         text,
  24 |   dimensions    jsonb,
  25 |   analysis_json jsonb,
  26 |   created_at    timestamptz default now()
  27 | );
  28 | 
  29 | -- 2. Enable Row Level Security
  30 | alter table public.submissions enable row level security;
  31 | 
  32 | -- 3. Policy: anyone can INSERT (submit assessment)
  33 | create policy "Allow public inserts"
  34 |   on public.submissions
  35 |   for insert
  36 |   with check (true);
  37 | 
  38 | -- 4. Policy: anyone can SELECT (view results in-app)
  39 | --    Tighten this later if you add auth
  40 | create policy "Allow public reads"
  41 |   on public.submissions
  42 |   for select
  43 |   using (true);
  44 | 
  45 | -- 5. Optional: index on email for fast lookups
  46 | create index if not exists submissions_email_idx
  47 |   on public.submissions (email);
  48 | 
  49 | -- 6. Optional: index on created_at for dashboard sorting
  50 | create index if not exists submissions_created_at_idx
  51 |   on public.submissions (created_at desc);
  52 | 
  53 | -- ================================================================
  54 | --  DONE. You should see the `submissions` table in Table Editor.

===== C:\Users\admin\Downloads\infopace-react (1)\infopace-react\README.md =====
# Infopace â€” React + Supabase Edition

> AI-powered market intelligence assessment platform.
> Built with React + Vite + Tailwind CSS + Gemini AI + Supabase.

---

## What This App Does

1. **Onboarding Form** â€” Collects user details (name, email, phone, organization, role, website, LinkedIn, team size, sector, geography, problem statement, stage)
2. **AI Assessment** â€” Generates 8 tailored question groups using Gemini AI, with a live market score panel updating as you answer
3. **Results Dashboard** â€” Full market intelligence dashboard with:
   - Score donut + dimension bars + capability radar
   - Revenue projection chart (conservative / base / optimistic)
   - TAM / SAM / SOM estimates
   - Competitor analysis
   - Key AI-generated insights
   - 90-day action plan
   - Full printable report view
   - Raw JSON data view
4. **Supabase Storage** â€” Every submission (user details + all answers + full analysis) is saved to your Supabase database

---

## Prerequisites

- Node.js 18+
- A free [Gemini API key](https://aistudio.google.com) (already in `server.js`)
- A free [Supabase](https://supabase.com) project

---

## Quick Start

### Step 1 â€” Set up Supabase

1. Create a free project at [supabase.com](https://supabase.com)
2. Go to **SQL Editor** and paste + run the contents of `supabase_setup.sql`
3. Go to **Settings â†’ API** and copy:
   - **Project URL** (looks like `https://xxxx.supabase.co`)
   - **anon / public key** (long JWT string)

### Step 2 â€” Configure environment

```bash
cp .env.example .env
```

Edit `.env` and fill in your values:

```env
VITE_SUPABASE_URL=https://YOUR_PROJECT_ID.supabase.co
VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY=YOUR_ANON_PUBLIC_KEY
```

### Step 3 â€” Install dependencies

```bash
npm install
```

### Step 4 â€” Run the app (two terminals)

**Terminal 1** â€” Start the Gemini proxy server (port 4000):
```bash
node server.js
```

**Terminal 2** â€” Start the React dev server (port 3000):
```bash
npm run dev
```

Open **http://localhost:3000**

The Vite dev server automatically proxies `/api` requests to `server.js` on port 4000.

---

## Project Structure

```
infopace-react/
â”œâ”€â”€ server.js                    â† Gemini AI proxy (Node.js, port 4000)
â”œâ”€â”€ supabase_setup.sql           â† Run once in Supabase SQL Editor
â”œâ”€â”€ .env.example                 â† Copy to .env and fill in keys
â”‚
â”œâ”€â”€ index.html                   â† Vite entry HTML
â”œâ”€â”€ vite.config.js               â† Dev server + /api proxy config
â”œâ”€â”€ tailwind.config.js
â”œâ”€â”€ postcss.config.js
â”œâ”€â”€ package.json
â”‚
â””â”€â”€ src/
    â”œâ”€â”€ main.jsx                 â† React entry point
    â”œâ”€â”€ App.jsx                  â† Screen router (onboarding â†’ assessment â†’ results)
    â”œâ”€â”€ index.css                â† Tailwind + IBM Plex fonts
    â”‚
    â”œâ”€â”€ pages/
    â”‚   â”œâ”€â”€ OnboardingForm.jsx   â† Step 1: User & venture details
    â”‚   â”œâ”€â”€ AssessmentShell.jsx  â† Step 2: AI questions + live scoring
    â”‚   â””â”€â”€ ResultsDashboard.jsx â† Step 3: Full dashboard + report
    â”‚
    â””â”€â”€ lib/
        â”œâ”€â”€ supabase.js          â† Supabase client init
        â”œâ”€â”€ gemini.js            â† Gemini API helpers (questions + analysis)
        â””â”€â”€ db.js                â† Save / load submissions
```

---

## Data Saved to Supabase

Every completed assessment saves one row to the `submissions` table:

| Column | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `id` | uuid | Auto-generated primary key |
| `name` | text | Full name |
| `email` | text | Email address |
| `phone` | text | Phone number |
| `organization` | text | Company name |
| `role` | text | Job role |
| `website` | text | Website URL |
| `linkedin` | text | LinkedIn URL |
| `team_size` | text | Team size bracket |
| `sector` | text | e.g. "HealthTech", "B2B SaaS" |
| `geography` | text | e.g. "PI" (Pan India), "GL" (Global) |
| `problem` | text | Problem statement |
| `stage` | text | Business stage (1â€“5) |
| `answers` | jsonb | All question answers keyed by question ID |
| `overall_score` | integer | Final market score (0â€“100) |
| `grade` | text | e.g. "A", "B+", "C" |
| `dimensions` | jsonb | Six dimension scores |
| `analysis_json` | jsonb | Complete AI analysis (TAM/SAM/SOM, competitors, insights, action plan, projections) |
| `created_at` | timestamptz | Submission timestamp |

---

## Production Deployment

### Build the React app

```bash
npm run build
```

This creates a `dist/` folder.

### Serve with server.js

Update `server.js` to serve the `dist/` folder as static files. Replace the static file section at the bottom of `server.js` with:

```javascript
// Serve React build
let fp = req.url === '/' ? '/index.html' : req.url.split('?')[0];

// For React Router â€” serve index.html for unknown routes
const fullPath = path.join(process.cwd(), 'dist', fp);
fs.readFile(fullPath, (err, data) => {
  if (err) {
    // Fallback to index.html for client-side routing
    fs.readFile(path.join(process.cwd(), 'dist', 'index.html'), (e2, d2) => {
      if (e2) { res.writeHead(404); res.end('Not found'); return; }
      res.writeHead(200, { 'Content-Type': 'text/html' });
      res.end(d2);
    });
    return;
  }
  res.writeHead(200, { 'Content-Type': MIME[path.extname(fullPath)] || 'text/plain' });
  res.end(data);
});
```

Then run just `node server.js` â€” it serves both the API and the React app on port 4000.

### Deploy options

- **Railway / Render / Fly.io** â€” push repo, set env vars, run `node server.js`
- **Vercel** â€” deploy React app, add serverless function wrapping Gemini calls
- **VPS** â€” clone repo, `npm run build`, run with `pm2 start server.js`

---

## Customisation

### Change sectors / geographies
Edit the `SECTORS` and `GEO` arrays at the top of `src/pages/OnboardingForm.jsx`.

### Change AI models
Edit `MODEL_FAST` and `MODEL_SMART` constants in `server.js`.

### Change question count
Edit the prompt in `src/lib/gemini.js` â†’ `generateQuestions()`.

### Add email notifications
After `saveSubmission()` in `AssessmentShell.jsx`, call a Supabase Edge Function or a service like Resend/SendGrid.

---

## Troubleshooting

| Problem | Fix |
|---|---|
| `/api` returns 500 | Check Gemini API key on line 8 of `server.js` |
| Supabase save fails | Verify `.env` values and that `supabase_setup.sql` was run |
| Questions don't load | Gemini API key may be rate-limited; fallback questions will show |
| Blank dashboard | Open browser console â€” look for JSON parse errors in analysis response |

---

Infopace Management Pvt Ltd â€” Internal Use


===== C:\Users\admin\Downloads\infopace-react (1)\infopace-react\server.js =====
// ================================================================
//  Infopace Proxy Server â€” Gemini Edition (FREE)
//  1. Paste your Gemini API key on line 8
//     Get free key at: https://aistudio.google.com â†’ Get API Key
//  2. Run:  node server.js
//  3. Open: http://localhost:4000
// ================================================================

const API_KEY = 'AIzaSyAAYHBlfh9Jh42dyjKHlQfU3dzqvUOOhHc'; // â† paste your Gemini key here

// â”€â”€ Models â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
// Flash = fast + free (question generation)
// Pro   = smart + free (dashboard analysis)
const MODEL_FAST = 'gemini-2.5-flash';
const MODEL_SMART = 'gemini-2.5-flash';  // both use flash on free tier

// â”€â”€ No edits needed below â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
const http  = require('http');
const https = require('https');
const fs    = require('fs');
const path  = require('path');
const PORT  = 4000;

const MIME = {
  '.html':'text/html', '.js':'application/javascript',
  '.css':'text/css',   '.json':'application/json',
  '.png':'image/png',  '.ico':'image/x-icon', '.txt':'text/plain'
};

function geminiRequest(model, promptText, callback) {
  const payload = JSON.stringify({
    contents: [{ parts: [{ text: promptText }] }],
    generationConfig: {
      temperature: 0.7,
      maxOutputTokens: 8192,
      responseMimeType: 'text/plain'
    }
  });

  const options = {
    hostname: 'generativelanguage.googleapis.com',
    path: `/v1beta/models/${model}:generateContent?key=${API_KEY}`,
    method: 'POST',
    headers: {
      'Content-Type': 'application/json',
      'Content-Length': Buffer.byteLength(payload)
    }
  };

  const req = https.request(options, res => {
    let body = '';
    res.on('data', c => body += c);
    res.on('end', () => callback(null, res.statusCode, body));
  });
  req.on('error', e => callback(e, null, null));
  req.write(payload);
  req.end();
}

http.createServer((req, res) => {
  res.setHeader('Access-Control-Allow-Origin', '*');
  res.setHeader('Access-Control-Allow-Methods', 'GET, POST, OPTIONS');
  res.setHeader('Access-Control-Allow-Headers', 'Content-Type');
  if (req.method === 'OPTIONS') { res.writeHead(204); res.end(); return; }

  // â”€â”€ /api â†’ Gemini proxy â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
  if (req.url === '/api' && req.method === 'POST') {
    if (!API_KEY || API_KEY === 'YOUR_GEMINI_KEY_HERE') {
      res.writeHead(500, {'Content-Type':'application/json'});
      res.end(JSON.stringify({error:'Gemini API key not set. Edit line 8 of server.js'}));
      return;
    }

    let body = '';
    req.on('data', c => body += c);
    req.on('end', () => {
      let payload;
      try { payload = JSON.parse(body); }
      catch(e) { res.writeHead(400); res.end('bad json'); return; }

      const type   = payload._type || 'analysis';
      const prompt = payload.prompt || '';
      const model  = type === 'questions' ? MODEL_FAST : MODEL_SMART;

      console.log('  â†’  ' + type + ' (' + model + ')');

      geminiRequest(model, prompt, (err, status, respBody) => {
        if (err) {
          console.log('  âŒ Network error:', err.message);
          res.writeHead(502, {'Content-Type':'application/json'});
          res.end(JSON.stringify({error: err.message}));
          return;
        }

        const icon = status < 300 ? 'âœ…' : 'âŒ';
        console.log('  ' + icon + '  ' + status + '  ' + type);

        if (status !== 200) {
          try {
            const e = JSON.parse(respBody);
            console.log('      Error:', e.error?.message || respBody.slice(0,120));
          } catch(_) { console.log('      Raw:', respBody.slice(0,120)); }
        }

        // Convert Gemini response â†’ Anthropic-style response
        // so the HTML parsing code works without changes
        let anthropicStyle;
        try {
          const geminiData = JSON.parse(respBody);
          const text = (geminiData?.candidates?.[0]?.content?.parts||[])
            .map(p => p.text||'').join('');
          // Wrap in Anthropic content format
          anthropicStyle = JSON.stringify({
            candidates: geminiData.candidates,
            content: [{ type: 'text', text: text }]
          });
        } catch(_) {
          anthropicStyle = respBody;
        }

        res.writeHead(status, {
          'Content-Type': 'application/json',
          'Access-Control-Allow-Origin': '*'
        });
        res.end(anthropicStyle);
      });
    });
    return;
  }

  // â”€â”€ Static files â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
  let fp = req.url === '/' ? '/index.html' : req.url.split('?')[0];
  fp = path.join(process.cwd(), fp);
  fs.readFile(fp, (err, data) => {
    if (err) { res.writeHead(404); res.end('Not found'); return; }
    res.writeHead(200, {'Content-Type': MIME[path.extname(fp)] || 'text/plain'});
    res.end(data);
  });

}).listen(PORT, () => {
  const ok = API_KEY && API_KEY !== 'YOUR_GEMINI_KEY_HERE';
  console.log('');
  console.log('  Infopace â€” Gemini Edition (Free)');
  console.log('  â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€');
  console.log('  ðŸŒ  http://localhost:' + PORT);
  console.log('  ðŸ”‘  Gemini key: ' + (ok ? 'âœ… Set (' + API_KEY.slice(0,16) + '...)' : 'âŒ NOT SET â€” edit line 8'));
  console.log('  ðŸ¤–  Model: ' + MODEL_SMART);
  console.log('  â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€');
  if (!ok) {
    console.log('');
    console.log('  Get a free key at https://aistudio.google.com');
    console.log('  Then paste it on line 8 of server.js');
  }
  console.log('');
});


===== C:\Users\admin\Downloads\infopace-react (1)\infopace-react\supabase_setup.sql =====
-- ================================================================
--  Infopace â€” Supabase Database Setup
--  Run this entire file in: Supabase â†’ SQL Editor â†’ Run
-- ================================================================

-- 1. Create the submissions table
create table if not exists public.submissions (
  id            uuid        default gen_random_uuid() primary key,
  name          text        not null,
  email         text        not null,
  phone         text,
  organization  text,
  role          text,
  website       text,
  linkedin      text,
  team_size     text,
  sector        text,
  geography     text,
  problem       text,
  stage         text,
  answers       jsonb,
  overall_score integer,
  grade         text,
  dimensions    jsonb,
  analysis_json jsonb,
  created_at    timestamptz default now()
);

-- 2. Enable Row Level Security
alter table public.submissions enable row level security;

-- 3. Policy: anyone can INSERT (submit assessment)
create policy "Allow public inserts"
  on public.submissions
  for insert
  with check (true);

-- 4. Policy: anyone can SELECT (view results in-app)
--    Tighten this later if you add auth
create policy "Allow public reads"
  on public.submissions
  for select
  using (true);

-- 5. Optional: index on email for fast lookups
create index if not exists submissions_email_idx
  on public.submissions (email);

-- 6. Optional: index on created_at for dashboard sorting
create index if not exists submissions_created_at_idx
  on public.submissions (created_at desc);

-- ================================================================
--  DONE. You should see the `submissions` table in Table Editor.
-- ================================================================
