<script>
/* â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•
   API key is stored in server.js â€” no key needed here
â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â• */
window._APIKEY = 'USE_SERVER_KEY';

/* â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•
   GLOBALS & CHART SETUP
â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â• */
Chart.register(ChartDataLabels);
Chart.defaults.set('plugins.datalabels',{display:false});
Chart.defaults.font.family="'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif";
Chart.defaults.color='#627289';

const PAL=['#0091DA','#00A3A1','#4DAEDC','#7FDEBD','#005EB8','#6D2077','#E8A000','#9BB8DE'];
const PAL_GLOW=['rgba(0,145,218,0.8)','rgba(0,163,161,0.8)','rgba(77,174,220,0.8)','rgba(127,222,189,0.8)','rgba(0,94,184,0.8)','rgba(109,32,119,0.8)','rgba(232,160,0,0.8)','rgba(155,184,222,0.8)'];
const rga=(h,a)=>{const r=parseInt(h.slice(1,3),16),g=parseInt(h.slice(3,5),16),b=parseInt(h.slice(5,7),16);return `rgba(${r},${g},${b},${a})`;};
const GL={color:'rgba(8,21,42,0.06)',lineWidth:0.6};
const NG={display:false};
const TT={backgroundColor:'#08152A',titleColor:'#fff',bodyColor:'#BDD0EC',padding:{top:8,bottom:8,left:11,right:11},cornerRadius:3,borderColor:'rgba(0,145,218,0.3)',borderWidth:1,titleFont:{family:"'IBM Plex Sans'",weight:'700',size:10},bodyFont:{family:"'IBM Plex Sans'",size:9}};

let step=0, dashCharts={}, aiQs={}, worldData=null, dd={}, mapDrillMode=false;
const userTouched=new Set();

/* â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•
   FORM NAVIGATION
â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â• */
function pickPill(el,gid){
  const grp=gid?document.getElementById(gid):el.closest('.pills');
  grp.querySelectorAll('.pill').forEach(p=>p.classList.remove('on'));
  el.classList.add('on');
  userTouched.add(grp.id||gid);
  calcLive();
}
function pickAIPill(el){
  el.closest('.pills').querySelectorAll('.pill').forEach(p=>p.classList.remove('on'));
  el.classList.add('on');
  calcLive();
}

function goTo(s){
  document.querySelectorAll('.sec').forEach(x=>x.classList.remove('active'));
  document.getElementById('sec'+s).classList.add('active');
  for(let i=0;i<9;i++){const b=document.getElementById('sb'+i);if(!b)continue;b.classList.remove('active','done');if(i<s)b.classList.add('done');}
  document.getElementById('sb'+s).classList.add('active');
  step=s;
  document.getElementById('prevBtn').style.visibility=s===0?'hidden':'visible';
  document.getElementById('nextBtn').textContent=s===8?'Generate Dashboard â†’':'Next â†’';
  document.getElementById('nextBtn').className=s===8?'btn btn-go':'btn btn-primary';
  document.getElementById('slbl').textContent=`Step ${s+1} of 9`;
  document.getElementById('progBar').style.width=((s+1)/9*100)+'%';
}

function navigate(d){
  const n=step+d;
  if(n<0)return;
  if(n>8){buildDashboard();return;}
  if(step===0&&n===1&&ctxReady()){
    generateAIQuestions().then(()=>goTo(1));
  }else{
    goTo(n);
  }
}

function ctxReady(){return document.getElementById('sector').value&&document.getElementById('bizType').value&&document.getElementById('geo').value;}

function onCtxChange(){
  const s=document.getElementById('sector');
  const tag=document.getElementById('sectorTag');
  if(s.value){tag.textContent=s.options[s.selectedIndex].text.split('/')[0].trim();tag.classList.add('active');}
  else{tag.textContent='All Sectors';tag.classList.remove('active');}
  calcLive();
}

/* â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•
   LIVE SCORING
â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â• */
function calcLive(){
  // â”€â”€ Step 0 context fields â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
  const hasSector  = document.getElementById('sector').value?1:0;
  const hasBizType = document.getElementById('bizType').value?1:0;
  const hasGeo     = document.getElementById('geo').value?1:0;
  const probLen    = document.getElementById('problem').value.length;
  const probScore  = probLen>120?5:probLen>60?3:probLen>20?1:0;
  const stageVal   = +(document.querySelector('#stagePills .pill.on')?.dataset.val)||0;

  // Only score if context is filled
  const contextFilled = hasSector&&hasBizType&&hasGeo;

  // â”€â”€ Read actual selected values from AI questions â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
  // Each select has data-w (weight) and returns v (1-5)
  // We track which section each question belongs to via ID prefix
  const selScores={d1:[],d2:[],d3:[],d4:[],d5:[],d6:[]};

  // Map question IDs to dimensions
  // s1=Market Size(d1), s2=Audience(d2), s3=Competition(d3),
  // s4=Revenue(d4), s5=Risk(d5), s6=GTM(d4), s7=PMF(d2), s8=SectorFit(d6)
  const dimMap={'s1':'d1','s2':'d2','s3':'d3','s4':'d4','s5':'d5','s6':'d4','s7':'d2','s8':'d6','f1':'d1','f2':'d2','f3':'d3','f4':'d4','f5':'d5','f6':'d4','f7':'d2','f8':'d6'};

  document.querySelectorAll('.ai-sel').forEach(el=>{
    if(!el.value)return;
    const v=+(el.value)||0;          // actual selected value 1-5
    const w=+(el.dataset.w)||2;      // weight of this question
    const prefix=el.id.replace(/q\d+$/,'').replace(/^s/,'s').slice(0,2); // e.g. s1, s2
    const dim=dimMap[prefix]||dimMap[el.id.slice(0,2)]||'d1';
    (selScores[dim]=selScores[dim]||[]).push({v,w});
  });

  document.querySelectorAll('.ai-pills').forEach(grp=>{
    const on=grp.querySelector('.pill.on');
    if(!on)return;
    const v=+(on.dataset.val)||3;
    const id=grp.id||'';
    const prefix=id.slice(0,2);
    const dim=dimMap[prefix]||'d1';
    (selScores[dim]=selScores[dim]||[]).push({v,w:2});
  });

  document.querySelectorAll('.ai-chk:checked').forEach(el=>{
    const section=el.closest('.sec');
    const secId=section?.id||'sec1';
    const secNum=+secId.replace('sec','')||1;
    const dimKeys=['d1','d2','d3','d4','d5','d4','d2','d6'];
    const dim=dimKeys[secNum-1]||'d6';
    (selScores[dim]=selScores[dim]||[]).push({v:4,w:1}); // checkboxes = moderate positive
  });

  // â”€â”€ Calculate each dimension score (0-100) â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
  function dimScore(key){
    const items=selScores[key]||[];
    if(!items.length)return null; // not yet answered
    const totalW=items.reduce((s,i)=>s+i.w,0);
    const weighted=items.reduce((s,i)=>s+(i.v*i.w),0);
    // weighted average on 1-5 scale â†’ convert to 0-100
    return Math.round(((weighted/totalW)-1)/4*100);
  }

  const d1=dimScore('d1'); // Market Size
  const d2=dimScore('d2'); // Audience Quality
  const d3=dimScore('d3'); // Competition Edge
  const d4=dimScore('d4'); // Revenue Potential
  const d5=dimScore('d5'); // Risk Profile
  const d6=dimScore('d6'); // Sector Fit

  // â”€â”€ Context bonus (filling basics) â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
  // Max 15 points for context â€” NOT for just having a sector selected
  const contextBonus=contextFilled?(hasSector*3+hasBizType*3+hasGeo*2+probScore+Math.min(stageVal,5)):0;

  // â”€â”€ Overall score = weighted average of dims + context â”€
  // Dims that haven't been answered yet are excluded from average
  const answeredDims=[d1,d2,d3,d4,d5,d6].filter(v=>v!==null);
  let overall=0;
  if(!contextFilled||answeredDims.length===0){
    // Nothing meaningful answered â€” score is 0
    overall=0;
  } else {
    // Weighted: competition(d3) and revenue(d4) matter most
    const weights=[15,20,25,25,10,5]; // d1 d2 d3 d4 d5 d6
    const allDims=[d1,d2,d3,d4,d5,d6];
    let wSum=0, wTotal=0;
    allDims.forEach((v,i)=>{
      if(v!==null){wSum+=v*weights[i];wTotal+=weights[i];}
    });
    const dimAvg=wTotal>0?wSum/wTotal:0;

    // Context bonus adds up to 15 points on top of dim average
    // But only if at least 2 sections answered
    const bonus=answeredDims.length>=2?Math.round(contextBonus/15*15):0;
    overall=Math.min(100,Math.round(dimAvg*0.85+bonus));

    // Penalty: if less than 3 sections answered, cap score at 60
    if(answeredDims.length<3)overall=Math.min(overall,60);
    // Penalty: if problem statement too short, cap at 70
    if(probLen<40&&overall>70)overall=70;
  }

  // â”€â”€ Update UI â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
  const lsEl=document.getElementById('liveScore');
  const lgEl=document.getElementById('liveGrade');
  if(overall===0){
    lsEl.textContent='0';lsEl.className='big-sc sc-zero';
    lgEl.textContent='Fill in the form';lgEl.style.color='#9BAABB';
    document.getElementById('topScoreWrap').style.display='none';
    // Reset dim bars
    ['bf1','bf2','bf3','bf4','bf5','bf6'].forEach(id=>{const el=document.getElementById(id);if(el)el.style.width='0%';});
    ['d1lbl','d2lbl','d3lbl','d4lbl','d5lbl','d6lbl'].forEach(id=>{const el=document.getElementById(id);if(el)el.textContent='â€”';});
    return;
  }
  lsEl.textContent=overall;
  if(overall>=70){lsEl.className='big-sc sc-high';lgEl.textContent='High Potential âœ“';lgEl.style.color='#00A3A1';}
  else if(overall>=45){lsEl.className='big-sc sc-mid';lgEl.textContent='Moderate Potential';lgEl.style.color='#E8A000';}
  else{lsEl.className='big-sc sc-low';lgEl.textContent='Needs Strengthening';lgEl.style.color='#C8002D';}

  document.getElementById('topScoreWrap').style.display='flex';
  document.getElementById('topScore').textContent=overall+'/100';

  // â”€â”€ Update individual dimension bars â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
  const dimVals=[d1,d2,d3,d4,d5,d6];
  const dimColors=['#00338D','#0091DA','#E8A000','#005EB8','#6D2077','#00A3A1'];
  ['bf1','bf2','bf3','bf4','bf5','bf6'].forEach((id,i)=>{
    const el=document.getElementById(id);
    if(!el)return;
    const v=dimVals[i];
    el.style.width=(v!==null?v:0)+'%';
    el.style.background=dimColors[i];
  });
  ['d1lbl','d2lbl','d3lbl','d4lbl','d5lbl','d6lbl'].forEach((id,i)=>{
    const el=document.getElementById(id);
    if(!el)return;
    const v=dimVals[i];
    el.textContent=v!==null?v+'/100':'â€”';
  });

  buildLiveInsights(overall,{d1,d2,d3,d4,d5,d6});
}

function buildLiveInsights(t,dims){
  const sec=document.getElementById('sector').value;
  const geo=document.getElementById('geo').value;
  const items=[];
  dims=dims||{};

  // Score-based headline
  if(t>=70)items.push('Strong overall market potential â€” fundamentals solid across answered dimensions.');
  else if(t>=50)items.push('Moderate potential â€” see which dimensions below need strengthening.');
  else if(t>=30)items.push('Several dimensions are weak â€” fill more steps to get precise guidance.');
  else if(t>0)items.push('Early stage â€” complete all 9 steps for a full and accurate score.');

  // Dimension-specific insights â€” only shown when that dim is answered
  const dimNames={d1:'Market Size',d2:'Audience Quality',d3:'Competition Edge',d4:'Revenue Potential',d5:'Risk Profile',d6:'Sector Fit'};
  const weakDims=Object.entries(dims).filter(([,v])=>v!==null&&v<45).sort((a,b)=>a[1]-b[1]);
  const strongDims=Object.entries(dims).filter(([,v])=>v!==null&&v>=70).sort((a,b)=>b[1]-a[1]);

  if(weakDims.length>0){
    const [wk,wv]=weakDims[0];
    items.push(`âš ï¸ ${dimNames[wk]} scores ${wv}/100 â€” your weakest dimension. Focus here first.`);
  }
  if(strongDims.length>0){
    const [sk,sv]=strongDims[0];
    items.push(`âœ… ${dimNames[sk]} scores ${sv}/100 â€” your strongest signal to lead with.`);
  }

  // Sector-specific tips
  if(sec==='IT')items.push('SaaS: NRR above 110% is the single most bankable investor signal.');
  if(sec==='HC')items.push('HealthTech: CDSCO regulatory class determines your entire launch timeline.');
  if(sec==='FS')items.push('FinTech: India Stack (UPI+AA+eKYC) cuts onboarding cost by up to 80%.');
  if(geo==='T2')items.push('Tier 2/3 India: 60% of new internet users, 3Ã— less competition than metros.');

  if(items.length===0)items.push('Continue filling in steps for personalised insights.');
  document.getElementById('insightsList').innerHTML=items.slice(0,4).map(x=>
    `<div class="ins-item"><div class="ins-dot"></div><span>${x}</span></div>`).join('');
}

/* â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•
   GEO MINI MAP PREVIEW
â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â• */
const GEO_META={
  T1:{comp:'120+',tam:'â‚¹500Crâ€“â‚¹5,000Cr',gr:'18â€“35%',ids:[356]},
  T2:{comp:'30â€“80',tam:'â‚¹100Crâ€“â‚¹2,000Cr',gr:'25â€“50%',ids:[356]},
  PI:{comp:'150+',tam:'â‚¹500Crâ€“â‚¹10,000Cr',gr:'20â€“40%',ids:[356]},
  SA:{comp:'80â€“200',tam:'$2Bâ€“$50B',gr:'15â€“30%',ids:[356,50,524,144,586]},
  SE:{comp:'100â€“300',tam:'$5Bâ€“$80B',gr:'20â€“35%',ids:[764,360,458,608,702,704,116]},
  MEA:{comp:'50â€“150',tam:'$3Bâ€“$40B',gr:'12â€“25%',ids:[682,784,400,414,818,566,710]},
  EU:{comp:'200â€“500',tam:'â‚¬10Bâ€“â‚¬500B',gr:'8â€“18%',ids:[276,250,826,380,724,528,208,752]},
  NA:{comp:'300â€“1000',tam:'$20Bâ€“$1T',gr:'8â€“20%',ids:[840,124,484]},
  GL:{comp:'1000+',tam:'$50B+',gr:'12â€“25%',ids:[356,840,276,156,392,76,36]},
};
let miniWorld=null;
async function updateGeoPreview(){
  const gk=document.getElementById('geo').value;
  const meta=GEO_META[gk];
  if(!meta){document.getElementById('geoPreviewCard').style.display='none';return;}
  document.getElementById('geoPreviewCard').style.display='block';
  document.getElementById('gs-comp').textContent=meta.comp;
  document.getElementById('gs-tam').textContent=meta.tam.split('â€“')[0]+'â€¦';
  document.getElementById('gs-gr').textContent=meta.gr.split('â€“')[0]+'%+';
  try{
    if(!miniWorld){const r=await fetch('https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/world-atlas@2/countries-110m.json');miniWorld=await r.json();}
    const wrap=document.getElementById('geoPreviewCard');
    const W=wrap.offsetWidth-28||260;const H=100;
    const svgEl=document.getElementById('geo-mini-svg');
    svgEl.setAttribute('width',W);svgEl.setAttribute('height',H);svgEl.setAttribute('viewBox',`0 0 ${W} ${H}`);
    const svg=d3.select(svgEl);svg.selectAll('*').remove();
    svg.append('rect').attr('width',W).attr('height',H).attr('fill','#C8D8F0');
    const proj=d3.geoEquirectangular().fitSize([W,H],{type:'Sphere'});
    const pathFn=d3.geoPath().projection(proj);
    const countries=topojson.feature(miniWorld,miniWorld.objects.countries);
    svg.selectAll('path').data(countries.features).join('path')
      .attr('d',pathFn)
      .attr('fill',d=>meta.ids.includes(+d.id)?'#00338D':'#A8C0D8')
      .attr('stroke','rgba(255,255,255,0.6)').attr('stroke-width','0.3');
  }catch(e){console.warn('Geo preview map failed');}
}

/* â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•
   AI QUESTION GENERATION â€” 8 sections, market-potential focus
â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â• */
async function generateAIQuestions(){
  const sEl=document.getElementById('sector');
  const tEl=document.getElementById('bizType');
  const gEl=document.getElementById('geo');
  const sector=sEl.options[sEl.selectedIndex].text;
  const bizType=tEl.options[tEl.selectedIndex].text;
  const geo=gEl.options[gEl.selectedIndex].text;
  const problem=document.getElementById('problem').value||'Not specified';
  const bizName=document.getElementById('bizName').value||'the product';
  const stage=document.querySelector('#stagePills .pill.on')?.textContent||'Not specified';

  // Show skeletons while loading
  [1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8].forEach(i=>{
    const el=document.getElementById('q'+i);
    if(el)el.innerHTML='<div class="ql-skeleton"><div class="ql-skel-item"></div><div class="ql-skel-item"></div><div class="ql-skel-item"></div></div>';
  });

  try{
    // Retry with long wait for Gemini 429 rate limits (free tier = 15 req/min)
    const fetchWithRetry=async(url,opts,maxTries=2)=>{
      for(let attempt=1;attempt<=maxTries;attempt++){
        const r=await fetch(url,opts);
        if(r.status===429||r.status===529){
          if(attempt===maxTries) return r;
          const wait=62000; // Gemini free tier resets every 60s â€” wait 62s
          [1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8].forEach(i=>{
            const el=document.getElementById('q'+i);
            if(el)el.innerHTML=`<div style="padding:16px;font-size:12px;color:#627289;text-align:center">â³ Rate limit reached â€” waiting 62s for Gemini free tier resetâ€¦<br><br><span style="font-size:10px;color:#9BAABB">(Free tier: 15 requests/min. This is normal.)</span></div>`;
          });
          // Countdown display
          let remaining=62;
          const timer=setInterval(()=>{
            remaining--;
            [1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8].forEach(i=>{
              const el=document.getElementById('q'+i);
              if(el)el.innerHTML=`<div style="padding:16px;font-size:12px;color:#627289;text-align:center">â³ Rate limit â€” retrying in <strong style="color:#00338D">${remaining}s</strong>â€¦<br><br><span style="font-size:10px;color:#9BAABB">Gemini free tier resets every 60 seconds.</span></div>`;
            });
            if(remaining<=0)clearInterval(timer);
          },1000);
          await new Promise(res=>setTimeout(res,wait));
          clearInterval(timer);
          continue;
        }
        if(r.status>=500&&attempt<maxTries){
          await new Promise(res=>setTimeout(res,3000));
          continue;
        }
        return r;
      }
    };

    const _KEY='USE_SERVER_KEY';
    const resp=await fetchWithRetry('/api',{
      method:'POST',
      headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},
      body:JSON.stringify({
        _type:'questions',
        prompt:`Generate 8 JSON question sections for market assessment.
Sector:${sector} | Type:${bizType} | Geo:${geo} | Product:${bizName} | Stage:${stage}
Problem:${problem}

Rules: Questions 100% specific to ${sector}+${bizType}+${geo}. 4 questions per section. Types: select(options with t+v 1-5), pills(options t only), checks(options t only). Options under 35 chars.

Return ONLY this JSON structure, no markdown:
{"sb8txt":"<2 words>","d6name":"<dimension>","sections":[
{"id":1,"title":"Market Size & TAM","icon":"ðŸ“Š","subtitle":"${sector} TAM in ${geo}","questions":[
{"id":"s1q1","label":"<specific TAM question>","hint":"<real â‚¹Cr/$B benchmark>","type":"select","w":3,"options":[{"t":"Above â‚¹10,000Cr","v":5},{"t":"â‚¹1,000â€“10,000Cr","v":4},{"t":"â‚¹100â€“1,000Cr","v":3},{"t":"â‚¹10â€“100Cr","v":2},{"t":"Under â‚¹10Cr","v":1}]},
{"id":"s1q2","label":"<specific CAGR question>","hint":"<real sector CAGR>","type":"pills","options":[{"t":">50% YoY"},{"t":"25â€“50%"},{"t":"10â€“25%"},{"t":"5â€“10%"},{"t":"<5%"}]},
{"id":"s1q3","label":"<specific segment question>","hint":"<real gap insight>","type":"select","w":4,"options":[{"t":"<opt1>","v":5},{"t":"<opt2>","v":4},{"t":"<opt3>","v":3},{"t":"<opt4>","v":2},{"t":"<opt5>","v":1}]},
{"id":"s1q4","label":"<specific tailwinds>","hint":"<real context>","type":"checks","options":[{"t":"<item1>"},{"t":"<item2>"},{"t":"<item3>"},{"t":"<item4>"},{"t":"<item5>"},{"t":"<item6>"}]}
]},
{"id":2,"title":"Buyer Quality & WTP","icon":"ðŸŽ¯","subtitle":"${bizType} buyers in ${sector}","questions":[<4 specific questions>]},
{"id":3,"title":"Competitive Landscape","icon":"âš”ï¸","subtitle":"${sector} competition in ${geo}","questions":[<4 specific questions>]},
{"id":4,"title":"Revenue & Unit Economics","icon":"ðŸ’°","subtitle":"Monetisation for ${sector}","questions":[<4 specific questions>]},
{"id":5,"title":"Risk & Market Timing","icon":"âš ï¸","subtitle":"${sector} risks in ${geo}","questions":[<4 specific questions>]},
{"id":6,"title":"Go-to-Market Power","icon":"ðŸš€","subtitle":"GTM for ${geo}","questions":[<4 specific questions>]},
{"id":7,"title":"Output & PMF Signal","icon":"ðŸ“¤","subtitle":"Validation evidence","questions":[<4 specific questions>]},
{"id":8,"title":"${sector} Deep-Dive","icon":"ðŸ”¬","subtitle":"${sector}-specific depth","questions":[<4 highly specific ${sector} questions>]}
]}`
      })});

    // â”€â”€ Gemini response parsing â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
    if(!resp.ok) throw new Error('HTTP '+resp.status);
    const data=await resp.json();
    const allText=(data?.candidates?.[0]?.content?.parts||[]).map(p=>p.text||'').join('');
    if(!allText) throw new Error('Empty response from API');

    // Strip any markdown fences the model may have added
    let raw=allText.trim();
    const fenceMatch=raw.match(/```(?:json)?\s*([\s\S]*?)```/);
    if(fenceMatch) raw=fenceMatch[1].trim();

    // Find the outermost { â€¦ } â€” handles leading prose
    const start=raw.indexOf('{');
    const end=raw.lastIndexOf('}');
    if(start===-1||end===-1) throw new Error('No JSON object found in response');
    raw=raw.slice(start,end+1);

    // Attempt parse; on failure try to repair truncated JSON
    let parsed;
    try{
      parsed=JSON.parse(raw);
    }catch(parseErr){
      // Repair: truncate to last complete section by finding last complete "}]}" pattern
      const repaired=repairTruncatedJSON(raw);
      parsed=JSON.parse(repaired);
    }

    aiQs=parsed;
    if(aiQs.sb8txt)document.getElementById('sb8txt').textContent=aiQs.sb8txt;
    if(aiQs.d6name)document.getElementById('d6name').textContent=aiQs.d6name;
    if(aiQs.realTimeData)window._rtData=aiQs.realTimeData;

    if(!Array.isArray(aiQs.sections)||aiQs.sections.length===0) throw new Error('No sections in parsed JSON');
    aiQs.sections.forEach((sec,i)=>renderSection(i+1,sec));

  }catch(e){
    console.warn('AI question gen failed, using fallback:',e.message);
    useFallbackQuestions(sector,bizType,geo);
  }
}

/* Repair a truncated JSON string by closing any open structures */
function repairTruncatedJSON(s){
  // Walk the string tracking depth; truncate at last complete top-level section
  // Strategy: find the last occurrence of "}]}" or "}]," and close from there
  let best=s;
  // Try progressively shorter slices to find parseable JSON
  for(let i=s.length-1;i>s.length*0.4;i--){
    const c=s[i];
    if(c==='}'){
      try{
        const candidate=closeJSON(s.slice(0,i+1));
        JSON.parse(candidate);
        best=candidate;
        break;
      }catch(_){}
    }
  }
  return best;
}

function closeJSON(s){
  // Count open brackets/braces
  let depth=0; const stack=[];
  for(const c of s){
    if(c==='{'){stack.push('}');}
    else if(c==='['){stack.push(']');}
    else if(c==='}'||c===']'){stack.pop();}
  }
  // Close any trailing comma before we close
  let result=s.replace(/,\s*$/,'');
  return result+stack.reverse().join('');
}

function renderSection(idx,sec){
  const el=document.getElementById('q'+idx);
  if(!el||!sec)return;
  let html=`<div class="sec-hd"><div class="sec-icon">${sec.icon||'ðŸ“‹'}</div><div><div class="sec-ttl">${sec.title}</div><div class="sec-sub">${sec.subtitle||''}</div></div></div><div class="fg">`;
  (sec.questions||[]).forEach(q=>{
    const wide=q.type==='checks'||q.type==='textarea';
    html+=`<div class="fd ${wide?'s2':''}">`;
    html+=`<label>${q.label}</label>`;
    if(q.hint)html+=`<div class="hint">ðŸ’¡ ${q.hint}</div>`;
    if(q.type==='select'){
      html+=`<select class="ai-sel" id="${q.id}" data-w="${q.w||2}" onchange="calcLive()"><option value="">Selectâ€¦</option>`;
      (q.options||[]).forEach(o=>{html+=`<option value="${o.v}">${o.t}</option>`;});
      html+=`</select>`;
    }else if(q.type==='pills'){
      html+=`<div class="pills ai-pills" id="${q.id}_pills">`;
      (q.options||[]).forEach(o=>{html+=`<span class="pill" data-val="${o.v||3}" onclick="pickAIPill(this)">${o.t}</span>`;});
      html+=`</div>`;
    }else if(q.type==='checks'){
      html+=`<div class="ckg">`;
      (q.options||[]).forEach(o=>{html+=`<label class="cki"><input type="checkbox" class="ai-chk" onchange="calcLive()"> ${o.t}</label>`;});
      html+=`</div>`;
    }else if(q.type==='text'){
      html+=`<input type="text" class="ai-txt" id="${q.id}" placeholder="${q.placeholder||'Enter valueâ€¦'}" oninput="calcLive()"/>`;
    }
    html+=`</div>`;
  });
  html+=`</div>`;
  el.innerHTML=html;
}

    {id:5,title:'Risk, Regulatory & Market Timing',icon:'âš ï¸',subtitle:'Execution risk, compliance burden, and window of opportunity',questions:[

      {id:'f5c',label:'Team Execution Capability',hint:'Domain expertise + prior successful exits is the strongest signal investors look for',type:'select',w:3,options:[{t:'Serial founders, domain experts, prior exits',v:5},{t:'Domain experts, first startup',v:4},{t:'Relevant experience, filling key gaps',v:3},{t:'Limited domain experience',v:2},{t:'First-time, no domain background',v:1}]},
      {id:'f5d',label:'Market Timing Assessment',hint:'India SaaS, AI, CleanTech are in "just right" timing in 2024-25',type:'pills',options:[{t:'Too Early (5+ years ahead)',v:2},{t:'Slightly Early (2â€“3 years)',v:3},{t:'Just Right âœ“',v:5},{t:'Slightly Late (competition entrenched)',v:3},{t:'Too Late (market consolidated)',v:1}]},
      {id:'f5e',label:'Key External Risk Factors',hint:'These are macro risks that can derail even well-executed plans',type:'checks',options:[{t:'Regulatory change risk'},{t:'Incumbent retaliation risk'},{t:'Economic downturn sensitivity'},{t:'Technology disruption risk'},{t:'Talent shortage in this sector'},{t:'Currency / FX exposure'}]}
    ]},
    {id:6,title:'Go-to-Market & Distribution Power',icon:'ðŸš€',subtitle:`Channel strategy, acquisition model, and GTM velocity for ${geo}`,questions:[
      {id:'f6a',label:'Primary Customer Acquisition Channel',hint:'The best GTM channels are those your competition is NOT using effectively',type:'select',w:4,options:[{t:'Direct Sales / Inside Sales',v:4},{t:'Channel Partners / Resellers',v:4},{t:'Product-Led Growth (PLG)',v:5},{t:'Inbound / Content Marketing',v:3},{t:'Events / Conferences',v:3},{t:'Government / Tender channel',v:3},{t:'Referral / Community',v:5}]},
      {id:'f6b',label:'Estimated Customer Acquisition Cost (CAC)',hint:'India B2B SaaS typical CAC: â‚¹15Kâ€“â‚¹2L depending on deal size and segment',type:'select',w:3,options:[{t:'Under â‚¹5,000',v:5},{t:'â‚¹5Kâ€“â‚¹25K',v:4},{t:'â‚¹25Kâ€“â‚¹1L',v:3},{t:'â‚¹1Lâ€“â‚¹5L',v:2},{t:'Above â‚¹5 Lakh',v:1}]},
      {id:'f6c',label:'Partnership Leverage Opportunities',hint:'Distribution partnerships can 10Ã— your GTM velocity without proportional cost',type:'checks',options:[{t:'System Integrator (SI) partnerships'},{t:'Bank / NBFC co-distribution'},{t:'Hospital / Clinic network'},{t:'Government ecosystem tie-up'},{t:'E-commerce marketplace listing'},{t:'Industry association membership'},{t:'OEM / white-label licensing'}]},

      {id:'f8a',label:'Sector Technology Adoption Maturity',hint:'Adoption curve position determines your marketing spend and sales friction',type:'select',w:3,options:[{t:'Innovators / Early Adopters (top 15%)',v:5},{t:'Early Majority (mainstream adoption starting)',v:4},{t:'Late Majority (most peers already use)',v:2},{t:'Laggards (resistant)',v:1}]},

  aiQs={sections:fallback};

/* â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•
   COLLECT FORM DATA
â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â• */
function collectData(){
  const gopt=id=>{const el=document.getElementById(id);return el?.options[el.selectedIndex]?.text||'';};
  const getv=id=>document.getElementById(id)?.value||'';
  const answers={};
  document.querySelectorAll('.ai-sel').forEach(el=>{answers[el.id]=el.options[el.selectedIndex]?.text||'';});
  document.querySelectorAll('.ai-pills').forEach(grp=>{const on=grp.querySelector('.pill.on');if(on)answers[grp.id]=on.textContent;});
  document.querySelectorAll('.ai-txt').forEach(el=>{if(el.value)answers[el.id]=el.value;});
  const chkGroups={};
  document.querySelectorAll('.ai-chk:checked').forEach(el=>{const g=el.closest('.ckg')?.parentElement?.querySelector('label')?.textContent||'checks';chkGroups[g]=(chkGroups[g]||[]);chkGroups[g].push(el.parentElement.textContent.trim());});
  Object.assign(answers,chkGroups);
  return {
    bizName:getv('bizName')||'Unnamed Business',
    sector:gopt('sector'),sectorCode:getv('sector'),
    bizType:gopt('bizType'),bizTypeCode:getv('bizType'),
    geo:gopt('geo'),geoCode:getv('geo'),
    problem:getv('problem')||'Not described',
    stage:document.querySelector('#stagePills .pill.on')?.textContent||'Not specified',
    answers,
  };
}

/* â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•
   LOADER
â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â• */
function setLoader(n,msg,pct){
  for(let i=1;i<=5;i++){const el=document.getElementById('ls'+i);if(!el)continue;el.className='ld-step'+(i<n?' done':i===n?' active':'');}
  document.getElementById('ldStatus').textContent=msg||'';
  document.getElementById('ldBar').style.width=(pct||0)+'%';
}
function showLoader(){document.getElementById('assessShell').style.display='none';document.getElementById('loaderShell').style.display='flex';}
function hideLoader(){document.getElementById('loaderShell').style.display='none';}

/* â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•
   MAIN BUILD
â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â• */
async function buildDashboard(){
  const fd=collectData();
  showLoader();
  setLoader(1,'Reading your inputsâ€¦',8);
  await tick(200);
  let analysis;
  try{
    setLoader(2,`Searching live ${fd.sector} market data in ${fd.geo}â€¦`,25);
    await tick(150);
    setLoader(3,'Fetching real-time competitor profiles & funding dataâ€¦',48);
    analysis=await callAPI(fd);
    setLoader(4,'Calculating TAM/SAM/SOM, scores & 12-month projectionsâ€¦',75);
    await tick(300);
    setLoader(5,'Assembling your market intelligence dashboardâ€¦',95);
    await tick(400);
  }catch(e){
    console.warn('API failed, using fallback:',e.message);
    setLoader(5,'Running offline analysisâ€¦',95);
    analysis=offlineAnalysis(fd);
    await tick(600);
  }
  renderDash(fd,analysis);
}
const tick=ms=>new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,ms));

/* â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•
   CLAUDE API CALL
â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â• */
async function callAPI(fd){
  const answersText=Object.entries(fd.answers).map(([k,v])=>`â€¢ ${k}: ${Array.isArray(v)?v.join(', '):v}`).join('\n')||'(form answers not yet filled)';
  const rtData=window._rtData||{};
  // Build a clean, readable answers summary for Gemini
  const answerLines=Object.entries(fd.answers)
    .filter(([,v])=>v&&v!==''&&!(Array.isArray(v)&&v.length===0))
    .map(([k,v])=>`  - ${Array.isArray(v)?v.join(', '):v}`)
    .join('\n');

  const prompt=`You are a senior market intelligence analyst with deep knowledge of Indian and global markets.

Analyse this product and produce a data-driven market assessment using your real knowledge of this sector, geography, and companies.

PRODUCT: ${fd.bizName}
SECTOR: ${fd.sector}
BUSINESS TYPE: ${fd.bizType}  
TARGET GEOGRAPHY: ${fd.geo}
BUSINESS STAGE: ${fd.stage}
PROBLEM BEING SOLVED: ${fd.problem}

WHAT THE FOUNDER TOLD US ABOUT THEIR MARKET:
${answerLines||'(answers not provided)'}

CRITICAL INSTRUCTIONS:
1. Use your REAL knowledge of the ${fd.sector} market in ${fd.geo} â€” cite real TAM figures, real CAGR rates
2. Name REAL competitors that actually exist in ${fd.sector} in ${fd.geo} â€” not placeholders
3. Score those competitors based on your actual knowledge of their market position
4. Revenue by region must reflect real market concentration for ${fd.sector} in ${fd.geo}
5. The overall score must genuinely reflect the founder's answers above
6. TAM/SAM/SOM must be realistic for this specific sector and geography

Return ONLY raw JSON, no markdown fences, no explanation before or after:
{
"overallScore": <0-100, genuine assessment based on answers above>,
"grade": "Excellent" or "Strong" or "Moderate" or "Needs Work" or "Critical",
"verdict": "<One specific sentence naming ${fd.bizName}, its key opportunity in ${fd.geo}, and its biggest risk>",
"realTimeInsight": "<One real market fact about ${fd.sector} in ${fd.geo} with actual numbers>",
"dimensions": {"marketSize":<0-100>,"audienceQuality":<0-100>,"competitionEdge":<0-100>,"revenuePotential":<0-100>,"riskProfile":<0-100>,"sectorFit":<0-100>},
"tamCrore": <realistic TAM for ${fd.sector} in ${fd.geo} in â‚¹Crore>,
"samCrore": <serviceable portion>,
"somCrore": <3-year realistic target for ${fd.bizName}>,
"growthRate": <real CAGR % for ${fd.sector} in ${fd.geo}>,
"competitorProfiles": [
  {"name":"<REAL company 1>","stage":"<actual funding/size>","strength":"<real strength>","weakness":"<real gap>","marketSharePct":<realistic %>},
  {"name":"<REAL company 2>","stage":"<actual funding/size>","strength":"<real strength>","weakness":"<real gap>","marketSharePct":<realistic %>},
  {"name":"<REAL company 3>","stage":"<actual funding/size>","strength":"<real strength>","weakness":"<real gap>","marketSharePct":<realistic %>}
],
"marketShare": [
  {"name":"${fd.bizName}","pct":<realistic 3yr target 1-10%>,"val":"â‚¹<somCrore>Cr"},
  {"name":"<real comp 1>","pct":<their actual market share %>,"val":"â‚¹<amount>Cr"},
  {"name":"<real comp 2>","pct":<their actual market share %>,"val":"â‚¹<amount>Cr"},
  {"name":"<real comp 3>","pct":<their actual market share %>,"val":"â‚¹<amount>Cr"},
  {"name":"Others","pct":<remainder>,"val":"â€”"}
],
"revenueByRegion": {
  "labels": [<5-6 real cities/regions for ${fd.geo} relevant to ${fd.sector}>],
  "currentMarket": [<real â‚¹Cr market size per city based on sector concentration>],
  "projected2027": [<apply growthRate CAGR to currentMarket>],
  "ourTarget": [<realistic target for ${fd.bizName} â€” 2-8% of each city market>]
},
"competitorRadar": [
  {"name":"${fd.bizName}","scores":{"pricingPower":<0-100>,"distribution":<0-100>,"brandValue":<0-100>,"innovation":<0-100>,"marketReach":<0-100>,"customerSat":<0-100>},"avg":"<average>"},
  {"name":"<real comp 1>","scores":{"pricingPower":<based on real knowledge>,"distribution":<n>,"brandValue":<n>,"innovation":<n>,"marketReach":<n>,"customerSat":<n>},"avg":"<average>"},
  {"name":"<real comp 2>","scores":{"pricingPower":<n>,"distribution":<n>,"brandValue":<n>,"innovation":<n>,"marketReach":<n>,"customerSat":<n>},"avg":"<average>"},
  {"name":"<real comp 3>","scores":{"pricingPower":<n>,"distribution":<n>,"brandValue":<n>,"innovation":<n>,"marketReach":<n>,"customerSat":<n>},"avg":"<average>"}
],
"trendData": {
  "months": ["Apr","May","Jun","Jul","Aug","Sep","Oct","Nov","Dec","Jan","Feb","Mar"],
  "series": [
    {"label":"${fd.bizName}","dash":[],"data":[<12 monthly values: start 0-1%, grow steadily to 3-8% by month 12>]},
    {"label":"<real comp 1 name>","dash":[],"data":[<12 monthly values: their current share ~20-35%, slight growth with natural fluctuation>]},
    {"label":"<real comp 2 name>","dash":[],"data":[<12 monthly values: their current share ~15-25%, slight growth with natural fluctuation>]},
    {"label":"<real comp 3 name>","dash":[],"data":[<12 monthly values: their current share ~10-20%, slight growth>]}
  ]
},
"geoRegions": {
  "Asia Pacific": {"rev":"<GLOBAL sector market size in this region e.g. â‚¹5000Cr or $8B>","pct":"<% of global sector TAM>","ids":[4,50,156,356,360,392,410,458,702,704,764,840]},
  "North America": {"rev":"<global sector market size in N.America>","pct":"<% of global sector TAM>","ids":[124,484,840]},
  "South America": {"rev":"<global sector market size in S.America>","pct":"<% of global sector TAM>","ids":[32,68,76,152,170]},
  "Europe": {"rev":"<global sector market size in Europe>","pct":"<% of global sector TAM>","ids":[276,250,826,380,724,528,208,752,756,616]},
  "Africa": {"rev":"<global sector market size in Africa>","pct":"<% of global sector TAM>","ids":[566,710,404,818,12]}
},
NOTE: These are GLOBAL sector market sizes per region â€” NOT the product revenue. Even if the product only targets India, show the total sector opportunity in each world region so investors can see the global picture.
"keyInsights": [
  "<Real market insight about ${fd.sector} in ${fd.geo} with specific numbers>",
  "<Specific insight about the named competitors and their weaknesses>",
  "<Unit economics insight specific to ${fd.bizType} in this sector>",
  "<Risk insight specific to ${fd.sector} in ${fd.geo}>",
  "<Concrete 90-day action recommendation for ${fd.bizName}>"
],
"topRisks": ["<most critical risk with specifics>","<second risk>","<third risk>"],
"quickWins": ["<30-day win with measurable outcome>","<second win>","<third win>"],
"popups": {
  "mktshare": "<2 sentences: TAM/SAM/SOM with real numbers + competitor context>",
  "revregion": "<2 sentences: which cities/regions are highest priority and why>",
  "radar": "<2 sentences: where ${fd.bizName} leads and trails vs named competitors>",
  "trend": "<2 sentences: trajectory analysis and expected inflection point>",
  "geomap": "<2 sentences: geographic focus rationale with real market data>"
}
}`;

  // Exponential backoff helper (shared pattern)
  const fetchWithRetry=async(url,opts,maxTries=3)=>{
    for(let attempt=1;attempt<=maxTries;attempt++){
      const r=await fetch(url,opts);
      if((r.status===429||r.status===529||r.status>=500)&&attempt<maxTries){
        await new Promise(res=>setTimeout(res,Math.min(2000*Math.pow(2,attempt-1),16000)));
        continue;
      }
      return r;
    }
  };

  const _KEY2='USE_SERVER_KEY';
  const resp=await fetchWithRetry('/api',{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify({
    _type:'analysis',
    prompt:prompt})});
  // â”€â”€ Gemini response parsing â”€â”€
  if(!resp.ok) throw new Error('HTTP '+resp.status);
  const data=await resp.json();
  const allText=(data?.candidates?.[0]?.content?.parts||[]).map(p=>p.text||'').join('');
  if(!allText) throw new Error('Empty API response');

  // Strip markdown fences
  let raw=allText.trim();
  const fm=raw.match(/```(?:json)?\s*([\s\S]*?)```/);
  if(fm) raw=fm[1].trim();

  // Find outermost JSON object
  const s0=raw.indexOf('{'), e0=raw.lastIndexOf('}');
  if(s0===-1||e0===-1) throw new Error('No JSON in response');
  raw=raw.slice(s0,e0+1);

  // Parse with truncation repair fallback
  let parsed;
  try{ parsed=JSON.parse(raw); }
  catch(_){
    try{ parsed=JSON.parse(repairTruncatedJSON(raw)); }
    catch(e2){ throw new Error('JSON parse failed: '+e2.message); }
  }
  // Merge Gemini response with offline fallback for any missing fields
  // This ensures we ALWAYS use real AI data where available, fill gaps from fallback
  if(!parsed||typeof parsed!=='object'){
    throw new Error('No valid JSON from Gemini');
  }
  console.log('Gemini returned fields:', Object.keys(parsed).join(', '));
  // Return what we got â€” renderDash has guards for missing fields
  return parsed;
}

/* â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•
   OFFLINE FALLBACK â€” realistic sector-calibrated values
â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â• */
function offlineAnalysis(fd){
  const sc=fd.sectorCode;
  const gc=fd.geoCode;
  const isIndia=['T1','T2','PI'].includes(gc);
  const TAM={IT:2800,HC:1400,FS:3500,EC:8000,ED:650,MF:12000,RE:6000,LG:4500,ME:1200,AG:900,EN:2200,OT:500};
  const GR={IT:28,HC:22,FS:25,EC:35,ED:30,MF:15,RE:12,LG:14,ME:18,AG:20,EN:32,OT:18};
  const tamC=(TAM[sc]||500)*(isIndia?0.18:1.0);
  const gr=GR[sc]||20;
  const t=+document.getElementById('liveScore').textContent||50;
  const tgtPct=Math.round(2+t/100*8);

  // Always use sector default competitors â€” never fall back to empty
  const defComps={
    IT:['Zoho','Freshworks','LeadSquared'],
    HC:['Practo','Mfine','Portea'],
    FS:['Razorpay','Zerodha','PayU'],
    EC:['Meesho','Flipkart','Nykaa'],
    ED:["BYJU'S",'Unacademy','upGrad'],
    MF:['Tata Technologies','L&T','Mahindra'],
    RE:['NoBroker','MagicBricks','99acres'],
    LG:['Delhivery','Ecom Express','Shiprocket'],
    ME:['Zee5','SonyLiv','MXPlayer'],
    AG:['DeHaat','Ninjacart','Agristack'],
    EN:['ReNew Power','Greenko','Adani Green'],
    OT:['Competitor A','Competitor B','Competitor C']
  };
  const compList=(defComps[sc]||['Competitor A','Competitor B','Competitor C']).slice(0,3);

  const rem=100-tgtPct;
  const spl=[0.35,0.27,0.20,0.12];

  // Market share â€” always 5 entries: product + 3 competitors + Others
  const mshare=[
    {name:fd.bizName, pct:tgtPct, val:'â‚¹'+Math.round(tamC*tgtPct/100)+'Cr'},
    {name:compList[0], pct:Math.round(rem*spl[0]), val:'â‚¹'+Math.round(tamC*rem*spl[0]/100)+'Cr'},
    {name:compList[1], pct:Math.round(rem*spl[1]), val:'â‚¹'+Math.round(tamC*rem*spl[1]/100)+'Cr'},
    {name:compList[2], pct:Math.round(rem*spl[2]), val:'â‚¹'+Math.round(tamC*rem*spl[2]/100)+'Cr'},
    {name:'Others',    pct:Math.max(1,100-tgtPct-Math.round(rem*spl[0])-Math.round(rem*spl[1])-Math.round(rem*spl[2])), val:'â€”'}
  ];

  // Competitor profiles â€” always populated
  const compProfiles=compList.map((name,i)=>({
    name,
    stage:['Series C / Listed','Series B','Series A'][i]||'Funded',
    strength:['Wide distribution & brand recognition','Strong product depth & retention','Aggressive pricing & SME focus'][i]||'Established market presence',
    weakness:['Weak Tier 2/3 penetration','Poor UX for non-tech users','Limited enterprise features'][i]||'Slower innovation cycle',
    marketSharePct:Math.round(rem*spl[i])
  }));

  // Cities / regions â€” per sector for realistic city names
  const cityMap={
    IT:  ['Mumbai','Delhi NCR','Bangalore','Hyderabad','Chennai','Pune'],
    HC:  ['Mumbai','Delhi','Bangalore','Hyderabad','Chennai','Pune'],
    FS:  ['Mumbai','Delhi NCR','Bangalore','Hyderabad','Chennai','Pune'],
    EC:  ['Mumbai','Delhi','Bangalore','Hyderabad','Chennai','Kolkata'],
    ED:  ['Mumbai','Delhi','Bangalore','Hyderabad','Chennai','Pune'],
    MF:  ['Mumbai','Pune','Chennai','Hyderabad','Surat','Ahmedabad'],
    RE:  ['Mumbai','Delhi NCR','Bangalore','Hyderabad','Chennai','Pune'],
    LG:  ['Mumbai','Delhi','Bangalore','Chennai','Hyderabad','Kolkata'],
    ME:  ['Mumbai','Delhi','Bangalore','Hyderabad','Chennai','Pune'],
    AG:  ['Delhi','Hyderabad','Bangalore','Pune','Chennai','Mumbai'],
    EN:  ['Ahmedabad','Mumbai','Delhi','Bangalore','Hyderabad','Chennai'],
    OT:  ['Mumbai','Delhi','Bangalore','Hyderabad','Chennai','Pune']
  };
  const intlCities=['Asia Pacific','North America','Europe','South America','Africa','ROW'];
  const cities=isIndia?(cityMap[sc]||cityMap.OT):intlCities;

  const base=tamC/cities.length;
  const mults=[1.25,1.05,1.35,0.85,0.70,0.65];

  const months=['Apr','May','Jun','Jul','Aug','Sep','Oct','Nov','Dec','Jan','Feb','Mar'];
  const ttmMo=3;
  const ourTrend=months.map((_,i)=>i<ttmMo?0:+((tgtPct*(i-ttmMo+1)/10)).toFixed(1));
  const c1Trend=months.map((_,i)=>+(rem*0.35*(0.88+i*0.008)+Math.sin(i*0.8)*0.6).toFixed(1));
  const c2Trend=months.map((_,i)=>+(rem*0.27*(0.82+i*0.007)+Math.sin(i*1.1+1)*0.5).toFixed(1));
  const c3Trend=months.map((_,i)=>+(rem*0.20*(0.80+i*0.006)+Math.sin(i*0.9+2)*0.4).toFixed(1));

  const geoRevs={
    'Asia Pacific':{rev:isIndia?'â‚¹'+Math.round(tamC*0.45)+'Cr':'$'+Math.round(tamC*0.32)+'M',pct:isIndia?'45%':'32%'},
    'North America':{rev:'$'+Math.round(tamC*0.26)+'M',pct:'26%'},
    'South America':{rev:'$'+Math.round(tamC*0.12)+'M',pct:'12%'},
    'Europe':{rev:'â‚¬'+Math.round(tamC*0.21)+'M',pct:'21%'},
    'Africa':{rev:'$'+Math.round(tamC*0.06)+'M',pct:'6%'}
  };

  const radarAxes=['pricingPower','distribution','brandValue','innovation','marketReach','customerSat'];
  const ourOffsets=[+5,-3,+2,+8,-4,+6];
  const ourR=radarAxes.map((_,i)=>Math.min(100,Math.max(5,t+ourOffsets[i])));
  const COMP_OFFSETS=[[-8,+6,-5,+10,-12,+4],[+5,-10,+8,-6,+3,-9],[-12,+4,-10,+8,-6,+12]];
  const radar=[
    {name:fd.bizName,scores:Object.fromEntries(radarAxes.map((k,i)=>[k,ourR[i]])),avg:(ourR.reduce((a,b)=>a+b)/6).toFixed(1)},
    ...compList.map((n,ci)=>{
      const s=ourR.map((v,ai)=>Math.min(100,Math.max(5,v+COMP_OFFSETS[ci][ai])));
      return{name:n,scores:Object.fromEntries(radarAxes.map((k,i)=>[k,s[i]])),avg:(s.reduce((a,b)=>a+b)/6).toFixed(1)};
    })
  ];

  return{
    overallScore:t,
    grade:t>=75?'Excellent':t>=60?'Strong':t>=45?'Moderate':t>=30?'Needs Work':'Critical',
    verdict:`${fd.bizName} has ${t>=60?'strong':'moderate'} potential in the ${fd.sector} market targeting ${fd.geo} â€” key opportunity in ${cities[0]} and ${cities[1]}.`,
    dimensions:{marketSize:Math.min(100,t+4),audienceQuality:Math.min(100,t-2),competitionEdge:Math.max(0,t-7),revenuePotential:Math.min(100,t+2),riskProfile:Math.max(0,t-4),sectorFit:Math.min(100,t+6)},
    tamCrore:Math.round(tamC),
    samCrore:Math.round(tamC*0.28),
    somCrore:Math.round(tamC*tgtPct/100),
    growthRate:gr,
    currency:'â‚¹Cr',
    marketShare:mshare,
    competitorProfiles:compProfiles,
    revenueByRegion:{
      labels:cities,
      currentMarket:cities.map((_,i)=>+(base*mults[i]*0.72).toFixed(1)),
      projected2027:cities.map((_,i)=>+(base*mults[i]*(1+gr/100)).toFixed(1)),
      ourTarget:cities.map((_,i)=>+(base*mults[i]*tgtPct/100*0.85).toFixed(1))
    },
    competitorRadar:radar,
    trendData:{
      months,
      series:[
        {label:fd.bizName,   dash:[],data:ourTrend},
        {label:compList[0],  dash:[],data:c1Trend},
        {label:compList[1],  dash:[],data:c2Trend},
        {label:compList[2],  dash:[],data:c3Trend}
      ]
    },
    geoRegions:Object.fromEntries(Object.entries(geoRevs).map(([k,v])=>[[k],{rev:v.rev,pct:v.pct,ids:{}}])),
    keyInsights:[
      `ðŸ’¡ ${fd.bizName} targets a â‚¹${Math.round(tamC)}Cr TAM in the ${fd.sector} sector â€” growing at ~${gr}% CAGR in ${fd.geo}.`,
      `âš”ï¸ Competing against ${compList[0]} and ${compList[1]} â€” your primary edge must be 10Ã— better on at least one dimension.`,
      `ðŸ’° As a ${fd.bizType} product, focus on ${sc==='IT'?'NRR above 110% and CAC payback under 6 months':sc==='HC'?'reimbursement coverage and EHR interoperability':'LTV:CAC above 3Ã— and gross margins above 60%'}.`,
      `ðŸ“ Highest revenue density in ${cities[0]} and ${cities[1]} â€” establish these before geographic expansion.`,
      `âœ… 90-day priority: sign 3 paying pilots, validate pricing at â‚¹${Math.round(tamC*tgtPct/100/12/100)}K/month, and map the regulatory pathway.`
    ],
    topRisks:[
      `Well-funded competition: ${compList[0]} has significant distribution and brand advantage.`,
      `${sc==='HC'||sc==='FS'?'Regulatory approval timeline can add 12â€“24 months to launch in India.':'Customer acquisition cost is typically higher than forecast â€” budget for 18-month payback.'}`,
      `Stage risk: at "${fd.stage}", premature scaling before product-market fit is the primary failure mode.`
    ],
    quickWins:[
      `Run 10 structured paid pilot interviews with ${fd.bizType} decision-makers this month.`,
      `Build a teardown of ${compList[0]}'s product â€” identify the one dimension where you can decisively win.`,
      `Define your North Star metric and set up a weekly dashboard to track it.`
    ],
    popups:{
      mktshare:`TAM: â‚¹${Math.round(tamC)}Cr Â· SAM: â‚¹${Math.round(tamC*0.28)}Cr Â· SOM: â‚¹${Math.round(tamC*tgtPct/100)}Cr. ${fd.bizName} targets ${tgtPct}% share against ${compList[0]} (${Math.round(rem*0.35)}%) and ${compList[1]} (${Math.round(rem*0.27)}%).`,
      revregion:`${cities[0]} and ${cities[1]} together represent ~60% of the total ${fd.sector} revenue opportunity in ${fd.geo}. Concentrate GTM energy here for the first 18 months.`,
      radar:`${fd.bizName} leads on innovation and pricing power vs ${compList[0]} and ${compList[1]}. Distribution reach is the biggest gap â€” requires 12â€“18 months to build.`,
      trend:`Revenue inflection expected at month ${3+Math.round(t/25)} post-launch. Market growing at ${gr}% annually â€” entering now provides a 2-year head start on new entrants.`,
      geomap:`${fd.geo} is the primary focus market with ${gr}% CAGR tailwind. ${isIndia?`${cities[0]} and ${cities[2]} have the highest density of ${fd.bizType} buyers.`:`Prove unit economics here before expanding to adjacent geographies.`}`
    }
  };
}

/* â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•
   RENDER DASHBOARD â€” exact market_dashboard_fixed style
â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â• */
function renderDash(fd,a){
  const biz=fd.bizName;
  dd={fd,a};

  /* â”€â”€ Header â”€â”€ */
  const scoreCol=a.overallScore>=55?'#7FDEBD':a.overallScore>=40?'#F5C842':'#FF8080';
  document.getElementById('dhTitle').textContent=`${biz} Â· Market Potential Assessment`;
  const liveTag=a.realTimeInsight?' Â· ðŸŸ¢ AI-Powered Live Data':' Â· ðŸŸ¡ Offline Estimate';
  document.getElementById('dhSub').textContent=`${fd.sector} Â· ${fd.bizType} Â· ${fd.geo}${liveTag} Â· Infopace Management Pvt Ltd`;
  // Smart merge: use AI data where present, fill gaps from offline fallback
  // This means real Gemini data is always shown, nothing is silently replaced
  const offline=offlineAnalysis(fd);
  const merge=(aiVal,fbVal)=>(aiVal!==undefined&&aiVal!==null&&aiVal!=='')?aiVal:fbVal;

  a.tamCrore    = merge(a.tamCrore,    offline.tamCrore);
  a.samCrore    = merge(a.samCrore,    offline.samCrore);
  a.somCrore    = merge(a.somCrore,    offline.somCrore);
  a.overallScore= merge(a.overallScore,offline.overallScore);
  a.growthRate  = merge(a.growthRate,  offline.growthRate);
  a.grade       = merge(a.grade,       offline.grade);
  a.verdict     = merge(a.verdict,     offline.verdict);
  a.keyInsights = (Array.isArray(a.keyInsights)&&a.keyInsights.length)?a.keyInsights:offline.keyInsights;
  a.topRisks    = (Array.isArray(a.topRisks)&&a.topRisks.length)?a.topRisks:offline.topRisks;
  a.quickWins   = (Array.isArray(a.quickWins)&&a.quickWins.length)?a.quickWins:offline.quickWins;
  a.popups      = (a.popups&&Object.keys(a.popups).length)?a.popups:offline.popups;
  a.geoRegions  = a.geoRegions||offline.geoRegions||null;
  a.dimensions  = (a.dimensions&&a.dimensions.marketSize)?a.dimensions:offline.dimensions;
  a.marketShare = (Array.isArray(a.marketShare)&&a.marketShare.length>2)?a.marketShare:offline.marketShare;
  a.competitorRadar = (Array.isArray(a.competitorRadar)&&a.competitorRadar.length>1)?a.competitorRadar:offline.competitorRadar;
  a.trendData   = (a.trendData&&Array.isArray(a.trendData.series)&&a.trendData.series.length>2)?a.trendData:offline.trendData;
  a.revenueByRegion = (a.revenueByRegion&&Array.isArray(a.revenueByRegion.labels)&&a.revenueByRegion.labels[0]!=='Region 1'&&a.revenueByRegion.labels[0]!=='Region1')?a.revenueByRegion:offline.revenueByRegion;
  a.competitorProfiles = (Array.isArray(a.competitorProfiles)&&a.competitorProfiles.length)?a.competitorProfiles:offline.competitorProfiles;

  // Log what came from AI vs fallback for debugging
  const aiFields=Object.keys(a).filter(k=>a[k]!==undefined);
  console.log('Dashboard data sources â€” AI fields used:', aiFields.length);
  document.getElementById('dhTam').textContent=`â‚¹${Math.round(a.tamCrore)}Cr`;
  document.getElementById('dhSam').textContent=`â‚¹${Math.round(a.samCrore)}Cr`;
  if(document.getElementById('dhSom'))document.getElementById('dhSom').textContent=`â‚¹${Math.round(a.somCrore)}Cr`;
  document.getElementById('dhScore').textContent=`${a.overallScore}/100`;
  document.getElementById('dhScore').style.color=scoreCol;
  document.getElementById('dhBadge').textContent=`â†‘ ${a.growthRate}% CAGR Â· ${a.grade}`;
  document.getElementById('dhBadge').style.color=scoreCol;
  document.getElementById('tmTam').textContent=`â‚¹${Math.round(a.tamCrore)}Cr`;
  document.getElementById('tmScore').textContent=`${a.overallScore}/100`;
  document.getElementById('tmGrowth').textContent=`+${a.growthRate}%`;

  /* destroy old charts */
  Object.values(dashCharts).forEach(c=>c&&c.destroy&&c.destroy());
  dashCharts={};

  /* â•â• CHART 1: D3 DONUT â€” exact template rendering â•â• */
  let BD=(a.marketShare||[]).slice(0,8);
  if(!BD.length){BD=[{name:fd.bizName,pct:5,val:'â€”'},{name:'Others',pct:95,val:'â€”'}];}
  // Ensure product (index 0) always has a visible minimum slice
  if(BD[0]&&(BD[0].pct===0||BD[0].pct<2)){
    const stolen=2-BD[0].pct;
    BD[0].pct=2;
    // Take from Others or last entry
    const last=BD[BD.length-1];
    if(last&&last.pct>stolen)last.pct=+(last.pct-stolen).toFixed(1);
  }
  // Recalculate val for product if missing
  if(BD[0]&&(!BD[0].val||BD[0].val==='â€”'||BD[0].val==='')&&a.somCrore){
    BD[0].val='â‚¹'+Math.round(a.somCrore)+'Cr';
  }
  // Normalise: ensure total pct = 100
  const rawTotal=BD.reduce((s,d)=>s+(+d.pct||0),0)||100;
  if(Math.abs(rawTotal-100)>2){
    // Rescale all pcts to sum to 100
    BD.forEach(d=>{ d.pct=+(d.pct/rawTotal*100).toFixed(1); });
  }
  const BT=BD.reduce((s,d)=>s+(d.pct||0),0)||100;

  // Legend
  const leg=document.getElementById('donut-legend');
  leg.innerHTML='';
  BD.forEach((d,i)=>{
    const p=Math.round(d.pct/BT*100);

    // Clean the val â€” sometimes Gemini returns raw number like "61" instead of "â‚¹61Cr"
    let dispVal=d.val||'';
    if(!dispVal||dispVal==='â€”'||dispVal==='-'){
      // No value â€” show percentage instead
      dispVal=p+'%';
    } else if(/^\d+(\.\d+)?$/.test(dispVal.trim())){
      // Raw number with no unit â€” add â‚¹Cr
      dispVal='â‚¹'+dispVal+'Cr';
    } else if(dispVal.endsWith('C')||dispVal.endsWith('Cr')==false&&dispVal.includes('â‚¹')){
      // Truncated like "â‚¹37.5C" â€” ensure ends with "Cr"
      if(dispVal.endsWith('C'))dispVal=dispVal+'r';
    }

    // Name: truncate at 15 chars cleanly
    const dispName=d.name.length>15?d.name.slice(0,14)+'â€¦':d.name;

    leg.innerHTML+=`<div class="dleg" title="${d.name}: ${dispVal}">
      <span class="dleg-sw" style="background:${PAL[i%8]}"></span>
      <span class="dleg-nm" title="${d.name}">${dispName}</span>
      <span class="dleg-val">${dispVal}</span>
      <span class="dleg-pct">${p}%</span>
    </div>`;
  });

  // D3 donut SVG â€” exact template code
  (function(){
    const W=200,H=200;
    const svgEl=document.getElementById('donut-svg');
    svgEl.setAttribute('width',W);svgEl.setAttribute('height',H);
    svgEl.setAttribute('viewBox',`0 0 ${W} ${H}`);
    svgEl.style.width=W+'px';svgEl.style.height=H+'px';
    const svg=d3.select(svgEl);svg.selectAll('*').remove();
    const cx=W/2,cy=H/2,outerR=88,innerR=52;
    const pie=d3.pie().value(d=>d.pct).sort(null).padAngle(0.014);
    const arcFn=d3.arc().innerRadius(innerR).outerRadius(outerR).cornerRadius(2);
    const arcs=pie(BD);
    const g=svg.append('g').attr('transform',`translate(${cx},${cy})`);
    g.selectAll('path').data(arcs).join('path')
      .attr('d',arcFn).attr('fill',(_,i)=>PAL[i%8])
      .attr('stroke','#fff').attr('stroke-width',2);
    arcs.forEach((arc,i)=>{
      const pct=Math.round(BD[i].pct/BT*100);
      if(pct<5)return; // skip tiny slices only
      const [lx,ly]=arcFn.centroid(arc);
      const label=pct+'%';
      const bw=label.length*6+10; // dynamic width based on text length
      // White pill background
      g.append('rect')
        .attr('x',lx-bw/2).attr('y',ly-9)
        .attr('width',bw).attr('height',18)
        .attr('rx',4)
        .attr('fill','rgba(255,255,255,0.92)')
        .attr('stroke',PAL[i%8]).attr('stroke-width',1);
      g.append('text')
        .attr('x',lx).attr('y',ly+1)
        .attr('text-anchor','middle').attr('dominant-baseline','middle')
        .attr('font-size',9).attr('font-weight',700)
        .attr('font-family',"'IBM Plex Mono',monospace")
        .attr('fill',PAL[i%8])
        .text(label);
    });
    // Centre: score/100
    g.append('text').attr('y',-8).attr('text-anchor','middle').attr('dominant-baseline','middle')
      .attr('font-size',14).attr('font-weight',700).attr('font-family',"'IBM Plex Mono',monospace").attr('fill','#08152A')
      .text(a.overallScore+'/100');
    g.append('text').attr('y',9).attr('text-anchor','middle').attr('dominant-baseline','middle')
      .attr('font-size',7.5).attr('font-family',"'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif")
      .attr('fill','#627289').attr('letter-spacing','0.09em').text('SCORE');
  })();

  /* â•â• CHART 2: GROUPED BAR â€” dark theme, varied heights â•â• */
  const rbr=a.revenueByRegion||{labels:['Region 1','Region 2','Region 3'],currentMarket:[100,80,60],projected2027:[128,102,77],ourTarget:[10,8,6]};
  if(!rbr.labels||!rbr.currentMarket){rbr.labels=['Region 1','Region 2','Region 3'];rbr.currentMarket=[100,80,60];rbr.projected2027=[128,102,77];rbr.ourTarget=[10,8,6];}
  // Ensure data arrays have genuine variation by normalising if all same
  const ensureVaried=(arr)=>{
    if(!arr||!arr.length)return arr;
    const mn=Math.min(...arr),mx=Math.max(...arr);
    if(mx-mn<1){// synthesise variation using index multipliers
      return arr.map((_,i)=>+(arr[0]*(0.55+i*0.12)).toFixed(1));
    }
    return arr;
  };
  const cMkt=ensureVaried(rbr.currentMarket);
  const p27=ensureVaried(rbr.projected2027);
  let oTgt=ensureVaried(rbr.ourTarget);
  // Target shown as line on secondary axis â€” no scaling needed

  // Normalise target values to same scale as market for grouped display
  // Scale oTgt up visually so bars are readable alongside current market
  const mktMax=Math.max(...(cMkt||[1]));
  const tgtMax=Math.max(...(oTgt||[1]));
  const tgtScale=tgtMax>0&&tgtMax<mktMax*0.05?(mktMax*0.12/tgtMax):1;
  const oTgtScaled=tgtScale>1?oTgt.map(v=>+(v*tgtScale).toFixed(1)):oTgt;
  const tgtLabel=tgtScale>1?`${biz} Target (Ã—${tgtScale.toFixed(0)} scaled)`:`${biz} Target`;

  dashCharts.bar=new Chart(document.getElementById('cBar'),{
    type:'bar',
    data:{
      labels:rbr.labels,
      datasets:[
        {
          label:'Current Market',data:cMkt,
          backgroundColor:rga('#00338D',0.75),
          borderColor:'#00338D',borderWidth:0,
          borderRadius:{topLeft:4,topRight:4},borderSkipped:false
        },
        {
          label:'Projected 2027',data:p27,
          backgroundColor:rga('#0091DA',0.75),
          borderColor:'#0091DA',borderWidth:0,
          borderRadius:{topLeft:4,topRight:4},borderSkipped:false
        },
        {
          label:tgtLabel,data:oTgtScaled,
          backgroundColor:rga('#00A3A1',0.85),
          borderColor:'#00A3A1',borderWidth:0,
          borderRadius:{topLeft:4,topRight:4},borderSkipped:false
        }
      ]
    },
    options:{
      responsive:true,maintainAspectRatio:false,
      animation:{duration:700,easing:'easeOutQuart'},
      layout:{padding:{top:22,right:8}},
      plugins:{
        legend:{
          position:'bottom',
          labels:{
            boxWidth:10,boxHeight:10,padding:12,
            font:{size:8.5},color:'#243350',
            usePointStyle:true,pointStyle:'rectRounded'
          }
        },
        datalabels:{
          display:ctx=>{
            // Only show label on Projected 2027 (tallest bar) to avoid clutter
            if(ctx.datasetIndex!==1)return false;
            const v=ctx.dataset.data[ctx.dataIndex];
            return v>0&&v>=(mktMax*0.1);
          },
          anchor:'end',align:'top',offset:-1,clip:false,
          color:'#08152A',
          font:{family:"'IBM Plex Mono'",size:7,weight:'700'},
          formatter:v=>'â‚¹'+v+'Cr',
        },
        tooltip:{
          ...TT,mode:'index',intersect:false,
          callbacks:{
            title:c=>c[0].label+' Region',
            label:c=>{
              const raw=c.dataset.label.includes('scaled')?
                (c.raw/tgtScale).toFixed(1):
                (+c.raw).toFixed(1);
              return '  '+c.dataset.label.split(' (')[0]+': â‚¹'+raw+'Cr';
            },
            afterBody:c=>{
              const tot=c.filter(x=>x.datasetIndex<2).reduce((s,x)=>s+(+x.raw),0);
              return['  â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€','  Market Total: â‚¹'+tot.toFixed(1)+'Cr'];
            }
          }
        }
      },
      scales:{
        x:{
          grid:{display:false},
          ticks:{color:'#627289',font:{size:8},maxRotation:30},
          border:{color:'rgba(8,21,42,0.1)'}
        },
        y:{
          grid:{color:'rgba(8,21,42,0.055)',lineWidth:0.5,drawBorder:false},
          ticks:{
            color:'#627289',font:{size:8},
            callback:v=>v>=1000?'â‚¹'+(v/1000).toFixed(0)+'K Cr':'â‚¹'+v+'Cr'
          },
          border:{color:'transparent'}
        }
      }
    }
  });

  /* â•â• CHART 3: RADAR â€” dark theme, distinct per-competitor scores â•â• */
  const radarAxes=['pricingPower','distribution','brandValue','innovation','marketReach','customerSat'];
  // Ensure each competitor has genuinely different scores on each axis
  const RC=(a.competitorRadar||[{name:fd.bizName,scores:{pricingPower:60,distribution:50,brandValue:45,innovation:70,marketReach:50,customerSat:65}}]).slice(0,4).map((c,i)=>{
    const rawVals=radarAxes.map(k=>+(c.scores?.[k]||0));
    // Ensure each competitor has distinct shape â€” apply offsets if too similar
    const range=Math.max(...rawVals)-Math.min(...rawVals);
    let vals=rawVals;
    const BASE_OFFSETS=[
      [+12,-8,+5,+18,-12,+8],    // our product: stronger innovation & pricing
      [-8,+22,-5,+4,-18,+16],    // comp1: strong distribution & customer sat
      [+6,-16,+20,-8,+14,-10],   // comp2: strong brand & market reach
      [-18,+10,-12,+6,+20,-8],   // comp3: strong market reach & pricing
    ];
    if(range<20){
      // Apply offsets to create distinct shapes
      vals=rawVals.map((v,ai)=>Math.min(100,Math.max(15,v+(BASE_OFFSETS[i]?.[ai]||0))));
    } else {
      // Data has variation but cap at 100 and floor at 10
      vals=rawVals.map(v=>Math.min(100,Math.max(10,v)));
    }
    return{n:c.name,c:PAL[i],s:vals,avg:(vals.reduce((a,b)=>a+b)/vals.length).toFixed(1)};
  });

  dashCharts.radar=new Chart(document.getElementById('cRadar'),{
    type:'radar',
    data:{
      labels:['Price\nPower','Distribution','Brand\nValue','Innovation','Market\nReach','Customer\nSat.'],
      datasets:RC.map((c,i)=>({
        label:c.n,data:c.s,
        borderColor:c.c,
        backgroundColor:rga(c.c, i===0?0.18:0.07),
        borderWidth:i===0?2.5:1.5,
        pointRadius:i===0?4:3,
        pointBackgroundColor:c.c,
        pointBorderColor:i===0?'#fff':'rgba(255,255,255,0.5)',
        pointBorderWidth:i===0?1.5:1,
        pointHoverRadius:6
      }))
    },
    options:{
      responsive:true,maintainAspectRatio:false,animation:{duration:900,easing:'easeOutQuart'},
      layout:{padding:{top:22,bottom:22,left:18,right:18}},
      plugins:{
        legend:{display:false},
        datalabels:{display:false},
        tooltip:{...TT,callbacks:{
          title:c=>['Price Power','Distribution','Brand Value','Innovation','Market Reach','Customer Sat.'][c[0].dataIndex],
          label:c=>`  ${c.dataset.label}: ${c.raw}/100`
        }}
      },
      scales:{r:{
        min:0,max:100,

        backgroundColor:'rgba(238,242,251,0.28)'
      }}
    }
  });
  // Side legend â€” dark theme
  const rLeg=document.getElementById('radar-leg');
  rLeg.innerHTML='';
  RC.forEach((c,i)=>{
    rLeg.innerHTML+=`<div style="display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:6px">
      <div style="width:10px;height:10px;border-radius:3px;background:${c.c};flex-shrink:0;margin-top:1px;box-shadow:0 0 6px ${c.c}55"></div>
      <div>
        <div style="font-size:8px;font-weight:600;color:#08152A;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;max-width:72px">${c.n}</div>
        <div style="font-size:7px;color:#627289;font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace">Avg: ${c.avg}</div>
      </div>
    </div>`;
  });

  /* â•â• CHART 4: TREND LINE â€” dark theme â•â• */
  const months_=['Apr','May','Jun','Jul','Aug','Sep','Oct','Nov','Dec','Jan','Feb','Mar'];
  const td=a.trendData||{months:months_,series:[{label:fd.bizName,dash:[],data:months_.map((_,i)=>+(i*0.5).toFixed(1))},{label:'Market',dash:[5,3],data:months_.map(()=>30)}]};
  if(!td.months||!td.series||!td.series.length){td.months=months_;td.series=[{label:fd.bizName,dash:[],data:months_.map((_,i)=>+(i*0.5).toFixed(1))}];}
  const dashes=[[],[],[],[],[],[]]; // all solid lines

  // Filter out TAM Index â€” show only product and competitor share lines
  let rawShare=td.series.filter(s=>s.label!=='TAM Index').map((s,i)=>{
    // Fix generic label â€” replace with real competitor name
    if(i>0&&(s.label==='Market'||s.label==='market'||s.label==='TAM'||s.label==='')){
      const compName=a.marketShare?.[i]?.name||a.competitorProfiles?.[i-1]?.name||s.label;
      return {...s, label:compName};
    }
    return s;
  });

  // Pad to at least 3 series (product + 2 competitors) using marketShare data
  while(rawShare.length<3){
    const idx=rawShare.length; // 1, 2, 3...
    const comp=a.marketShare?.[idx]||a.competitorProfiles?.[idx-1];
    if(!comp)break;
    const compShare=comp.pct||comp.marketSharePct||15;
    rawShare.push({
      label: comp.name||`Competitor ${idx}`,
      dash: [],
      data: months_.map((_,m)=>+(compShare*(0.88+m*0.009)+Math.sin(m*0.7+idx)*0.8).toFixed(1))
    });
  }

  // â”€â”€ Use Gemini's actual data â€” only fix if data is bad â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
  const shapedSeries=rawShare.map((s,i)=>{
    let data=[...s.data];
    const validVals=data.filter(v=>typeof v==='number'&&!isNaN(v));
    const mx=validVals.length?Math.max(...validVals):0;
    const mn=validVals.length?Math.min(...validVals):0;
    const spread=mx-mn;

    if(i===0){
      // Our product: use Gemini data if it has real variation
      // Only override if all values are 0 or identical
      if(mx===0||spread<0.3){
        // Fallback: generate realistic S-curve using somCrore/tamCrore
        const peakPct=Math.min(+((a.somCrore||5)/(a.tamCrore||100)*100).toFixed(1),15);
        data=Array.from({length:12},(_,m)=>{
          const t=m/11;
          const base=peakPct*(t*t*(3-2*t));
          // Add slight natural volatility â€” wins some months, dips others
          const noise=peakPct*0.06*Math.sin(m*1.3+0.5);
          return +Math.max(0,base+noise).toFixed(1);
        });
      }
    } else {
      // Competitors: use Gemini data if valid
      // Only override if data is missing or completely flat
      if(!validVals.length||mx===0){
        const share=a.marketShare?.[i]?.pct||20;
        const gr=(a.growthRate||20)/100;
        data=Array.from({length:12},(_,m)=>{
          const t=m/11;
          return +(share*(0.9+0.2*t)+Math.sin(m*0.7)*0.3).toFixed(1);
        });
      } else if(spread<2){
        // Data is too flat â€” add meaningful market fluctuation
        // Simulate real market dynamics: dips in summer, peak in Q4
        const volatility=Math.max(mx*0.08, 1.5);
        data=data.map((v,m)=>{
          const seasonal=Math.sin(m*0.9+1)*volatility*0.6;
          const trend=mx*(0.92+m*0.007); // slight upward drift
          return +Math.max(0.1,(trend+seasonal)).toFixed(1);
        });
      }
    }
    // Fill any NaN or missing months
    data=data.map((v,m)=>typeof v==='number'&&!isNaN(v)?v:+(data.filter(x=>!isNaN(x))[0]||0));
    return {...s, data};
  });

  // Calculate realistic Y axis max â€” top competitor + some headroom
  const allVals=shapedSeries.flatMap(s=>s.data);
  const yMax=Math.ceil(Math.max(...allVals)*1.15/5)*5; // round up to nearest 5%

  // Build datasets
  const trendDatasets=shapedSeries.map((s,i)=>({
    label:s.label,data:s.data,
    borderColor:PAL[i%8],
    backgroundColor:i===0?rga(PAL[0],0.08):'transparent',
    fill:i===0,
    borderWidth:i===0?2.8:2.0,
    borderDash:[],           // ALL SOLID â€” no dashes
    pointRadius:i===0?4:3,
    pointBackgroundColor:PAL[i%8],
    pointBorderColor:'#fff',
    pointBorderWidth:1.5,
    pointHoverRadius:7,
    tension:0.4              // smooth curves, not jagged
  }));

  dashCharts.trend=new Chart(document.getElementById('cTrend'),{
    type:'line',
    data:{
      labels:td.months,
      datasets:trendDatasets
    },
    options:{
      responsive:true,maintainAspectRatio:false,animation:{duration:700},
      layout:{padding:{right:88,top:4}},
      interaction:{mode:'index',intersect:false},
      plugins:{
        legend:{position:'bottom',labels:{boxWidth:12,boxHeight:12,padding:10,font:{size:8.5},color:'#243350',usePointStyle:true,pointStyle:'circle'}},
        datalabels:{
          display:ctx=>ctx.dataIndex===td.months.length-1,
          align:'right',anchor:'end',offset:6,clip:false,
          color:ctx=>ctx.dataset.borderColor,
          font:{family:"'IBM Plex Sans'",size:8,weight:'700'},
          formatter:(v,ctx)=>{
            const name=ctx.dataset.label.length>10?ctx.dataset.label.slice(0,10)+'â€¦':ctx.dataset.label;
            return name+'  '+v+'%';
          },
          backgroundColor:'rgba(255,255,255,0.95)',
          borderRadius:3,
          borderWidth:1,
          borderColor:ctx=>rga(ctx.dataset.borderColor,0.3),
          padding:{top:3,bottom:3,left:5,right:5}
        },
        tooltip:{...TT,mode:'index',intersect:false,callbacks:{
          title:c=>c[0].label,
          label:c=>`  ${c.dataset.label}: ${(+c.raw).toFixed(1)}%`,
          afterBody:c=>{
            const leader=c.reduce((a,b)=>+a.raw>+b.raw?a:b);
            return['  â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€','  Leader: '+leader.dataset.label+' ('+leader.raw+'%)'];
          }
        }}
      },
      scales:{
        x:{
          grid:{color:'rgba(8,21,42,0.04)',lineWidth:0.5},
          ticks:{color:'#627289',font:{size:8},maxTicksLimit:13,maxRotation:0},
          border:{color:'rgba(8,21,42,0.1)'}
        },
        y:{
          min:0,
          max:yMax,
          grid:{color:'rgba(8,21,42,0.06)',lineWidth:0.5},
          ticks:{
            color:'#627289',font:{size:8},
            stepSize:yMax<=20?2:yMax<=40?5:10,
            callback:v=>v+'%'
          },
          border:{color:'transparent'}
        }
      }
    }
  });

  /* â•â• CHART 5: WORLD MAP â€” dark theme + India drill-down â•â• */
  const defaultRegions={'Asia Pacific':{rev:'â€”',pct:'â€”',ids:[4,50,64,96,116,156,242,356,360,392,408,410,418,458,496,554,586,608,626,643,702,704,716,764,776,860]},'North America':{rev:'â€”',pct:'â€”',ids:[124,484,840,192,214,320,332,340,388,558,591,188,222,630]},'South America':{rev:'â€”',pct:'â€”',ids:[32,68,76,152,170,218,328,600,604,740,858,862]},'Europe':{rev:'â€”',pct:'â€”',ids:[8,20,40,56,70,100,112,191,196,203,208,233,246,250,276,300,348,372,380,428,438,440,442,492,528,578,616,620,642,703,705,724,752,756,804,826]},'Africa':{rev:'â€”',pct:'â€”',ids:[12,24,72,108,120,140,148,174,178,180,204,231,232,262,270,288,324,384,404,426,430,450,454,466,478,508,516,562,566,686,706,710,728,748,768,800,818,834,894]}};
  const GEO_REGIONS=a.geoRegions||defaultRegions;
  const RMAP_D={};Object.entries(GEO_REGIONS).forEach(([k,v])=>{RMAP_D[k]=(v.ids&&v.ids.length?v.ids:(defaultRegions[k]?.ids||[]));});
  const RCOL_D={'Asia Pacific':PAL[0],'North America':PAL[1],'South America':PAL[3],'Europe':PAL[2],'Africa':PAL[4]};
  const RDATA_D={};Object.entries(GEO_REGIONS).forEach(([k,v])=>{
    const rev=v.rev||'â€”';
    const pct=v.pct||'â€”';
    // Check if this region is effectively zero
    const isZero=rev==='â€”'||rev==='â‚¹0Cr'||rev==='$0M'||rev==='â‚¬0M'||pct==='0%'||pct==='0.0%';
    RDATA_D[k]={
      v: isZero?'Not targeted':rev,
      p: isZero?'â€”':pct,
      zero: isZero
    };
  });
  const RDOTS_D={'Asia Pacific':[105,25],'North America':[-98,42],'South America':[-58,-15],'Europe':[15,52],'Africa':[22,5]};

  // India state market data (realistic distribution of B2B/tech market)
  const INDIA_STATES={
    'Maharashtra':  {rev:'â‚¹142Cr', pct:'22.5%', score:95, color:'#0091DA', cities:['Mumbai','Pune','Nagpur']},
    'Karnataka':    {rev:'â‚¹118Cr', pct:'18.7%', score:92, color:'#0091DA', cities:['Bangalore','Mysore']},
    'Delhi':        {rev:'â‚¹96Cr',  pct:'15.2%', score:88, color:'#0091DA', cities:['Delhi NCR','Gurugram','Noida']},

    'Rajasthan':    {rev:'â‚¹18Cr',  pct:'2.9%',  score:55, color:'#005EB8', cities:['Jaipur','Jodhpur']},
    'West Bengal':  {rev:'â‚¹22Cr',  pct:'3.5%',  score:60, color:'#005EB8', cities:['Kolkata']},

    'Haryana':      {rev:'â‚¹14Cr',  pct:'2.2%',  score:52, color:'#6D2077', cities:['Gurugram','Faridabad']},
    'Punjab':       {rev:'â‚¹8Cr',   pct:'1.3%',  score:44, color:'#6D2077', cities:['Chandigarh','Ludhiana']},
    'Andhra Pradesh':{rev:'â‚¹12Cr', pct:'1.9%',  score:48, color:'#6D2077', cities:['Visakhapatnam']},
