    'Others':       {rev:'â‚¹18Cr',  pct:'2.9%',  score:35, color:'#470A68', cities:['Other cities']},
  };

  // mapDrillMode is global

  function getRegion(id){for(const[r,ids]of Object.entries(RMAP_D)){if(ids.includes(+id))return r;}return null;}

  window.mapDrillBack=function(){
    mapDrillMode=false;
    document.getElementById('mapBackBtn').style.display='none';
    document.getElementById('mapDrillInfo').style.display='none';
    document.getElementById('c5tag').textContent='Click region Â· India drill-down available';
    if(worldData)renderMap(worldData);
  };

  function renderIndiaMap(){
    mapDrillMode=true;
    document.getElementById('mapBackBtn').style.display='block';
    document.getElementById('c5tag').textContent='India Â· State-level Market View';
    const wrap=document.getElementById('mapWrap');
    const tip=document.getElementById('mapTT');
    const W=wrap.offsetWidth,H=wrap.offsetHeight;
    const svgEl=document.getElementById('worldMap');
    svgEl.setAttribute('width',W);svgEl.setAttribute('height',H);
    svgEl.setAttribute('viewBox',`0 0 ${W} ${H}`);
    svgEl.style.width=W+'px';svgEl.style.height=H+'px';
    const svg=d3.select(svgEl);svg.selectAll('*').remove();

    // Dark background
    svg.append('rect').attr('width',W).attr('height',H).attr('fill','#E4EEF7');

    fetch('https://raw.githubusercontent.com/geohacker/india/master/state/india_telengana.geojson')
      .then(r=>r.json())
      .then(indiaGeo=>{
        const proj=d3.geoMercator().fitSize([W-20,H-60],indiaGeo);
        const pathFn=d3.geoPath().projection(proj);
        const features=indiaGeo.features;

        // Score color scale
        const scoreColor=score=>{
          if(score>=85)return '#0091DA';
          if(score>=70)return '#00A3A1';
          if(score>=55)return '#4DAEDC';
          if(score>=45)return '#005EB8';
          return '#470A68';
        };

        // Draw states
        svg.selectAll('.state').data(features).join('path')
          .attr('class','state')
          .attr('d',pathFn)
          .attr('transform',`translate(10,10)`)
          .attr('fill',d=>{
            const name=d.properties?.NAME_1||d.properties?.ST_NM||d.properties?.name||'';
            const match=Object.keys(INDIA_STATES).find(k=>name.toLowerCase().includes(k.toLowerCase().split(' ')[0]));
            const s=match?INDIA_STATES[match]:null;
            return s?scoreColor(s.score):'#1A2840';
          })
          .attr('stroke','rgba(0,145,218,0.3)').attr('stroke-width','0.8')
          .style('cursor','pointer')
          .on('mouseover',function(ev,d){
            const name=d.properties?.NAME_1||d.properties?.ST_NM||d.properties?.name||'Unknown';
            const match=Object.keys(INDIA_STATES).find(k=>name.toLowerCase().includes(k.toLowerCase().split(' ')[0]));
            const s=match?INDIA_STATES[match]:{rev:'â€”',pct:'â€”',score:0,cities:[]};
            tip.innerHTML=`<strong style="color:#fff">${name}</strong><br>Rev: <span style="color:#7FDEBD">${s.rev}</span> Â· Share: <span style="color:#BDD0EC">${s.pct}</span><br><span style="color:#7A9BB8;font-size:10px">${(s.cities||[]).join(' Â· ')}</span>`;
            tip.style.opacity='1';
            d3.select(this).attr('stroke','#0091DA').attr('stroke-width','2');
          })
          .on('mousemove',function(ev){
            const rc=wrap.getBoundingClientRect();
            let x=ev.clientX-rc.left+14,y=ev.clientY-rc.top-45;
            if(x+220>W)x-=235;if(y<4)y=4;
            tip.style.left=x+'px';tip.style.top=y+'px';
          })
          .on('mouseleave',function(){
            tip.style.opacity='0';
            d3.select(this).attr('stroke','rgba(0,145,218,0.3)').attr('stroke-width','0.8');
          });

        // Title
        svg.append('text').attr('x',W/2).attr('y',H-8).attr('text-anchor','middle')
          .attr('font-size',9).attr('font-weight','600').attr('fill','rgba(122,155,184,0.6)')
          .attr('font-family','IBM Plex Sans,sans-serif').text('INDIA Â· STATE MARKET OPPORTUNITY');

        // Bottom stats bar
        const drillBar=document.getElementById('mapDrillBar');
        const topStates=Object.entries(INDIA_STATES).sort((a,b)=>b[1].score-a[1].score).slice(0,4);
        drillBar.innerHTML=`<div style="font-size:8px;color:rgba(122,155,184,0.6);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.1em;flex-shrink:0">Top Markets</div>`+
          topStates.map(([name,s])=>`<div class="map-drill-kpi"><div class="map-drill-kpi-v">${s.rev}</div><div class="map-drill-kpi-l">${name.split(' ')[0]} Â· ${s.pct}</div></div>`).join('');
        document.getElementById('mapDrillInfo').style.display='block';
      })
      .catch(()=>{
        // Fallback: show styled placeholder with state data as text
        svg.append('text').attr('x',W/2).attr('y',H/2-20).attr('text-anchor','middle').attr('font-size',11).attr('fill','#4DAEDC').text('India Market â€” Top States by Potential');
        const states=Object.entries(INDIA_STATES).sort((a,b)=>b[1].score-a[1].score).slice(0,8);
        states.forEach(([name,s],i)=>{
          const y=H/2+10+i*18;
          const barW=(s.score/100)*(W*0.5);
          svg.append('rect').attr('x',W*0.15).attr('y',y-9).attr('width',barW).attr('height',12).attr('rx',3).attr('fill',s.color).attr('opacity',0.7);
          svg.append('text').attr('x',W*0.13).attr('y',y+1).attr('text-anchor','end').attr('font-size',8).attr('fill','#BDD0EC').attr('font-family','IBM Plex Sans').text(name);
          svg.append('text').attr('x',W*0.15+barW+4).attr('y',y+1).attr('font-size',8).attr('fill','#7FDEBD').attr('font-family','IBM Plex Mono').text(s.rev+' Â· '+s.pct);
        });
      });
  }

  async function buildMap(){
    try{
      if(!worldData){const r=await fetch('https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/world-atlas@2/countries-110m.json');worldData=await r.json();}
      renderMap(worldData);
    }catch(e){d3.select('#worldMap').append('text').attr('x',200).attr('y',80).attr('text-anchor','middle').attr('font-size',11).attr('fill','#7A9BB8').text('Map requires internet connection');}
  }

  function renderMap(world){
    const wrap=document.getElementById('mapWrap');
    const tip=document.getElementById('mapTT');
    const W=wrap.offsetWidth,H=wrap.offsetHeight;
    if(W<50||H<30){setTimeout(()=>renderMap(world),150);return;}
    const svgEl=document.getElementById('worldMap');
    svgEl.setAttribute('width',W);svgEl.setAttribute('height',H);
    svgEl.setAttribute('viewBox',`0 0 ${W} ${H}`);
    svgEl.style.width=W+'px';svgEl.style.height=H+'px';
    const svg=d3.select(svgEl);svg.selectAll('*').remove();
    const proj=d3.geoEquirectangular().fitSize([W,H],{type:'Sphere'});
    const pathFn=d3.geoPath().projection(proj);
    const countries=topojson.feature(world,world.objects.countries);
    const borders=topojson.mesh(world,world.objects.countries,(a,b)=>a!==b);
    // Dark ocean
    svg.append('rect').attr('width',W).attr('height',H).attr('fill','#C8D8F0');
    svg.append('path').datum(d3.geoGraticule().step([30,30])()).attr('d',pathFn).attr('fill','none').attr('stroke','rgba(0,145,218,0.04)').attr('stroke-width','0.4');
    svg.selectAll('.ctry').data(countries.features).join('path').attr('class','ctry').attr('d',pathFn)
      .attr('fill',d=>{
        const r=getRegion(d.id);
        if(!r)return '#A8C0D8';
        const rd=RDATA_D[r];
        // Zero/untargeted regions get a muted version of their color
        return rd&&rd.zero?rga(RCOL_D[r],0.25):RCOL_D[r];
      })
      .attr('stroke','rgba(0,20,50,0.5)').attr('stroke-width','0.3').style('cursor','pointer')
      .attr('opacity',d=>{const r=getRegion(d.id);return r&&RDATA_D[r]?.zero?0.5:1;})
      .on('mouseover',function(ev,d){
        const r=getRegion(d.id);if(!r)return;
        const rd=RDATA_D[r];
        const isIndia=+d.id===356;
        tip.innerHTML=`<strong style="color:#fff">${r}</strong>${isIndia?' <span style="color:#7FDEBD;font-size:9px">Â· Click for India drill-down</span>':''}<br>${rd.zero?'<span style="color:#9BAABB;font-size:10px">Outside target geography â€” global sector opportunity shown</span>':`Rev: <span style="color:#7FDEBD">${rd.v}</span> &nbsp;Â·&nbsp; Share: <span style="color:#BDD0EC">${rd.p}</span>`}`;
        tip.style.opacity='1';
        svg.selectAll('.ctry').style('opacity',e=>getRegion(e.id)===r?1:0.35);
        d3.select(this).attr('stroke','rgba(127,222,189,0.6)').attr('stroke-width','1');
      })
      .on('mousemove',function(ev){
        const rc=wrap.getBoundingClientRect();
        let x=ev.clientX-rc.left+12,y=ev.clientY-rc.top-38;
        if(x+240>W)x-=252;if(y<4)y=4;
        tip.style.left=x+'px';tip.style.top=y+'px';
      })
      .on('mouseleave',function(){
        tip.style.opacity='0';
        svg.selectAll('.ctry').style('opacity',1);
        d3.select(this).attr('stroke','rgba(0,20,50,0.8)').attr('stroke-width','0.3');
      })
      .on('click',function(ev,d){
        // India drill-down on click (country id 356)
        if(+d.id===356){ev.stopPropagation();renderIndiaMap();}
        else{const r=getRegion(d.id);if(r)openPop('geomap');}
      });
    svg.append('path').datum(borders).attr('d',pathFn).attr('fill','none').attr('stroke','rgba(0,30,60,0.7)').attr('stroke-width','0.25');

    // Label boxes â€” dark theme
    const lblSz=Math.max(9,W*0.016);const dotSz=Math.max(5,W*0.011);
    const dotSizes={'Asia Pacific':1.0,'North America':0.93,'Europe':0.86,'South America':0.64,'Africa':0.50};
    Object.entries(RDOTS_D).forEach(([region,[lon,lat]])=>{
      const pt=proj([lon,lat]);if(!pt)return;
      const[cx,cy]=pt;
      const sz=dotSz*(dotSizes[region]||0.7);
      const col=RCOL_D[region]||PAL[0];
      const rd=RDATA_D[region]||{v:'â€”',p:'â€”'};
      // Glow ring
      svg.append('circle').attr('cx',cx).attr('cy',cy).attr('r',sz+dotSz*0.8).attr('fill','none').attr('stroke',col).attr('stroke-width','1').attr('opacity','0.2');
      // Inner dot
      svg.append('circle').attr('cx',cx).attr('cy',cy).attr('r',sz).attr('fill','#fff').attr('stroke',col).attr('stroke-width','1.8').attr('opacity','0.95');
      // Label box
      const bW=lblSz*9.5,bH=lblSz*4.2,bx=cx-bW/2,by=cy+sz+5;
      svg.append('rect').attr('x',bx).attr('y',by).attr('width',bW).attr('height',bH).attr('rx',2).attr('fill','#fff').attr('stroke',col).attr('stroke-width','0.8');
      svg.append('rect').attr('x',bx).attr('y',by).attr('width',bW).attr('height',2).attr('rx',4).attr('fill',col);
      const shortName={'Asia Pacific':'Asia Pac','North America':'N. America','Europe':'Europe','South America':'S. America','Africa':'Africa'}[region];
      svg.append('text').attr('x',cx).attr('y',by+lblSz*1.4).attr('text-anchor','middle').attr('font-size',lblSz*0.88).attr('font-weight','700').attr('fill',col).attr('font-family','IBM Plex Sans,sans-serif').text(shortName);
      const dispText=rd.zero?'Not targeted':`${rd.v}  Â·  ${rd.p}`;
      const dispColor=rd.zero?'#9BAABB':'#08152A';
      svg.append('text').attr('x',cx).attr('y',by+lblSz*2.85).attr('text-anchor','middle').attr('font-size',rd.zero?lblSz*0.78:lblSz*0.92).attr('font-weight',rd.zero?'400':'600').attr('fill',dispColor).attr('font-family','IBM Plex Mono,monospace').text(dispText);
    });

    // India "click to drill-down" hint
    const indiaFeature=countries.features.find(f=>+f.id===356);
    if(indiaFeature){
      const centroid=pathFn.centroid(indiaFeature);
      if(centroid&&!isNaN(centroid[0])){
        svg.append('text').attr('x',centroid[0]).attr('y',centroid[1]-4).attr('text-anchor','middle').attr('font-size',7).attr('fill','rgba(127,222,189,0.9)').attr('font-family','IBM Plex Sans').attr('font-weight','700').text('ðŸ‡®ðŸ‡³ CLICK');
      }
    }
    document.getElementById('c5tag').textContent='Click region Â· ðŸ‡®ðŸ‡³ India drill-down';
  }

  let resizeTimer;
  window.addEventListener('resize',()=>{clearTimeout(resizeTimer);resizeTimer=setTimeout(()=>{if(!mapDrillMode&&worldData)renderMap(worldData);},100);});
  const mapRO=new ResizeObserver(()=>{if(mapDrillMode||!worldData)return;clearTimeout(resizeTimer);resizeTimer=setTimeout(()=>renderMap(worldData),80);});
  mapRO.observe(document.getElementById('mapWrap'));

  buildMap();
  setTimeout(()=>{if(!mapDrillMode&&worldData)renderMap(worldData);},600);

  /* Switch views */
  hideLoader();
  const ds=document.getElementById('dashShell');
  ds.style.display='block';
  switchView('charts');
  // report built on demand when user clicks Report button
  window.scrollTo({top:0,behavior:'smooth'});
}

/* â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•
   POPUPS
â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â• */
function openPop(key){
  const a=dd.a;if(!a)return;
  const pi=a.popups||{};
  const titles={mktshare:'ðŸ¥§ Market Share & TAM Analysis',revregion:'ðŸ“Š Revenue by Region',radar:'ðŸ•¸ï¸ Competitive Intelligence',trend:'ðŸ“ˆ Market Trajectory',geomap:'ðŸ—ºï¸ Geographic Opportunity'};
  let html='';

  // Real-time data badge (shown on all popups if available)
  if(a.realTimeInsight){
    html+=`<div class="pi-block" style="background:#EEF2FB;border-color:#C5D5F5"><div class="pi-lbl" style="color:#0091DA">ðŸ”´ Live Market Data</div><div class="pi-txt">${a.realTimeInsight}</div></div>`;
  }

  if(pi[key])html+=`<div class="pi-block"><div class="pi-lbl">AI Analysis</div><div class="pi-txt">${pi[key]}</div></div>`;

  if(key==='mktshare'){
    html+=`<div class="pi-block"><div class="pi-lbl">Market Sizing (TAM â†’ SAM â†’ SOM)</div><div class="pi-txt">
      <strong>TAM:</strong> â‚¹${Math.round(a.tamCrore)}Cr &nbsp;Â·&nbsp; <strong>SAM:</strong> â‚¹${a.samCrore}Cr &nbsp;Â·&nbsp; <strong>SOM (3yr):</strong> â‚¹${a.somCrore}Cr<br>
      <em style="font-size:11px;color:rgba(122,155,184,0.7)">SOM = ${a.somCrore && a.tamCrore ? Math.round(a.somCrore/a.tamCrore*100) : 'â€”'}% of TAM Â· Growing at ${a.growthRate}% CAGR</em>
    </div></div>`;
    html+=`<div class="pi-block"><div class="pi-lbl">Market Share Breakdown</div><div class="pi-txt">${(a.marketShare||[]).slice(0,6).map(m=>`<strong>${m.name}:</strong> ${m.pct}% &nbsp;<span style="color:#627289">(${m.val})</span>`).join('<br>')}</div></div>`;
    // Competitor profiles
    if((a.competitorProfiles||[]).length){
      html+=`<div class="pi-block"><div class="pi-lbl">Real-Time Competitor Profiles</div><div class="pi-txt">`;
      a.competitorProfiles.slice(0,3).forEach(c=>{
        html+=`<div style="margin-bottom:8px;padding:8px;background:#F7F9FC;border-radius:3px;border:1px solid #D6DFED">
          <strong style="color:#00338D">${c.name}</strong> <span style="font-size:10px;color:#627289">${c.stage||''}</span><br>
          <span style="font-size:11px">âœ… <em>${c.strength}</em></span><br>
          <span style="font-size:11px;color:#C8002D">âš¡ Gap: <em>${c.weakness}</em></span>
        </div>`;
      });
      html+=`</div></div>`;
    }
  }else if(key==='radar'){
    html+=`<div class="pi-block"><div class="pi-lbl">Top 3 Risks</div><div class="pi-txt">${(a.topRisks||[]).map((r,i)=>`<strong style="color:#C8002D">${i+1}.</strong> ${r}`).join('<br><br>')}</div></div>`;
    // Dimension scores breakdown
    if(a.dimensions){
      const dims=a.dimensions;
      html+=`<div class="pi-block"><div class="pi-lbl">Dimension Scorecard</div><div class="pi-txt" style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:8px">`;
      const dimLabels={marketSize:'Market Size',audienceQuality:'Audience Quality',competitionEdge:'Competition Edge',revenuePotential:'Revenue Potential',riskProfile:'Risk Profile',sectorFit:'Sector Fit'};
      Object.entries(dimLabels).forEach(([k,label])=>{
        const v=dims[k]||0;
        const col=v>=70?'#00A3A1':v>=50?'#E8A000':'#C8002D';
        html+=`<div style="font-size:11px"><span style="color:#627289">${label}</span><br><strong style="color:${col}">${v}/100</strong></div>`;
      });
      html+=`</div></div>`;
    }
  }else if(key==='trend'){
    html+=`<div class="pi-block"><div class="pi-lbl">90-Day Quick Wins</div><div class="pi-txt">${(a.quickWins||[]).map((w,i)=>`<strong style="color:#0091DA">${i+1}.</strong> ${w}`).join('<br><br>')}</div></div>`;
    // Competitor trajectory note
    if((a.competitorProfiles||[]).length){
      html+=`<div class="pi-block"><div class="pi-lbl">Competitive Trajectory Context</div><div class="pi-txt">${a.competitorProfiles.slice(0,2).map(c=>`<strong>${c.name}</strong>: est. ${c.marketSharePct||'â€”'}% share Â· Exploit: <em>${c.weakness}</em>`).join('<br><br>')}</div></div>`;
    }
  }else if(key==='geomap'){
    html+=`<div class="pi-block"><div class="pi-lbl">Key Market Insights</div><div class="pi-txt">${(a.keyInsights||[]).map(ins=>`${ins}`).join('<br><br>')}</div></div>`;
  }else if(key==='revregion'){
    html+=`<div class="pi-block"><div class="pi-lbl">Overall Verdict</div><div class="pi-txt"><strong style="color:#00338D">${a.grade}:</strong> ${a.verdict}</div></div>`;
    html+=`<div class="pi-block"><div class="pi-lbl">Score Breakdown</div><div class="pi-txt"><strong>Overall:</strong> ${a.overallScore}/100 &nbsp;Â·&nbsp; <strong>CAGR:</strong> ${a.growthRate}% &nbsp;Â·&nbsp; <strong>TAM:</strong> â‚¹${Math.round(a.tamCrore)}Cr</div></div>`;
  }
  document.getElementById('popT').textContent=titles[key]||'Analysis';
  document.getElementById('popB').innerHTML=html;
  document.getElementById('ov').classList.add('open');
}
function closePop(){document.getElementById('ov').classList.remove('open');}
function closePopBg(e){if(e.target===document.getElementById('ov'))closePop();}
document.addEventListener('keydown',e=>{if(e.key==='Escape')closePop();});

/* â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•
   RESET
â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â• */
function resetAll(){
  // In iframe mode â€” notify parent React app to restart
  if(window.parent && window.parent !== window){
    window.parent.postMessage({type:'INFOPACE_RESET'},'*');
    return;
  }
  // Standalone fallback
  Object.values(dashCharts).forEach(c=>c&&c.destroy&&c.destroy());dashCharts={};
  document.getElementById('dashShell').style.display='none';
  document.getElementById('loaderShell').style.display='none';
  document.getElementById('assessShell').style.display='block';
  userTouched.clear();aiQs={};dd={};window._rtData=null;
  document.getElementById('sb8txt').textContent='Deep-Dive';
  goTo(0);calcLive();
  window.scrollTo({top:0,behavior:'smooth'});
}

// â”€â”€ REACT BRIDGE â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€

// Receive: render dashboard with analysis result from React
window.addEventListener('message', function(event) {
  if (!event.data) return;

  if (event.data.type === 'INFOPACE_RENDER') {
    const { fd, analysis } = event.data;
    if (!fd || !analysis) return;
    const assess = document.getElementById('assessShell');
    const loader  = document.getElementById('loaderShell');
    if (assess) assess.style.display = 'none';
    if (loader)  loader.style.display = 'none';
    renderDash(fd, analysis);
    if (window.parent && window.parent !== window) {
      window.parent.postMessage({ type: 'INFOPACE_READY' }, '*');
    }
  }

  // Receive: pre-fill user details from React onboarding into the form
  if (event.data.type === 'INFOPACE_PREFILL') {
    const u = event.data.userData;
    if (!u) return;
    // Business name = organization
    const bn = document.getElementById('bizName');
    if (bn) bn.value = u.organization || '';

    // Sector â€” match by value
    const sec = document.getElementById('sector');
    if (sec && u.sectorCode) sec.value = u.sectorCode;

    // Business type â€” map role to closest bizType
    const bt = document.getElementById('bizType');
    if (bt && u.bizTypeCode) bt.value = u.bizTypeCode;

    // Geography
    const geo = document.getElementById('geo');
    if (geo && u.geoCode) geo.value = u.geoCode;

    // Problem
    const prob = document.getElementById('problem');
    if (prob) prob.value = u.problem || '';

    // Stage pill
    if (u.stage) {
      const pill = document.querySelector(`#stagePills .pill[data-val="${u.stage}"]`);
      if (pill) pickPill(pill, 'stagePills');
    }

    // Trigger live score refresh
    onCtxChange();
    updateGeoPreview();
    calcLive();
  }
});

// Override buildDashboard to post form data to React instead of calling Gemini directly
const _originalBuildDashboard = buildDashboard;
window.buildDashboard = async function() {
  if (window.parent && window.parent !== window) {
    // Collect form data using original collectData()
    const fd = collectData();
    // Post to React â€” React will call Gemini, save to Supabase, then post INFOPACE_RENDER back
    showLoader();
    window.parent.postMessage({ type: 'INFOPACE_SUBMIT', fd }, '*');
  } else {
    // Standalone mode â€” use original flow
    await _originalBuildDashboard();
  }
};

// Receive: loader step updates from React during analysis
window.addEventListener('message', function(event) {
  if (!event.data) return;
  if (event.data.type === 'INFOPACE_LOADER_STEP') {
    setLoader(event.data.step, event.data.msg, event.data.pct);
  }
});

window.addEventListener('load', function() {
  if (window.parent && window.parent !== window) {
    window.parent.postMessage({ type: 'INFOPACE_LOADED' }, '*');
    calcLive();
  } else {
    calcLive();
  }
});

/* â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•
   VIEW SWITCHER
â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â• */
function switchView(v){
  const isCharts=v==='charts';
  const vc=document.getElementById('viewCharts');
  const vr=document.getElementById('viewReport');
  if(vc){ vc.style.display=isCharts?'flex':'none'; }
  if(vr&&isCharts){ vr.style.display='none'; }
  // Always rebuild report when switching to it â€” ensures fresh data
  if(!isCharts){
    if(vr){
      vr.style.cssText='position:fixed;left:64px;top:0;width:calc(100vw - 64px);height:100vh;overflow-y:auto;display:block;background:#EEF2F7;z-index:4;';
    }
    buildReport();
  }

  // Update sidebar active button styling
  const bc=document.getElementById('btnCharts');
  const br=document.getElementById('btnReport');
  if(bc){
    bc.style.background=isCharts?'rgba(255,255,255,0.22)':'transparent';
    const svg=bc.querySelector('svg');
    if(svg)svg.setAttribute('stroke',isCharts?'#fff':'rgba(255,255,255,0.5)');
    const lbl=bc.querySelector('.sb-label');
    if(lbl)lbl.style.color=isCharts?'#fff':'rgba(255,255,255,0.5)';
  }
  if(br){
    br.style.background=!isCharts?'rgba(255,255,255,0.22)':'transparent';
    const svg=br.querySelector('svg');
    if(svg)svg.setAttribute('stroke',!isCharts?'#fff':'rgba(255,255,255,0.5)');
    const lbl=br.querySelector('.sb-label');
    if(lbl)lbl.style.color=!isCharts?'#fff':'rgba(255,255,255,0.5)';
  }

  // Resize Chart.js canvases when switching back to charts
  if(isCharts){
    setTimeout(()=>{
      Object.values(dashCharts).forEach(ch=>ch&&ch.resize&&ch.resize());
      // Also re-render map if needed
      if(worldData&&!mapDrillMode&&typeof renderMap==='function')try{renderMap(worldData);}catch(_){}
    },60);
  }
}

/* â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•
   CORPORATE INTELLIGENCE REPORT â€” v4 Final
â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â• */
function buildReport(){
  const reportEl=document.getElementById('reportContent');
  if(!reportEl)return;
  if(!dd||!dd.fd||!dd.a){
    reportEl.innerHTML=`<div style="height:70vh;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:16px;">
      <svg width="56" height="56" viewBox="0 0 56 56" fill="none"><rect width="56" height="56" rx="10" fill="#EEF2F7"/>
        <rect x="14" y="28" width="6" height="16" rx="2" fill="#D6DFED"/>
        <rect x="23" y="20" width="6" height="24" rx="2" fill="#C5D0E0"/>
        <rect x="32" y="14" width="6" height="30" rx="2" fill="#B0BFCF"/>
        <rect x="41" y="22" width="6" height="22" rx="2" fill="#D6DFED"/>
      </svg>
      <div style="font-size:15px;color:#627289;font-weight:500;text-align:center;line-height:1.8;font-family:'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif;">Generate your dashboard first,<br>then open the Report view.</div>
    </div>`;
    return;
  }
  try{
    const fd=dd.fd, a=dd.a, biz=fd.bizName||'Your Product';
    const dim=a.dimensions||{};
    const esc=s=>String(s||'').replace(/&/g,'&amp;').replace(/</g,'&lt;').replace(/>/g,'&gt;');
    const now=new Date().toLocaleDateString('en-IN',{day:'2-digit',month:'long',year:'numeric'});
    const sCol=a.overallScore>=70?'#00A3A1':a.overallScore>=50?'#E8A000':'#C8002D';
    const colfn=v=>(+v)>=70?'#00A3A1':(+v)>=50?'#E8A000':'#C8002D';
    const lblfn=v=>(+v)>=70?'Strong':(+v)>=50?'Moderate':'Needs Work';
    const compP=a.competitorProfiles||[];
    const ms=a.marketShare||[];
    const ce=dim.competitionEdge||50, aq=dim.audienceQuality||50, sf=dim.sectorFit||50;
    const dimDefs=[
      {k:'marketSize',l:'Market Size',c:'#1A56B0',w:15},
      {k:'audienceQuality',l:'Audience Quality',c:'#0891B2',w:20},
      {k:'competitionEdge',l:'Competitive Edge',c:'#D97706',w:25},
      {k:'revenuePotential',l:'Revenue Potential',c:'#1E3A8A',w:25},
      {k:'riskProfile',l:'Risk Management',c:'#6D28D9',w:10},
      {k:'sectorFit',l:'Sector Alignment',c:'#065F46',w:5},
    ];
    const rptPal=['#1A56B0','#0891B2','#065F46','#D97706','#1E3A8A','#6D28D9'];

    /* â•â•â• SVG HELPERS â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â• */

    // Score gauge â€” clean minimal
    function scoreGaugeSVG(score,W,H){
      const cx=W/2, cy=100, R=72, sw=12;
      const pct=Math.max(0,Math.min(100,score))/100;
      const arcColor=score>=70?'#10B981':score>=50?'#F59E0B':'#EF4444';
      const gradId='g'+Math.random().toString(36).slice(2,6);
      // Arc endpoints: left=180deg, right=0deg, going clockwise (bottom open)
      const sx=cx-R, sy=cy;
      const ex=cx+R, ey=cy;
      const scX=cx+R*Math.cos(Math.PI*(1-pct));
      const scY=cy-R*Math.sin(Math.PI*pct);
      const lg=pct>0.5?1:0;
      // Grade label
      const grade=score>=70?'Strong':score>=50?'Moderate':'Needs Work';
      return `<svg width="${W}" height="118" viewBox="0 0 ${W} 118" style="display:block;overflow:visible;">
        <defs>
          <linearGradient id="${gradId}" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="0%">
            <stop offset="0%" stop-color="${arcColor}" stop-opacity="0.4"/>
            <stop offset="100%" stop-color="${arcColor}"/>
          </linearGradient>
        </defs>
        <!-- Grey track -->
        <path d="M${sx},${sy} A${R},${R} 0 0,1 ${ex},${ey}"
              fill="none" stroke="rgba(255,255,255,0.1)" stroke-width="${sw}" stroke-linecap="round"/>
        <!-- Coloured score arc -->
        <path d="M${sx},${sy} A${R},${R} 0 ${lg},1 ${scX},${scY}"
              fill="none" stroke="url(#${gradId})" stroke-width="${sw}" stroke-linecap="round"/>
        <!-- 0 and 100 end labels -->
        <text x="${sx-8}" y="${sy+5}" text-anchor="end" font-size="9" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.3)" font-family="'IBM Plex Mono',monospace">0</text>
        <text x="${ex+8}" y="${ey+5}" text-anchor="start" font-size="9" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.3)" font-family="'IBM Plex Mono',monospace">100</text>
        <!-- Centre tick at 50 -->
        <line x1="${cx}" y1="${cy-R-sw/2-2}" x2="${cx}" y2="${cy-R+sw/2+2}" stroke="rgba(255,255,255,0.2)" stroke-width="1.5"/>
        <text x="${cx}" y="${cy-R-sw/2-6}" text-anchor="middle" font-size="8" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.2)" font-family="'IBM Plex Mono',monospace">50</text>
        <!-- Needle -->
        <line x1="${cx}" y1="${cy}" x2="${scX}" y2="${scY}"
              stroke="rgba(255,255,255,0.7)" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/>
        <circle cx="${cx}" cy="${cy}" r="5" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.15)" stroke="rgba(255,255,255,0.4)" stroke-width="1"/>
        <circle cx="${cx}" cy="${cy}" r="2.5" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.8)"/>
        <!-- Score -->
        <text x="${cx}" y="${cy-18}" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'IBM Plex Mono',monospace"
              font-size="34" font-weight="700" fill="${arcColor}">${score}</text>
        <text x="${cx}" y="${cy-3}" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif"
              font-size="8.5" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.35)" letter-spacing=".12em">OUT OF 100</text>
      </svg>`;
    }

    // Funnel â€” proper trapezoid shape + side descriptions
    function funnelSVG(){
      const tam = +(a.tamCrore)||100;
      const sam = +(a.samCrore)||30;
      const som = +(a.somCrore)||5;
      const fmtV = v => v >= 1000 ? 'â‚¹' + (v/1000).toFixed(1) + 'K Cr' : 'â‚¹' + Math.round(v) + 'Cr';

      // Layout â€” funnel on left, labels on right
      const SVG_W = 480;
      const FW = 200;   // funnel column width
      const LX = 224;   // label column starts here
      const SEG = 64;   // height of each segment
      const GAP = 4;    // gap between segments
      const SVG_H = SEG * 3 + GAP * 2 + 12;

      const steps = [
        {
          v: tam, l: 'TAM', pct: 100,
          c: '#1A56B0',
          title: 'Total Addressable Market',
          desc: 'The entire market demand for your product category in the target geography.',
          tw: FW, bw: Math.round(FW * 0.68)
        },
        {
          v: sam, l: 'SAM', pct: Math.round(sam/tam*100),
          c: '#0891B2',
          title: 'Serviceable Available Market',
          desc: 'The segment you can realistically reach with your current model and channels.',
          tw: Math.round(FW * 0.68), bw: Math.round(FW * 0.38)
        },
        {
          v: som, l: 'SOM', pct: Math.round(som/tam*100),
          c: '#059669',
          title: '3-Year Revenue Target',
          desc: 'Your realistic capture target â€” typically 2-8% of SAM at early stage.',
          tw: Math.round(FW * 0.38), bw: Math.round(FW * 0.16)
        }
      ];

      const parts = steps.map((s, i) => {
        const y = 6 + i * (SEG + GAP);
        const cx = FW / 2;
        // Trapezoid: top-left, top-right, bottom-right, bottom-left
        const tlx = cx - s.tw/2, trx = cx + s.tw/2;
        const blx = cx - s.bw/2, brx = cx + s.bw/2;
        const path = `M${tlx},${y} L${trx},${y} L${brx},${y+SEG} L${blx},${y+SEG} Z`;
        const my = y + SEG/2;

        // Label block on the right
        const lmy = my;
        const labelLines = s.desc.match(/.{1,44}(\s|$)/g) || [s.desc];

        return `
          <!-- segment ${i} -->
          <path d="${path}" fill="${s.c}" opacity="0.85"/>
          <path d="${path}" fill="none" stroke="rgba(255,255,255,0.3)" stroke-width="1.2"/>
          <!-- value -->
          <text x="${cx}" y="${my - 9}" text-anchor="middle"
                font-family="'IBM Plex Mono',monospace" font-size="15" font-weight="700" fill="#fff">${fmtV(s.v)}</text>
          <!-- label + pct -->
          <text x="${cx}" y="${my + 8}" text-anchor="middle"
                font-family="'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif" font-size="9" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.8)">${s.l} &nbsp;Â·&nbsp; ${s.pct}% of TAM</text>
          <!-- connector dot + line -->
          <circle cx="${FW + 6}" cy="${lmy}" r="4" fill="${s.c}"/>
          <line x1="${FW + 10}" y1="${lmy}" x2="${LX - 4}" y2="${lmy}" stroke="${s.c}" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-dasharray="3,2"/>
          <!-- right label -->
          <text x="${LX}" y="${lmy - 14}" font-family="'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif"
                font-size="10" font-weight="700" fill="${s.c}">${s.title}</text>
          ${labelLines.slice(0,2).map((ln, li) =>
            `<text x="${LX}" y="${lmy + li * 12}" font-family="'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif"
                   font-size="8.5" fill="#6B7280">${ln.trim()}</text>`
          ).join('')}
        `;
      }).join('');

      // Divider lines between segments
      const dividers = [1,2].map(i => {
        const y = 6 + i * (SEG + GAP) - GAP;
        return `<line x1="2" y1="${y}" x2="${FW-2}" y2="${y}"
                      stroke="rgba(255,255,255,0.2)" stroke-width="1"/>`;
      }).join('');

      return `<svg width="${SVG_W}" height="${SVG_H}"
                   viewBox="0 0 ${SVG_W} ${SVG_H}"
                   style="display:block;width:100%;max-width:${SVG_W}px;overflow:visible;">
        ${parts}
        ${dividers}
      </svg>`;
    }

    // Donut chart â€” pure SVG
    function donutSVG(data,W,cx,cy,OR,IR){
      const tot=data.reduce((s,d)=>s+(+d.v||0),0)||100;
      let ang=-Math.PI/2;
      return data.map((d,i)=>{
        const sw=(+d.v||0)/tot*2*Math.PI;
        if(sw<0.02){ang+=sw;return '';}
        const x1=cx+OR*Math.cos(ang),y1=cy+OR*Math.sin(ang);
        const x2=cx+OR*Math.cos(ang+sw),y2=cy+OR*Math.sin(ang+sw);
        const x3=cx+IR*Math.cos(ang+sw),y3=cy+IR*Math.sin(ang+sw);
        const x4=cx+IR*Math.cos(ang),y4=cy+IR*Math.sin(ang);
        const lg=sw>Math.PI?1:0;
        const mx=cx+(OR+IR)/2*Math.cos(ang+sw/2),my=cy+(OR+IR)/2*Math.sin(ang+sw/2);
        const pct=Math.round((+d.v||0)/tot*100);
        const lbl2=pct>=6?`<text x="${mx}" y="${my+3.5}" text-anchor="middle" font-size="9" font-weight="700" fill="rgba(255,255,255,.95)" font-family="'IBM Plex Mono',monospace">${pct}%</text>`:'';
        ang+=sw;
        return `<path d="M${x1},${y1} A${OR},${OR} 0 ${lg},1 ${x2},${y2} L${x3},${y3} A${IR},${IR} 0 ${lg},0 ${x4},${y4} Z" fill="${d.c}" stroke="#fff" stroke-width="1.5"/>${lbl2}`;
      }).join('');
    }

    // Horizontal bar chart for dimensions
    function dimBarsSVG(){
      const W=380,H=dimDefs.length*36+16, lw=130;
      const rows=dimDefs.map((d,i)=>{
        const v=dim[d.k]||0, y=8+i*36;
        const bw=Math.max(4,(W-lw-40)*v/100);
        const statusC=colfn(v);
        return `<text x="${lw-8}" y="${y+16}" text-anchor="end" font-size="10" font-weight="500" fill="#374151" font-family="'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif">${d.l}</text>
          <rect x="${lw}" y="${y+6}" width="${W-lw-40}" height="16" rx="3" fill="#F3F4F6"/>
          <rect x="${lw}" y="${y+6}" width="${bw}" height="16" rx="3" fill="${d.c}" opacity="0.85"/>
          <text x="${lw+bw+5}" y="${y+17}" font-size="10" font-weight="700" fill="${d.c}" font-family="'IBM Plex Mono',monospace">${v}</text>
          <text x="${W-2}" y="${y+17}" text-anchor="end" font-size="8" font-weight="600" fill="${statusC}" font-family="'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif">${lblfn(v)}</text>`;
      }).join('');
      return `<svg width="${W}" height="${H}" viewBox="0 0 ${W} ${H}" style="max-width:100%;">${rows}</svg>`;
    }

    // Gantt â€” full width, readable labels, solid bars
    function ganttSVG(){
      const wins3=a.quickWins||[];
      const tasks=[
        {l:wins3[0]?wins3[0].replace(/[â‚¹]/g,'Rs').slice(0,38):'Define North Star Metric & Track OKRs',start:0,dur:2,c:'#065F46',type:'win'},
        {l:wins3[1]?wins3[1].replace(/[â‚¹]/g,'Rs').slice(0,38):'Run Structured Customer Discovery Sessions',start:1,dur:3,c:'#1A56B0',type:'win'},
        {l:wins3[2]?wins3[2].replace(/[â‚¹]/g,'Rs').slice(0,38):'Validate & Lock Pricing Architecture',start:3,dur:3,c:'#0891B2',type:'win'},
        {l:'Competitor Deep-Dive Intelligence',start:0,dur:4,c:'#D97706',type:'research'},
        {l:'Build GTM Beachhead Strategy',start:5,dur:4,c:'#1E3A8A',type:'strategy'},
        {l:'Close First 3 Paying Pilots',start:7,dur:5,c:'#6D28D9',type:'revenue'},
      ];

      // Responsive: fill available width
      const W=700, lw=220, weeks=12, rh=36, topPad=32, botPad=36;
      const H=tasks.length*rh+topPad+botPad;
      const cw=(W-lw)/weeks;

      // Alternating row backgrounds
      const rowBg=tasks.map((t,i)=>`<rect x="0" y="${topPad+i*rh}" width="${W}" height="${rh}" fill="${i%2===0?'#FAFAFA':'#ffffff'}"/>`).join('');

      // Vertical grid lines
      const grid=Array.from({length:weeks+1},(_,i)=>{
        const x=lw+i*cw;
        const isMajor=i%4===0;
        return `<line x1="${x}" y1="${topPad-8}" x2="${x}" y2="${H-botPad+4}" stroke="${isMajor?'#D1D5DB':'#F0F0F0'}" stroke-width="${isMajor?1:0.5}"/>`;
      }).join('');

      // Week labels â€” only show W1,W2...W12, skip if too narrow
      const wkLbls=Array.from({length:weeks},(_,i)=>`<text x="${lw+(i+0.5)*cw}" y="${topPad-10}" text-anchor="middle" font-size="8" fill="#9CA3AF" font-family="'IBM Plex Mono',monospace">W${i+1}</text>`).join('');

      // Task rows
      const typeIcon={'win':'âœ“','research':'â—‹','strategy':'â—†','revenue':'$'};
      const rows=tasks.map((t,i)=>{
        const y=topPad+i*rh;
        const bx=lw+t.start*cw+1;
        const bw=Math.max(t.dur*cw-3, 20);
        const midY=y+rh/2;
        const icon=typeIcon[t.type]||'Â·';
        // Solid bar with full fill + left accent
        return `<text x="12" y="${midY+4}" font-size="10" font-weight="700" fill="${t.c}" font-family="'IBM Plex Mono',monospace">${icon}</text>
          <text x="26" y="${midY+4}" font-size="10.5" fill="#1F2937" font-family="'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif">${t.l}</text>
          <rect x="${bx}" y="${y+6}" width="${bw}" height="${rh-12}" rx="5" fill="${t.c}" opacity="0.18"/>
          <rect x="${bx}" y="${y+6}" width="${bw}" height="${rh-12}" rx="5" fill="none" stroke="${t.c}" stroke-width="1.2" opacity="0.5"/>
          <rect x="${bx}" y="${y+6}" width="4" height="${rh-12}" rx="3" fill="${t.c}" opacity="0.9"/>
          <text x="${bx+bw/2}" y="${midY+4}" text-anchor="middle" font-size="9" font-weight="700" fill="${t.c}" font-family="'IBM Plex Mono',monospace">W${t.start+1}â€“W${t.start+t.dur}</text>`;
      }).join('');

      // Month bands at bottom
      const mColors=[['#EFF6FF','#1D4ED8'],['#ECFDF5','#065F46'],['#FFF7ED','#92400E']];
      const months=mColors.map(([bg,fc],i)=>`<rect x="${lw+i*4*cw}" y="${H-botPad+4}" width="${4*cw-1}" height="20" rx="4" fill="${bg}"/>
        <text x="${lw+(i*4+2)*cw}" y="${H-botPad+17}" text-anchor="middle" font-size="9" font-weight="700" fill="${fc}" font-family="'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif">Month ${i+1}</text>`).join('');

      // Divider line
      const divider=`<line x1="${lw}" y1="${topPad-14}" x2="${lw}" y2="${H-botPad+2}" stroke="#E5E7EB" stroke-width="1.5"/>`;

      return `<svg width="${W}" height="${H}" viewBox="0 0 ${W} ${H}" style="width:100%;max-width:${W}px;display:block;">
        <rect width="${W}" height="${H}" fill="#fff"/>
        ${rowBg}${grid}${divider}${rows}${months}${wkLbls}
      </svg>`;
    }

    // Risk heatmap â€” improved
    function riskSVG(){
      const risks2=a.topRisks||[];
      const items=[
        {l:'Competitive Response',p:2,i:3},
        {l:'Regulatory Risk',p:1,i:3},
        {l:risks2[0]?risks2[0].slice(0,18):'Execution Risk',p:2,i:2},
        {l:risks2[1]?risks2[1].slice(0,18):'Market Timing',p:3,i:2},
        {l:'Tech Disruption',p:1,i:2},
        {l:'Talent Shortage',p:1,i:1},
      ];
      const W=280,H=220,lx=52,ty=28,cw=(W-lx)/3,ch=(H-ty-20)/3;
      const heatfill=(p,iv)=>{const v=p*iv;return v>=6?'rgba(239,68,68,0.12)':v>=4?'rgba(245,158,11,0.12)':v>=2?'rgba(59,130,246,0.08)':'rgba(16,185,129,0.07)';};
      const cells=[];
      for(let row=0;row<3;row++)for(let col2=0;col2<3;col2++){
        cells.push(`<rect x="${lx+col2*cw}" y="${ty+row*ch}" width="${cw}" height="${ch}" fill="${heatfill(3-row,col2+1)}" rx="2"/>
          <rect x="${lx+col2*cw}" y="${ty+row*ch}" width="${cw}" height="${ch}" fill="none" stroke="#E5E7EB" stroke-width="0.8"/>`);
      }
      const dots=items.map((it)=>{
        const dcx=lx+(it.i-1)*cw+cw/2, dcy=ty+(3-it.p)*ch+ch/2;
        const dc=it.p*it.i>=6?'#EF4444':it.p*it.i>=4?'#F59E0B':'#3B82F6';
        return `<circle cx="${dcx}" cy="${dcy}" r="12" fill="${dc}" opacity="0.12"/>
          <circle cx="${dcx}" cy="${dcy}" r="4.5" fill="${dc}"/>
          <text x="${dcx}" y="${dcy-16}" text-anchor="middle" font-size="7" fill="#4B5563" font-family="'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif">${it.l.slice(0,14)}</text>`;
      }).join('');
      const axY=['High','Med','Low'].map((l,i)=>`<text x="${lx-5}" y="${ty+i*ch+ch/2+4}" text-anchor="end" font-size="8" fill="#6B7280" font-family="'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif">${l}</text>`).join('');
      const axX=['Low','Medium','High'].map((l,i)=>`<text x="${lx+i*cw+cw/2}" y="${H-4}" text-anchor="middle" font-size="8" fill="#6B7280" font-family="'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif">${l}</text>`).join('');
      return `<svg width="${W}" height="${H}" viewBox="0 0 ${W} ${H}" style="overflow:visible;max-width:100%;">
        ${cells.join('')}${dots}${axY}${axX}
        <text x="${lx-28}" y="${ty+1.5*ch}" text-anchor="middle" font-size="8" fill="#9CA3AF" transform="rotate(-90,${lx-28},${ty+1.5*ch})" font-family="'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif">PROBABILITY</text>
        <text x="${lx+1.5*cw}" y="${H+2}" text-anchor="middle" font-size="8" fill="#9CA3AF" font-family="'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif">IMPACT</text>
      </svg>`;
    }

          </div>`).join('')}</div>`;
        })()}
      </div>

          <div style="font-size:10px;color:#9CA3AF;margin-top:2px;">AI-generated Â· verified against market data</div>

          ${(a.keyInsights||[]).map((ins,i)=>{
            const cleaned=ins.replace(/^[ðŸ’¡âš”ï¸ðŸ’°ðŸ“âœ…âš ï¸]\s*/u,'');

              <div style="font-size:12px;color:#374151;line-height:1.65;">${esc(cleaned)}</div>
            </div>`;
          }).join('')||'<p style="color:#9CA3AF;font-size:12px;text-align:center;padding:16px;">No insights available.</p>'}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- â”€â”€ Section F: 90-Day Action Plan â”€â”€ -->

      <span style="font-size:12px;color:#9CA3AF;margin-left:auto;">Weeks 1â€“12 Â· prioritised actions</span>
    </div>

          <span style="font-size:10px;color:#6B7280;">${leg.l}</span>
        </div>`).join('')}
      </div>

        <div style="width:32px;height:32px;background:#0F1E3C;border-radius:6px;display:grid;place-items:center;font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;font-weight:700;font-size:11px;color:#fff;">IP</div>
        <div>
          <div style="font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:#0F1E3C;letter-spacing:.01em;">Infopace Management Pvt Ltd</div>
          <div style="font-size:9px;color:#9CA3AF;margin-top:1px;">Market Intelligence Platform Â· AI-Powered Analysis</div>

        <div style="font-size:9px;color:#D1D5DB;margin-top:2px;">Confidential Â· For Internal Use Only</div>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div><!-- end body -->
</div>`;

    reportEl.innerHTML=html;

  }catch(err){
    console.error('buildReport crashed:',err);
    if(document.getElementById('reportContent')){
      document.getElementById('reportContent').innerHTML=`<div style="padding:48px;color:#DC2626;font-size:13px;line-height:1.8;background:#fff;border-radius:12px;margin:24px;font-family:'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif;">
        <strong style="font-size:15px;">Report generation error</strong><br><br>${err.message}<br><br>
        <span style="color:#6B7280;font-size:11px;">F12 â†’ Console for full stack trace.</span>
      </div>`;
    }
  }
}

===== C:\Users\admin\Downloads\infopace-react (1)\infopace-react\src\App.jsx =====
import { useEffect, useState } from "react";
import { onAuthChange, signOut } from "./lib/auth";
import AuthPage from "./pages/AuthPage";
import OnboardingForm from "./pages/OnboardingForm";
import AssessmentAndDashboard from "./pages/AssessmentAndDashboard";

export default function App() {
  const [authUser,  setAuthUser]  = useState(undefined); // undefined = loading
  const [userData,  setUserData]  = useState(null);      // onboarding form data
  const [view,      setView]      = useState("auth");    // "auth" | "onboard" | "dashboard"

  // Listen for Supabase auth state changes
  useEffect(() => {
    const { data: { subscription } } = onAuthChange(user => {
      setAuthUser(user);
      if (!user) {
        setView("auth");
        setUserData(null);
      } else if (view === "auth") {
        setView("onboard");
      }
    });
    return () => subscription.unsubscribe();
  }, []);

  // â”€â”€ Loading splash â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
  if (authUser === undefined) {
    return (
      <div className="min-h-screen bg-[#EEF2F7] flex items-center justify-center">
        <div className="flex flex-col items-center gap-4">
          <div className="w-10 h-10 bg-[#0091DA] rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center font-mono font-bold text-white text-sm">IP</div>
          <div className="text-sm text-[#627289]">Loadingâ€¦</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  // â”€â”€ Auth page â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
  if (!authUser || view === "auth") {
    return <AuthPage onAuth={user => { setAuthUser(user); setView("onboard"); }} />;
  }

  // â”€â”€ Onboarding form â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
  if (view === "onboard" || !userData) {
    return (
      <OnboardingForm
        user={authUser}
        onComplete={data => {
          // Merge auth email into form data
          setUserData({ ...data, email: data.email || authUser.email });
          setView("dashboard");
        }}
      />
    );
  }

  // â”€â”€ Dashboard â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€â”€
  return (
    <AssessmentAndDashboard
      userData={userData}
      onRestart={() => {
        setUserData(null);
        setView("onboard");
      }}
    />
  );
}

===== C:\Users\admin\Downloads\infopace-react (1)\infopace-react\src\lib\auth.js =====
import { supabase } from "./supabase";

export async function signUp(email, password) {
  const { data, error } = await supabase.auth.signUp({ email, password });
  if (error) throw new Error(error.message);
  return data;
}

export async function signIn(email, password) {
  const { data, error } = await supabase.auth.signInWithPassword({ email, password });
  if (error) throw new Error(error.message);
  return data;
}

export async function signOut() {
  const { error } = await supabase.auth.signOut();
  if (error) throw new Error(error.message);
}

export async function getUser() {
  const { data: { user } } = await supabase.auth.getUser();
  return user;
}

export function onAuthChange(callback) {
  return supabase.auth.onAuthStateChange((_event, session) => {
    callback(session?.user ?? null);
  });
}


===== C:\Users\admin\Downloads\infopace-react (1)\infopace-react\src\lib\db.js =====
import { supabase } from "./supabase";

/**
 * Save a completed assessment to Supabase.
 * Linked to the currently logged-in user (if any).
 */
export async function saveSubmission({ userData, answers, result }) {
  const { data: { user } } = await supabase.auth.getUser();

  const row = {
    user_id:       user?.id ?? null,
    name:          userData.name          || "",
    email:         userData.email         || "",
    phone:         userData.phone         || "",
    organization:  userData.organization  || "",
    role:          userData.role          || "",
    website:       userData.website       || "",
    linkedin:      userData.linkedin      || "",
    team_size:     userData.teamSize      || "",
    sector:        userData.sector        || "",
    geography:     userData.geography     || "",
    problem:       userData.problem       || "",
    stage:         userData.stage         || "",
    answers:       answers,
    overall_score: result?.overallScore   ?? null,
    grade:         result?.grade          ?? null,
    dimensions:    result?.dimensions     ?? null,
    analysis_json: result,
  };

  const { error } = await supabase.from("submissions").insert([row]);
  if (error) throw new Error(error.message);
  return true;
}

/**
 * Fetch all submissions for the current user.
 */
export async function getMySubmissions() {
  const { data: { user } } = await supabase.auth.getUser();
  if (!user) return [];

  const { data, error } = await supabase
    .from("submissions")
    .select("*")
    .eq("user_id", user.id)
    .order("created_at", { ascending: false });

  if (error) throw new Error(error.message);
  return data || [];
}


===== C:\Users\admin\Downloads\infopace-react (1)\infopace-react\src\lib\exportPdf.js =====
/**
 * exportPdf â€” generates a well-formatted PDF report
 * Uses a hidden iframe with print-styled HTML â€” no external libraries needed.
 */
export function exportPdf({ userData, answers, result }) {
  const now = new Date().toLocaleDateString("en-IN", {
    day: "2-digit", month: "long", year: "numeric",
  });

  const scoreCol =
    (result?.overallScore ?? 0) >= 70 ? "#00A3A1" :
    (result?.overallScore ?? 0) >= 50 ? "#E8A000" : "#C8002D";

  const dim = result?.dimensions || {};
  const dims = [
    { l: "Market Size",       v: dim.marketSize       ?? "â€”" },
    { l: "Audience Quality",  v: dim.audienceQuality  ?? "â€”" },
    { l: "Competitive Edge",  v: dim.competitionEdge  ?? "â€”" },
    { l: "Revenue Potential", v: dim.revenuePotential ?? "â€”" },
    { l: "Risk Profile",      v: dim.riskProfile      ?? "â€”" },
    { l: "Sector Fit",        v: dim.sectorFit        ?? "â€”" },
  ];

  const answerRows = Object.entries(answers || {})
    .filter(([, v]) => v && v !== "")
    .map(([k, v]) => `
      <tr>
        <td style="padding:7px 12px;border-bottom:1px solid #F3F4F6;font-size:11px;color:#6B7280;width:40%">${k}</td>
        <td style="padding:7px 12px;border-bottom:1px solid #F3F4F6;font-size:11px;color:#111827">${Array.isArray(v) ? v.join(", ") : v}</td>
      </tr>`)
    .join("");

  const insightRows = (result?.keyInsights || [])
    .map((ins, i) => `
      <div style="display:flex;gap:12px;padding:10px 14px;background:${i % 2 === 0 ? "#FAFAFA" : "#fff"};border:1px solid #F3F4F6;border-radius:6px;margin-bottom:8px;">
        <div style="width:22px;height:22px;border-radius:50%;background:#0F1E3C;color:#fff;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0">${i + 1}</div>
        <div style="font-size:12px;color:#374151;line-height:1.65">${ins.replace(/^[ðŸ’¡âš”ï¸ðŸ’°ðŸ“âœ…âš ï¸]\s*/u, "")}</div>
      </div>`)
    .join("");

  const riskRows = (result?.topRisks || [])
    .map((r, i) => `<div style="display:flex;gap:8px;margin-bottom:8px;font-size:12px;color:#374151"><span style="color:#EF4444;font-weight:700">${i + 1}.</span>${r}</div>`)
    .join("");

  const winRows = (result?.quickWins || [])
    .map((w, i) => `<div style="display:flex;gap:8px;margin-bottom:8px;font-size:12px;color:#374151"><span style="color:#059669;font-weight:700">${i + 1}.</span>${w}</div>`)
    .join("");

  const html = `<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8"/>
  <title>Infopace Market Assessment â€” ${userData.organization || "Report"}</title>
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=IBM+Plex+Sans:wght@300;400;500;600;700&family=IBM+Plex+Mono:wght@400;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
  <style>
    *{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}
    body{font-family:'IBM Plex Sans',sans-serif;color:#111827;background:#fff;-webkit-print-color-adjust:exact;print-color-adjust:exact}
    @page{size:A4;margin:0}
    @media print{body{margin:0}}
    .page{max-width:794px;margin:0 auto;padding:0}
    /* Cover */
    .cover{background:#0F1E3C;padding:52px 56px 36px;position:relative;page-break-after:always}
    .cover-brand{font-size:8px;letter-spacing:.2em;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(148,163,184,.5);margin-bottom:20px}
    .cover-title{font-size:38px;font-weight:700;color:#F8FAFC;line-height:1;letter-spacing:-.02em;margin-bottom:10px}
    .cover-sub{font-size:13px;color:rgba(148,163,184,.6);margin-bottom:28px}
    .cover-badges{display:flex;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:36px}
    .badge{padding:5px 14px;border-radius:4px;font-size:10px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.04em}
    .cover-kpis{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08);padding-top:24px;gap:0}
    .kpi{padding:0 16px 0 0}

            const c = v >= 70 ? "#059669" : v >= 50 ? "#D97706" : "#DC2626";

        const c = cols[i] || "#374151";
        return `<div class="comp-card">
          <div class="comp-hdr" style="border-color:${c}">
            <div class="comp-name">${p.name || "â€”"}</div>
            <div class="comp-stage">${p.stage || ""} Â· ~${p.marketSharePct || "â€”"}% share</div>
          </div>
          <div class="comp-body">
            <div class="comp-tag" style="color:#059669">Strength</div>
            <div class="comp-txt" style="margin-bottom:8px">${p.strength || "â€”"}</div>

        <div class="card"><div class="card-body">${winRows || "â€”"}</div></div>

    <div class="section-hdr">
      <span class="section-letter">G</span>
      <span class="section-title">Assessment Responses</span>
      <span class="section-sub">All questions answered</span>
    </div>
    <div class="card" style="margin-bottom:28px">
      <table><tbody>${answerRows}</tbody></table>
    </div>` : ""}

    <div class="footer">
      <div>
        <div class="footer-brand">Infopace Management Pvt Ltd</div>
        <div class="footer-sub">Market Intelligence Platform Â· AI-Powered Analysis</div>
      </div>
      <div class="footer-date">
        <div>Generated ${now}</div>
        <div style="margin-top:2px;color:#D1D5DB;font-size:9px">Confidential Â· For Internal Use Only</div>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>
</div>
</body>
</html>`;

  // Open in new tab and trigger print dialog
  const win = window.open("", "_blank");
  if (!win) {
    alert("Please allow pop-ups to export PDF.");
    return;
  }
  win.document.write(html);
  win.document.close();
  win.focus();
  setTimeout(() => {
    win.print();
  }, 800);
}


===== C:\Users\admin\Downloads\infopace-react (1)\infopace-react\src\lib\gemini.js =====
/**
 * generateAnalysis â€” calls the Node proxy (server.js â†’ Gemini)
 * Returns a parsed analysis object.
 */
export async function generateAnalysis(userData, answers = {}) {
  const answerLines = Object.entries(answers)
    .filter(([, v]) => v && v !== "")
    .map(([, v]) => `  - ${Array.isArray(v) ? v.join(", ") : v}`)
    .join("\n");

  const prompt = `You are a senior market intelligence analyst with deep knowledge of Indian and global markets.

Analyse this product and produce a data-driven market assessment using your real knowledge of this sector, geography, and companies.

PRODUCT: ${userData.organization || "Unnamed"}
SECTOR: ${userData.sector || "Not specified"}
BUSINESS TYPE: ${userData.role || "Not specified"}
TARGET GEOGRAPHY: ${userData.geography || "Not specified"}
BUSINESS STAGE: ${userData.stage || "Not specified"}
PROBLEM BEING SOLVED: ${userData.problem || "Not described"}

WHAT THE FOUNDER TOLD US ABOUT THEIR MARKET:
${answerLines || "(answers not provided)"}

CRITICAL INSTRUCTIONS:
1. Use your REAL knowledge of the ${userData.sector} market in ${userData.geography} â€” cite real TAM figures, real CAGR rates
2. Name REAL competitors that actually exist in ${userData.sector} in ${userData.geography} â€” not placeholders
3. Score those competitors based on your actual knowledge of their market position
4. Revenue by region must reflect real market concentration for ${userData.sector} in ${userData.geography}
5. The overall score must genuinely reflect the founder's answers above
6. TAM/SAM/SOM must be realistic for this specific sector and geography

Return ONLY raw JSON, no markdown fences, no explanation before or after:
{
"overallScore": <0-100>,
"grade": "Excellent" or "Strong" or "Moderate" or "Needs Work" or "Critical",
"verdict": "<One specific sentence naming the product, its key opportunity, and its biggest risk>",
"realTimeInsight": "<One real market fact with actual numbers>",
"dimensions": {"marketSize":<0-100>,"audienceQuality":<0-100>,"competitionEdge":<0-100>,"revenuePotential":<0-100>,"riskProfile":<0-100>,"sectorFit":<0-100>},
"tamCrore": <realistic TAM in â‚¹Crore>,
"samCrore": <serviceable portion>,
"somCrore": <3-year realistic target>,
"growthRate": <real CAGR %>,
"competitorProfiles": [
  {"name":"<REAL company 1>","stage":"<funding/size>","strength":"<real strength>","weakness":"<real gap>","marketSharePct":<realistic %>},
  {"name":"<REAL company 2>","stage":"<funding/size>","strength":"<real strength>","weakness":"<real gap>","marketSharePct":<realistic %>},
  {"name":"<REAL company 3>","stage":"<funding/size>","strength":"<real strength>","weakness":"<real gap>","marketSharePct":<realistic %>}
],
"marketShare": [
  {"name":"<product>","pct":<1-10>,"val":"â‚¹<somCrore>Cr"},
  {"name":"<real comp 1>","pct":<their share %>,"val":"â‚¹<amount>Cr"},
  {"name":"<real comp 2>","pct":<their share %>,"val":"â‚¹<amount>Cr"},
  {"name":"<real comp 3>","pct":<their share %>,"val":"â‚¹<amount>Cr"},
  {"name":"Others","pct":<remainder>,"val":"â€”"}
],
"revenueByRegion": {
  "labels": [<5-6 real cities relevant to the sector>],
  "currentMarket": [<real â‚¹Cr market size per city>],
  "projected2027": [<apply growthRate CAGR>],
  "ourTarget": [<realistic 2-8% of each city market>]
},
"competitorRadar": [
  {"name":"<product>","scores":{"pricingPower":<0-100>,"distribution":<0-100>,"brandValue":<0-100>,"innovation":<0-100>,"marketReach":<0-100>,"customerSat":<0-100>},"avg":"<average>"},
  {"name":"<comp 1>","scores":{"pricingPower":<n>,"distribution":<n>,"brandValue":<n>,"innovation":<n>,"marketReach":<n>,"customerSat":<n>},"avg":"<average>"},
  {"name":"<comp 2>","scores":{"pricingPower":<n>,"distribution":<n>,"brandValue":<n>,"innovation":<n>,"marketReach":<n>,"customerSat":<n>},"avg":"<average>"},
  {"name":"<comp 3>","scores":{"pricingPower":<n>,"distribution":<n>,"brandValue":<n>,"innovation":<n>,"marketReach":<n>,"customerSat":<n>},"avg":"<average>"}
],
"trendData": {
  "months": ["Apr","May","Jun","Jul","Aug","Sep","Oct","Nov","Dec","Jan","Feb","Mar"],
  "series": [
    {"label":"<product>","dash":[],"data":[<12 monthly values 0-1% to 3-8%>]},
    {"label":"<comp 1>","dash":[],"data":[<12 monthly values ~20-35%>]},
    {"label":"<comp 2>","dash":[],"data":[<12 monthly values ~15-25%>]},
    {"label":"<comp 3>","dash":[],"data":[<12 monthly values ~10-20%>]}
  ]
},
"geoRegions": {
  "Asia Pacific": {"rev":"<global sector size>","pct":"<% of global TAM>","ids":[4,50,156,356,360,392,410,458,702,704,764]},
  "North America": {"rev":"<global sector size>","pct":"<% of global TAM>","ids":[124,484,840]},
  "South America": {"rev":"<global sector size>","pct":"<% of global TAM>","ids":[32,68,76,152,170]},
  "Europe": {"rev":"<global sector size>","pct":"<% of global TAM>","ids":[276,250,826,380,724,528,208,752,756,616]},
  "Africa": {"rev":"<global sector size>","pct":"<% of global TAM>","ids":[566,710,404,818,12]}
},
"keyInsights": ["<insight 1 with numbers>","<insight 2>","<insight 3>","<insight 4>","<90-day action>"],
"topRisks": ["<risk 1>","<risk 2>","<risk 3>"],
"quickWins": ["<win 1>","<win 2>","<win 3>"],
"popups": {
  "mktshare": "<2 sentences: TAM/SAM/SOM + competitor context>",
  "revregion": "<2 sentences: priority cities and why>",
  "radar": "<2 sentences: where product leads and trails>",
  "trend": "<2 sentences: trajectory and inflection point>",
  "geomap": "<2 sentences: geographic focus rationale>"
}
}`;

  const resp = await fetch("/api", {
    method: "POST",
    headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
    body: JSON.stringify({ _type: "analysis", prompt }),
  });

  if (!resp.ok) throw new Error("API error " + resp.status);

  const data = await resp.json();

  // Support both Gemini native format and Anthropic-style wrapper
  const allText = (data?.candidates?.[0]?.content?.parts || [])
    .map((p) => p.text || "")
    .join("") || (data?.content?.[0]?.text || "");

  if (!allText) throw new Error("Empty API response");

  let raw = allText.trim();
  const fm = raw.match(/```(?:json)?\s*([\s\S]*?)```/);
  if (fm) raw = fm[1].trim();

  const s0 = raw.indexOf("{"), e0 = raw.lastIndexOf("}");
  if (s0 === -1 || e0 === -1) throw new Error("No JSON in response");
  raw = raw.slice(s0, e0 + 1);

  return JSON.parse(raw);
}
